name: O Pesto Ever
instructions: Pulse pine nuts, almonds, and garlic in a food processor for about 20 seconds. Add basil, 1 cup olive oil, salt, and pepper. Blend for about 1 minute. Add additional olive oil until desired consistency is reached.

name: O'kee's Healthy Gray Corned Beef Brisket From Scratch

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, and cut into 1/2-inch strips
halved lengthwise, and cut into 1/2-inch strips

instructions: Make brine: Bring water to a boil in a large pot. Stir in salt and sugar until dissolved; remove from heat and add cinnamon stick pieces, juniper berries, cloves, allspice berries, mustard seeds, peppercorns, ginger, and crumbled bay leaves. Let brine cool to room temperature, at least 1 hour.

Prepare corned beef: Place brisket in a large ceramic or glass dish deep enough to keep brisket submerged in brine. Pour brine over brisket; weigh it down to keep submerged. Cover the dish tightly with plastic wrap. Brine brisket in the refrigerator, checking brine level every day, 7 to 10 days.
Remove brisket from brine and rinse under cool running water; discard brine. Place brisket in a large slow cooker; add enough cool water to cover brisket by several inches and season with sea salt.

Cook on High for 2 hours. Add celery root, red potatoes, rutabagas, carrots, parsnips, and onions. Cook on Low until vegetables are softened and brisket is hot and gray in the center, about 30 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of brisket should read 71°C (70 degrees C).
Remove brisket to a cutting board and cover tightly with aluminum foil.
Arrange cabbage wedges into the slow cooker; continue cooking until all vegetables are tender, 20 to 30 minutes.
Slice corned beef into thin slices and serve with vegetables.

name: O.d.a.
instructions: Dissolve honey in ⅓ cup hot water. Chill syrup until cold.
DO AHEAD: Honey syrup can be made 1 month ahead. Cover and keep chilled.

Slap basil leaves between your hands and place in the bottom of a Collins glass with rum, lemon juice, and ½ oz. honey syrup. Muddle with a few firm strokes, top with tepache, and stir to combine. Fill glass with crushed ice and garnish with mint and Thai basil.

name: Oakley's Chocolate Blancmange
instructions: Combine chocolate and butter in the top of a saucepan placed over a pot of simmering water; simmer over medium heat until melted, about 5 minutes.

Combine sugar, cornstarch, and salt in a bowl; stir in about 1/4 cup milk. Add mixture to melted chocolate and blend thoroughly. Add remaining milk. Place saucepan over direct heat and cook, stirring constantly, until mixture boils and thickens, about 1 minute more. Return the saucepan to the pot of boiling water, cover, and cook 15 minutes longer, stirring occasionally.
Remove the saucepan from heat and stir in vanilla. Cool in the refrigerator, about 3 hours to overnight before serving.

name: Oat And Apple Pancakes

ingredients.item: Apple (such as granny smith or pink lady)
ingredients.prep: peeled, cored, sliced crosswise  0.25 inch thick

instructions: Whisk flour, oats, pecans, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt in a large bowl. Whisk egg, buttermilk, 2 Tbsp. maple syrup, and 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium bowl; mix into dry ingredients.

Heat a griddle or large nonstick skillet over medium; brush with oil. Place 2 apple slices in skillet, spacing about ½" apart, and cook until lightly golden, about 1 minute. Turn over and pour ⅓ cup batter over apples, spreading batter to cover. Cook pancake until bottom is golden brown and bubbles form on the surface, about 3 minutes. Flip and cook until cooked through and other side is golden brown, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a plate. Repeat with remaining apple slices and batter, brushing griddle with more oil as needed.
Serve pancakes with yogurt and more maple syrup.

name: Oat And Pecan Brittle Cookies

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
. diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Toast pecans on a small rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until slightly darkened and fragrant, 8–10 minutes. Let cool.

Line another small rimmed baking sheet with a Silpat baking mat. Cook granulated sugar, butter, and 2 Tbsp. water in a small saucepan over medium-low heat, stirring gently with a heatproof rubber spatula, until sugar is dissolved. Increase heat to medium and bring syrup to a rapid simmer. Cook, without stirring, swirling pan often, until syrup turns a deep amber color, 8–10 minutes. Immediately remove saucepan from heat and stir in pecans. Once pecans are well coated, add baking soda and salt and stir to incorporate (mixture will foam and sputter as baking soda aerates caramel). Working quickly (it will harden fast), scrape mixture onto prepared baking sheet and spread into a thin layer. Let cool completely, 5–10 minutes. Chop into pea-size pieces; set aside.

Place half of butter (½ cup) in the bowl of a stand mixer. Bring remaining butter to a boil in a small saucepan over medium-low heat, stirring often with a heatproof rubber spatula. Cook, scraping bottom and sides of pan constantly, until butter sputters, foams, and, eventually, you see browned bits floating on the surface, 5–7 minutes. Pour brown butter over butter in stand mixer bowl, making sure to scrape in all the browned bits. Let sit until butter begins to resolidify, about 30 minutes.
Pulse flour, salt, and baking soda in a food processor to combine. Add half of reserved pecan brittle and 1 cup oats; process in long pulses until oats and brittle are finely ground.

Add brown sugar and granulated sugar to butter and beat with paddle attachment on medium speed until light and smooth but not fluffy, about 2 minutes. Scrape down sides of bowl and add eggs and vanilla. Beat until very light and satiny, about 1 minute. Scrape down sides of bowl and add flour mixture; beat on low speed until no dry spots remain and you have a soft, evenly mixed dough. Add remaining half of brittle and remaining 1 cup oats; mix on low speed just to distribute. Fold batter several times with a spatula to ensure everything is evenly mixed.

Using a 2-oz. scoop or ¼-cup measuring cup, scoop level portions of dough to make 18 cookies. Place on a parchment-lined baking sheet, spacing as close together as possible (you’ll space them out before baking). Cover tightly with plastic wrap and chill at least 12 hours and up to 2 days. (If you’re pressed for time, a couple hours will do; cookies just won’t be as chewy.)

When ready to bake, place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Line 2 large rimmed baking sheets with parchment paper. Arrange 6 cookies on each prepared baking sheet, spacing at least 3" apart.

Bake cookies, rotating baking sheets top to bottom and front to back after 12 minutes, until dark golden brown around the edges, 16–20 minutes. Let cookies cool 5 minutes on baking sheets, then transfer cookies to a wire rack with a spatula and let cool completely.

Carefully move a rack to middle of oven. Arrange remaining dough on one of the baking sheets (it’s okay if it’s still warm). Bake as before (this batch might go a bit faster).
Do ahead: Dough can be formed 2 months ahead; chill dough balls at least 2 hours before transferring to freezer. Once frozen solid, store in resealable plastic freezer bags and keep frozen. No need to thaw before baking, but you may need to add a minute or two to the baking time. Cookies can be baked 5 days ahead; store airtight at room temperature.

name: Oat And Pistachio Sandies
instructions: Pulse flour, oats, pistachios, salt, and baking soda in a food processor to combine (small pieces of oats and pistachio should still be visible).

Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat butter, granulated sugar, and powdered sugar in a medium bowl to create air pockets in butter, about 5 minutes; mixture will look light and fluffy. Reduce speed to low and add dry ingredients, mixing just until blended. Divide dough between 2 sheets of plastic wrap or parchment paper and shape into about 1½”-diameter logs. Chill until firm, at least 1 hour.(The colder your dough, the easier it will be to cut into even slices.)

Place racks in lower and upper thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Using a serrated knife, slice logs into ¼”-thick rounds and place on parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing about ½” apart. Bake, rotating baking sheets once, until cookies are golden brown around the edges, 10–12 minutes. Transfer to wire racks; let cool.
DO AHEAD: Keep dough chilled up to 5 days, or freeze up to 1 month.

name: Oat Bars Without Sugar
instructions: Στρώνουμε ένα μικρό ταψάκι με αντικολλητικό χαρτί. Προθερμαίνουμε τον φούρνο στους 160°C, στον αέρα.
Ζεσταίνουμε σε ένα κατσαρολάκι το γάλα βρώμης , προσέχοντας όμως να μη βράσει.
Το αποσύρουμε από την εστία και ρίχνουμε μέσα τους χουρμάδες και τις σταφίδες.
Αφήνουμε τα αποξηραμένα φρούτα για 10 λεπτά να μουλιάσουν.
Αλέθουμε στο μπλέντερ τις νιφάδες βρώμης.
Προσθέτουμε το γάλα βρώμης με τα φρούτα, το ξύσμα, το χυμό, το ταχίνι, την κανέλα και τα αλέθουμε να πολτοποιηθούν.
Τέλος ρίχνουμε το μπέικιν πάουντερ και τη σόδα και ανακατεύουμε.
Ενσωματώνουμε τις σταγόνες σοκολάτας, αναδιπλώνοντας απαλά το μείγμα με σπάτουλα.
Με το κουτάλι βάζουμε το μείγμα στο ταψί και κάνουμε ένα νοητό τετράγωνο 14×14 εκ.
Ψήνουμε στη μεσαία σχάρα του προθερμασμένου φούρνου για 25 λεπτά, μέχρι να φουσκώσει και να σταθεροποιηθεί.
Αφήνουμε το μείγμα να κρυώσει καλά και στη συνέχεια το κόβουμε σε μπάρες με κοφτερό μαχαίρι.
Βουτάμε τις μπάρες στη λιωμένη σοκολάτα και τις ακουμπάμε σε χαρτί μέχρι να κρυώσει και να σταθεροποιηθεί η επικάλυψη.
Οι μπάρες με βρώμη και ταχίνι , διατηρούνται για πολλές ημέρες στο ψυγείο και μας δίνουν ενέργεια κάθε στιγμή.

name: Oat Milk
instructions: Μέσα στο μπλέντερ βάζουμε τις ολόκληρες νιφάδες βρώμης και προσθέτουμε το νερό.
Χτυπάμε για περίπου μισό λεπτό να πολτοποιηθεί η βρώμη.
Σουρώνουμε το γάλα βρώμης σε ψιλή σίτα.
Κρατάμε το υγρό και πετάμε την πούλπα βρώμης.
Ιδανικά σουρώνουμε και δεύτερη φορά το γάλα από λεπτό σουρωτήρι.
Είναι βασικό να σουρώσετε σε λεπτή σίτα ή ακόμα καλύτερα σε ένα τουλπάνι.
Το ρόφημα βρώμης διατηρείται το πολύ για 2-3 ημέρες στο ψυγείο.

name: Oat Milk ( Recipe To Make Oat Milk)
original_name: Leche de avena casera (receta fácil para hacer leche de avena)
instructions: Con el accesorio de picar de la batidora pulverizamos los copos de avena y la vaina de vainilla. Calentamos el agua, hasta que esté tibia (no caliente) unos 6 minutos a fuego medio. Incorporamos la avena junto con la vainilla que ya has pulverizado y dejamos 2 minutos a fuego medio-bajo, removiendo constantemente.
Transcurrido el tiempo, colamos la mezcla en un colador de tela para que sólo nos quede el líquido y ningún trocito de avena o vainilla. Llevamos a la nevera.
category: Recetas de Bebidas, Recetas de Desayunos

name: Oat Muffin Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağı tam buğday unu (beyaz un da kullanılabilir)
1/2 su bardağı süt (badem sütü ya da başka bitkisel süt de olur)
1/4 su bardağı zeytinyağı veya hindistan cevizi yağı
1/2 su bardağı ceviz, fındık veya damla çikolata (isteğe bağlı)
Karışıma rendelenmiş havuç veya kabak ekleyerek sebzeli, daha nemli muffinler yapabilirsiniz.
üzerini yulaf, susam, chia tohumu veya fındık kırığı ile süsleyebilirsiniz.
Daha proteini yüksek hale getirmek için hamura yoğurt, lor peyniri veya protein tozu ekleyebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Fırını 180 dereceye ayarlayıp ısıtmaya başlayın.
2. Muzları bir çatal yardımıyla iyice ezin ve yumurtalarla çırpın.
3. Bal (veya pekmez), süt ve yağı ekleyip karıştırın.
4. Ayrı bir kapta un, yulaf, kabartma tozu, tarçın ve vanilini harmanlayın.
5. Sıvı karışımı kuru karışıma ekleyin, çok fazla yoğurmadan tahta kaşıkla karıştırın.
6. İsteğe bağlı olarak ceviz, fındık ya da damla çikolata ekleyin.
7. Karışımı muffin kalıplarına paylaştırın.
8. Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında yaklaşık 20–25 dakika pişirin.
9. İlk sıcaklığı geçince servis edin.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Oat Pancakes

ingredients.item: Framboesas (cacau e hortelã para decorar q.b.)

instructions: Coloque todos os ingredientes numa taça e envolva muito bem, até obter uma mistura homogénea. Leve ao lume uma frigideira antiaderente e deixar aquecer bem.
Quando estiver quente, coloque uma porção de massa na frigideira (1/2 concha de sopa). Assim que começar a fazer bolhinhas, deixe cozinhar, durante 5 a 10 segundos.
Com a ajuda de uma espátula, vire a panqueca e deixe por mais 5 a 10 segundos. Retire e repita o processo até a massa acabar.

Entretanto, leve um tacho ao lume com as natas e deixe ferver, retire e adicione o chocolate partido. Mexa bem até derreter. Regue as panquecas com a ganache de chocolate, polvilhe com cacau em pó, decore com framboesas e hortelã e sirva.

name: Oat Porrigde Recipe

ingredients.item: 400 ml de leche ((la de tu preferencia))
Frutas, especias o frutos secos para acompañar.

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta, colocando una olla al fuego a calentar junto a la leche o la bebida que elegiste. Deja cocinar.
Cuando veas que tu leche esté a punto de ebullición, le añadirás el azúcar y la pizca de sal. Mezcla hasta que se integre.
Procede a incorporar las cucharadas de avena, vas a mezclar, bajarás el fuego a lento y taparás. Deja cocinar por 5 minutos.
Pasado ese tiempo, destapa tu porrigde, sube el fuego a medio e inicia a mezclar para que no se pegue.
Deja cocinar por 7 minutos sin dejar de mover hasta que obtengas una mezcla densa y los copos de la avena hayan crecido.
Cuando tengas la textura tipo papilla o crema, apaga y deja enfriar.
Cuando esté tibia, sirve y degusta con tus acompañantes favoritos.
¡Disfruta!

name: Oat Pudding With Mango And Coconut
instructions: Bring a pot of lightly salted water to boil; stir in oats. Reduce heat to medium-low; cook and stir until oats soften and water is absorbed, about 15 minutes. Cool, about 15 minutes.
Combine oats, cashew milk, and banana in a blender; blend until smooth.
Divide oat mixture between two bowls; top with diced mango, coconut flakes, and honey.

name: Oat Toast
instructions: 1. Öncelikle bir kasede yumurta, yoğurt ve yulafı çırpın.
2. Üzerine yeşillikleri ve kapya biberi ekleyerek karıştırın.
3. Tost makinesine yağlı kağıt serin ve hazırladığınız karışımı tost makinesinin üzerine döküp pişirin.
4. Ardından kaşar ve hindi fümeyi ekleyerek tost şeklinde katlayın.
5. Biraz daha pişirdikten sonra, yulaf tost hazır.
6.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Oatmeal
instructions: Mix milk together with water and bring to a steady boil in a small saucepan.
Add rolled oats and simmer on low. Stir mixture constantly until it has thickened, about 5 minutes.
Serve with toppings of your choice.

name: Oatmeal And Apple Cookies
instructions: Precalienta el horno a 180°C (177°C) y forra una bandeja para hornear con papel de horno o un tapete de silicona. En un bol grande, combina la avena, la manzana rallada, las nueces picadas, la canela en polvo, el extracto de vainilla y la pizca de sal.
En otro recipiente, bate ligeramente el huevo y luego agrégalo a la mezcla de avena y manzana, junto a la miel. Mezcla todo hasta obtener una masa homogénea.

Con la ayuda de una cuchara, forma pequeñas porciones de masa y colócalas en la bandeja para hornear preparada, separadas entre sí. Usa la parte posterior de la cuchara o tus dedos ligeramente humedecidos para aplanar suavemente cada porción de masa y darle forma de galleta. Coloca sobre cada galleta media nuez y aplástala ligeramente sobre la masa

Hornea las galletas en el horno precalentado durante aproximadamente 15-20 minutos, o hasta que estén doradas y firmes al tacto. Una vez listas, retira las galletas del horno y déjalas enfriar completamente antes de servirlas.

name: Oatmeal And Apple Muffins In The Oven Or In The Air Fryer
original_name: Magdalenas de avena y manzana al horno o en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 50 g de miel o azúcar de caña
200 g de compota de manzana sin azúcar

instructions: Precalentamos la freidora de aire a 160 °C durante 3 minutos. Usamos moldes de silicona para magdalenas que quepan en el cestillo (salen entre 6 y 8 por tanda, según el tamaño) Mezclamos por un lado los ingredientes líquidos: compota, huevo y aceite. Por otro lado, unimos los secos: harina, avena, azúcar, levadura, canela y sal. Juntamos ambas mezclas sin batir demasiado, solo hasta integrar. Rellenamos los moldes hasta 3/4 de su altura. Cocinamos en la freidora de aire a 160 °C durante 13-15 minutos. Dejamos que se enfríen un poco antes de desmoldar y pasar a una rejilla.

Precalentamos el horno a 200 °C con calor arriba y abajo. Preparamos una bandeja con cápsulas de papel para magdalenas (salen unas 12). En un bol, mezclamos con varillas la compota, el huevo y el aceite hasta que quede homogéneo. En otro bol, juntamos la harina, la avena, el azúcar o miel, la levadura, la canela y la sal. Vertemos los ingredientes líquidos sobre los secos y removemos hasta integrar. Repartimos la mezcla en las cápsulas, llenando 3/4 de su capacidad. Horneamos entre 20 y 25 minutos. Estarán listas cuando al pinchar con un palillo, salga limpio. Dejamos enfriar en rejilla antes de comer

name: Oatmeal And Banana Cake
instructions: Χρησιμοποιούμε μια μακρόστενη φόρμα 12×23 εκ. Τη βουτυρώνουμε και τη αλευρώνουμε καλά.
Λιώνουμε τις ώριμες μπανάνες με ένα πιρούνι.
Σε ένα μπολ βάζουμε το λάδι, τη ζάχαρη, τη βανίλια, την κανέλα, το μπέικιν πάουντερ, τη μαγειρική σόδα και το αλάτι, και τα ανακατεύουμε με σύρμα.
Προσθέτουμε την μπανάνα, το μέλι και τα αυγά, και χτυπάμε με σύρμα ή με μίξερ χειρός μέχρι να ομογενοποιηθούν.
Ρίχνουμε το αλεύρι βρώμης και ανακατεύουμε με σπάτουλα.
Στο τέλος προσθέτουμε τη σοκολάτα και ανακατεύουμε απαλά.
Μεταφέρουμε το μείγμα στη φόρμα και ισιώνουμε την επιφάνεια.
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο, στους 170°C, στις αντιστάσεις, στην κάτω σχάρα, για περίπου 1 ώρα και 10 λεπτά, μέχρι η λάμα του μαχαιριού να βγαίνει στεγνή από το κέντρο.
Αφήνουμε το κέικ πάνω σε σχάρα για 15 λεπτά και μετά ξεφορμάρουμε.
Περιχύνουμε με λιωμένη σοκολάτα και στολίζουμε με φέτες μπανάνας.

name: Oatmeal And Chocolate Chip Cookies
instructions: 1. Tereyağı ve yumurtaları derin bir kapta çırpın.
2.  Yumurtaları ekleyip çırpmaya devam edin.
3.  Damla çikolata hariç diğer malzemeleri ilave edip kaşık yardımıyla karıştırın.
4.  Kaşığa yapışan bir hamur kıvamını alacak.
5.  Son olarak damla çikolatayı ekleyip bir kez daha karıştırın.
6.  Tepsiye yağlı kağıt serin.
7.  Hamurdan kaşık yardımıyla parçalar koparın.
8.  Tepsiye aralıklı olarak dizin.
9.  Önceden ısıtılmış 160-170derece fırında 10-15 dakika pişirin.
10.  Fırından  çıkardıktan sonra kurabiyeler soğuyuncaya kadar tepsiden almayın.
11.  Aksi halde dağılabilirler.
12.  Soğuduktan sonra başka bir kaba alın.
13.  Servis yapın.
14. Klasik damla çikolatalı kurabiyelere sofranızda büyük bir yer açın.

name: Oatmeal And Chocolate Cookies (2 Healthy And Recipes)
original_name: Galletas de avena y chocolate (2 recetas saludables y fáciles)

ingredients.item: 1 taza de harina de trigo integral
1/2 taza de cacao en polvo sin azúcar
1/2 taza de mantequilla a temperatura ambiente
1/2 taza de crema de cacahuete natural (sin azúcar añadida)

instructions: Precalienta tu horno a 180°C y forra una bandeja para hornear con papel pergamino. En un bol grande, combina la harina integral, el cacao en polvo, la avena, el bicarbonato de sodio y la sal. Mezcla bien los ingredientes secos y reserva. En otro bol, bate la mantequilla hasta que esté suave y cremosa. Añade el huevo y el extracto de vainilla a la mantequilla batida. Continúa batiendo hasta que estén bien combinados. Agrega gradualmente los ingredientes secos al bol de la mezcla de mantequilla y huevo. Mezcla hasta que todos los ingredientes estén bien combinados y se forme una masa homogénea. Combina los ingredientes húmedos con los ingredientes secos y mezcla bien. Si la masa está muy seca, puedes añadir una cucharada de leche o agua. Incorpora los chips de chocolate si los estás utilizando.

Con la ayuda de una cuchara, forma montoncitos de masa y colócalos en la bandeja de horno. Aplana ligeramente cada montón para darle forma de galleta. Hornea durante 10-12 minutos o hasta que las galletas estén firmes al tacto pero aún así un poco blandas en el centro.
Deja enfriar en la bandeja durante unos minutos antes de transferirlas a una rejilla de enfriamiento para que se enfríen completamente.
category: Recetas de Desayunos, Recetas de Postres Caseros

name: Oatmeal And Chocolate Recipe
original_name: Receta fácil de de avena y chocolate
instructions: Inicia la receta y agrega en la licuadora las avenas en hojuelas y vierte el huevo y la clara aparte.
Incorpora a la licuadora el polvo de hornear y la canela en polvo.
Añade la cucharada de cacao, el plátano y la leche.
Licúa muy bien hasta que todos los ingredientes se hayan procesado y no queden grumos.
Vierte la mezcla en la waflera previamente engrasada, y de manera uniforme. Hazlo con cuidado para que no se desborde.
Cocina en la waflera hasta que estén bien cocidos y crujientes.
Sirve y acompaña con yogurt griego, rebanadas de plátano, miel y canela en polvo.
¡Disfruta!

name: Oatmeal And Coconut Cookies Recipe
original_name: Receta de galletas de avena y coco
instructions: Precalienta el horno a 150 ºC, con calor arriba y abajo.
En un tazón mediano y bate la mantequilla con el azúcar hasta obtener una consistencia cremosa.
Añade el huevo y seguimos batiendo.
Agrega la harina, previamente tamizada, bate muy bien hasta integrar por completo.
Ahora debes agregar la vainilla, el coco y los copos de avena.
Con la ayuda de una cuchara, agarra una porción y colócala sobre una bandeja de horno forrada en papel o enharinada.
Hornea las galletas de avena y coco durante 15-20 minutos.
Retira la bandeja del horno y saca las galletas, déjalas reposar sobre una rejilla.

name: Oatmeal And Nut Bread
instructions: 1. Bazı yemek tarifleri fazlaca zaman ve emek ister.
2.  Suyu makinenin pişirme haznesine alın.
3.  Diğer tüm malzemeyi bir kapta harmanlayarak ekmek makinesine aktarın.
4.  Makinenin pişirme programını 3 saate ayarlayın.
5. Yoğurma ve mayalanma işleminin sonunda hamurun üzerine yulaf ezmesi serpiştirip pişmeye bırakın.
6. Pişen ekmeği makineden alıp, soğuduktan sonra kalıptan çıkararak servis yapın.

name: Oatmeal And Olive Pastry Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağı çekirdeği çıkarılmış, doğranmış yeşil veya siyah zeytin
Yulaf kepeği + az miktar beyaz un karışımı
1 çay kaşığı karbonat + 1 tatlı kaşığı limon suyu veya sirke

instructions: 1. Yumurtaları, zeytinyağını ve yoğurdu derin bir kapta tel çırpıcıyla karıştırın.
2. Tuz ve şekeri ekleyip homojen olana kadar çırpmaya devam edin.
3. Kabartma tozunu ve yulaf ununu kontrollü şekilde ekleyin.
4. Ele yapışmayan, yumuşak kıvamlı bir hamur elde edin.
5. Doğranmış zeytinleri ve baharatları ekleyip kısa süre yoğurun.
6. Hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparıp şekil verin.
7. Yağlı kâğıt serili tepsiye aralıklı dizin.
8. Üzerlerine ayırdığınız yumurta sarısını sürün, isteğe bağlı susam veya çörek otu serpin ve servis edin.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Oatmeal And Peach Bowl Recipe
original_name: Receta de bowl de avena y durazno

ingredients.item: 1 y ½ taza de avena en copos

instructions: Inicia la receta y calienta una olla con las dos tazas de agua y agrega las ramas de canela y la vainilla.
Cuando esté hirviendo, incorpora la avena en hojuelas o copos. Mezcla muy bien, baja el fuego y cocina por 5 minuto o hasta que el cereal se hidrate.
Posteriormente,  vierte la leche, el edulcorante y la pizca de sal. Mezcla muy bien y cocina hasta que la avena espese o tome consistencia.
Apaga y deja reposar por 5 minutos o esté a temperatura ambiente.
Vierte la avena en un bol o tazón, y decora por un lado con los duraznos en almíbar, la granola y las nueces troceadas.
Y ya estará lista para degustar.

name: Oatmeal Apple Bread
instructions: 1. Yulafı geniş bir kaseye alın.
2.  Üzerine kaynar su ekleyip karıştırın.
3.  Üzerini streç filmle sarın ve şişmesi için 8-10 dakika bekletin.
4.  Ayrı bir karıştırma kabında tuz, un ve mayayı harmanlayın.
5.  Şişen yulaf ve rendelediğiniz elmayı ve yarım su bardağı suyu ilave edip yumuşak kıvamlı bir hamur elde edecek şekilde yoğurun.
6.  Üzerini streç filmle sarıp 2 saat dinlendirin.
7.  Mayalanan hamuru hafif unlanmış tezgah üzerine alarak yoğurun.
8.  Elinizle yuvarlayarak şekil verin.
9.  Hafif unlanmış fırın tepsisine alın ve mayalanması için 1 saat daha bekletin.
10.  Mayalanan hamuru önceden ısıtılmış 200 derece fırında üzeri kızarıncaya kadar yaklaşık 30 dakika pişirin.
11.  Soğuduktan sonra dilimleyip servis yapın.

name: Oatmeal Apple Cookies
instructions: 1. Un, yulaf ezmesi, karbonat, vanilya ve tuzu bir kapta harmanlayın.
2.  Geniş bir kapta tereyağı ve şekeri mikserle krema kıvamına gelinceye kadar çırpın.
3.  Yumurtaları teker teker ekleyin.
4.  Un karışımını ve sütü ilave edip iyice karıştırın.
5.  Son olarak küp doğranmış elmaları ekleyin.
6.  Hamurdan kaşıkla parçalar alıp yağlı kağıt serili tepsiye aralıklı olarak dizin.
7.  180 dereceye ayarlı fırında 12-14 dakika pişirin.
8. Izgara teli üzerinde soğutun.
9.  Çikolatayı benmari usulü eritin ve kağıttan yapılmış külaha doldurun.
10. Kurabiyelerin üzerine çikolatadan çizgiler oluşturun ve çikolata donduktan sonra servis yapın.

name: Oatmeal Apple Dessert
instructions: 1. Fırını 180 derecede ısıtın.
2.  Bir tencereye margarinin 200 gramını ve esmer şekeri koyun, karıştırarak eritin.
3. Erittiğiniz yağa un, kabartma tozu ve Hindistan cevizini ekleyin.
4.  Bu karışımdan yarım su bardağı ayırın.
5.  Kalan karışımı kare bir fırın tepsinin tabanına yayın, ısıtılmış fırında üzeri altın sarısı renk alana kadar pişirin, soğumaya bırakın.
6.  Küp kesilmiş elmaları kapağı kapalı olarak kısık ateşte biraz yumuşayana kadar pişirin.
7.  Ocaktan alın, tarçını ilave edip karıştırın.
8.  Soğumuş karışımın üzerine elmaları dökün ve yayın.
9.  Bir kabın içine ayırmış olduğunuz karışımı, kalan 50 gram yağı, yulafı ve kuş üzümünü ekleyip elmaların üzerine ufalayın.
10.  Fırında hafif kızarana kadar pişirin.
11.  Uzun dilimler halinde keserek, isterseniz dondurmayla sıcak servis edin.
12. Dilerseniz tatlının yanında sunmak için, ev yapımı kakaolu dondurma tarifini deneyebilirsiniz.
13. Yulaflı Elma Tatlısının Püf Noktaları Nelerdir?Kullanacağınız meyvelerin taze ve olgun olmasına özen gösterin.
14.  Yeşil elma ekşi olduğundan, kırmızı veya sarı elma tercih edebilirsiniz.
15. Toz şeker yerine esmer şeker kullanarak tatlının lezzetini arttırabilirsiniz.
16. Yulaflı elma tatlısını, meyve sosları ve nane yaprakları ile servis ederek şık bir sunum hazırlayabilirsiniz.
17. 1 Porsiyon Yulaflı Elma Tatlısı Kaç Kaloridir?Standart malzemelerle hazırlanan yulaflı ekmek tatlısının bir porsiyonu, yaklaşık 130 kaloridir.
18.  Sunumda kullanacağınız malzemelere göre kalori değeri değişebilir.

name: Oatmeal Apricot Squares
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease an 8-inch square baking dish with cooking spray.
Combine flour, oats, brown sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl. Cut in butter until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Mix almond extract into the beaten egg and stir into the crumb mixture.
Press half of the crumb mixture into the prepared baking dish and spread apricot preserves over it. Top with the remaining crumbs, and gently press down. Sprinkle almonds evenly over the top.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 30 minutes.
Remove from oven, cool on a wire rack, and then cut into squares.

name: Oatmeal Baked Apples

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 350°. Toss ½ cup old-fashioned oats, ¼ cup dried tart cherries, 2 Tbsp. raw pecans, 2 Tbsp. raw shelled pumpkin seeds (pepitas), and 2 Tbsp. raw shelled sunflower seeds in a medium bowl to combine. Drizzle 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil and 2 Tbsp. plus 1½ tsp. pure maple syrup over, then sprinkle in ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt. Mix until all of the ingredients are coated. Set granola aside.

Arrange 4 medium red baking apples, cored, halved, cut side up, on a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet. Top each with some reserved granola (about 2 Tbsp. per apple half). Bake until granola is golden brown and apples are tender, 40–45 minutes.
While the apples are baking, whisk 1 cup sour cream and 1 Tbsp. pure maple syrup in a small bowl to combine.
To serve, carefully arrange each baked apple on a plate. Drizzle with more maple syrup and spoon a dollop of sour cream mixture on top of each.

name: Oatmeal Burgers
instructions: Καθαρίζουμε, πλένουμε και κόβουμε τις πατάτες σε μεγάλα κομμάτια.
Τοποθετούμε τις πατάτες σε ένα μεγάλο πυρέξ και προσθέτουμε αλάτι, πιπέρι, μουστάρδα, ελαιόλαδο και τον χυμό των λεμονιών.
Ανακατεύουμε καλά ώστε να καλυφθούν όλα τα κομμάτια ομοιόμορφα.
Περιχύνουμε τις πατάτες με τη μπύρα και προσθέτουμε τα φρέσκα μυρωδικά (θυμάρι και ρίγανη).
Ψήνουμε σε προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 200ºC για 1 ώρα και 15 λεπτά.

name: Oatmeal Cake Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağı toz şeker (isteğe göre esmer şeker veya hindistan cevizi şekeri)
1 su bardağı süt (badem sütü, yulaf sütü veya inek sütü)
1/2 su bardağı sıvı yağ (zeytinyağı veya hindistan cevizi yağı da olabilir)
Badem unu (daha nemli ve yoğun bir kek için)

instructions: 1. Derin bir kapta yumurta ve şekeri beyazlaşıp köpük köpük olana kadar mikserle çırpın.
2. Sıvı malzemeleri ekleyip tekrar karıştırın.
3. Yulaf unu, kabartma tozu, vanilin ve isteğe göre tarçını ekleyip spatula ile homojen kıvama gelene kadar karıştırın.
4. Ceviz, kuru meyve veya damla çikolata eklemek isterseniz bu aşamada ilave edin.
5. Karışımı yağlanmış kek kalıbına dökün.
6.  Önceden ısıtılmış 170°C fırında yaklaşık 35-40 dakika pişirin.
7. Fırından aldıktan sonra oda sıcaklığında soğumaya bırakın, ardından dilimleyerek servis edin.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Oatmeal Carrot Raisin Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Whisk peanut butter, coconut oil, agave nectar, brown sugar, eggs, and vanilla together in a bowl. Whisk flour, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, baking soda, and cloves together in a separate bowl; stir into peanut butter mixture until dough comes together. Fold oats, carrots, and raisins into dough. Spoon dough, 1 to 2 tablespoons per cookie, onto a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are lightly browned, about 15 minutes.

name: Oatmeal Chocolate Chip Lactation Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Stir water and flaxseed meal together in a small bowl. Let stand until thickened, about 5 minutes.
Beat butter and both sugars with an electric mixer in a large bowl until creamy. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Add flax mixture and vanilla; mix until well combined.

Stir flour, yeast, baking soda, and salt together in a bowl. Mix dry ingredients into the wet ingredients until well combined. Stir in oats, chocolate chips, and honey. Drop spoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are golden, 12 to 15 minutes.
Remove cookies from the oven and transfer to wire racks to cool.

name: Oatmeal Chocolate Coconut Chewy
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Cream together brown sugar, butter, and white sugar in a large bowl until smooth.
Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in milk and vanilla.
Combine flour, baking soda, and salt; stir into sugar mixture until well blended.
Stir in oats, chocolate chips, walnuts, and coconut until evenly distributed.
Drop by rounded spoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake in the preheated oven for 10 to 12 minutes for a chewy cookie or 14 minutes for a firmer cookie.
Cool for 1 minute on the cookie sheets and then remove to wire rack. Cool completely and then store in a tightly sealed container.

name: Oatmeal Cinnamon Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Beat butter and brown sugar together in a bowl using an electric mixer until smooth and creamy. Beat in eggs and vanilla extract until incorporated. Mix flour, baking soda, salt, and ground cinnamon into butter mixture until just mixed; fold in oats and cinnamon chips. Drop 1 to 2 tablespoons batter per cookie onto a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are lightly browned, 10 to 15 minutes.

name: Oatmeal Cinnamon Cookies Recipe
instructions: 1. Muzları ezerek püre haline getirin.
2. Diğer tüm malzemeleri ekleyin, karıştırın.
3. Yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine kaşıkla koyun.
4. 180°C fırında 15–17 dakika pişirin.
5.  Ilık ya da soğuk servis edin.

name: Oatmeal Cinnamon Cream Pies
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper.
Combine flour, baking soda, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon in a bowl.

Combine butter, brown sugar, white sugar, eggs, molasses, and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract in a separate bowl; beat with an electric mixer until creamy and smooth. Stir in flour mixture until dough comes together. Stir in oats.
Drop cookie dough onto the lined baking sheets, a few inches apart, using a 2-teaspoon cookie scoop.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are starting to brown, 7 to 10 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
Stir hot water and 1/4 teaspoon salt together in a small bowl until salt is dissolved. Let cool, about 5 minutes.

Combine marshmallow cream, shortening, confectioners' sugar, 3/4 teaspoon vanilla extract, and 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer on high speed until fluffy. Mix in cooled salt water.
Spread some of the filling on the back of 1 cooled cookie. Add another cookie to form a sandwich. Repeat with remaining filling and cookies.

name: Oatmeal Coffee Cake With Pecan Streusel
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease and flour a 9x12-inch baking dish.
To make the streusel: Mix together brown sugar, pecans, butter, and flour in a small bowl until well combined. Set aside.
To make the cake: Pour boiling water over oats in a medium bowl. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.

Beat brown sugar and butter together in a large bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Add eggs, one at a time, beating briefly after each addition. Scrape down the bowl and continue beating until mixture is smooth. Mix in soaked oats, vanilla, and cinnamon. Stir in flour mixture with a rubber scraper or wooden spoon. Pour batter into the prepared baking dish and cover with streusel.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 35 minutes.

name: Oatmeal Cookie
instructions: In a shot glass, layer butterscotch schnapps, Irish cream and Jagermeister.
Float cinnamon schnapps on top.

name: Oatmeal Cookie Apple Crisp
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Mix apples, white sugar, 1 tablespoon flour, cinnamon, and salt together in a bowl; spread into an 8-inch square baking dish.
Combine oats, 3/4 cup flour, brown sugar, baking soda, and baking powder together in a separate bowl; add butter and mix until crumbly. Crumble topping evenly over apple filling using your hands.
Bake in the preheated oven until topping is lightly browned, 30 to 40 minutes.

name: Oatmeal Cookies
instructions: 1. Yulaf, un, şeker ve doğranmış kuru kayısıyı bir kapta karıştırın.
2.  Fındıkları yanmaz tavada yağsız olarak kavurun.
3. Tereyağını tavada eritin.
4.  Yumurtayı kasede hafifçe çırpın.
5.  Yağı ve yumurtayı yulaflı karışıma ekleyin.
6.  Elinizle bütün malzemeler karışacak şekilde yoğurun.
7. Hamurdan büyük bir ceviz büyüklüğün de parçalar koparın.
8.  Avucunuzun içinde top yapın ve üzerine hafifçe bastırın.
9. Kurabiye hamurlarını yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine aralıklı olarak dizin.
10.  Önceden ısınmış 180 dereceye ayarlı fırında 20 dakika pişirin.
11.  Kurabiyeler soğuyunca hava almayan bir kapta saklayın.
12.  Şimdiden afiyet olsun.

name: Oatmeal Cookies With Walnut And Cinnamon, Very Healthy And Delicious
original_name: Galletas de avena con nuez y canela, muy sanas y ricas

ingredients.item: 1 cda de stevia o edulcorante de tu elección

instructions: En un recipiente agrega la harina, avena, stevia, polvo para hornear, canela y sal. Mezcla bien.
En otro recipiente agrega el huevo, la mantequilla derretida y la esencia de vainilla y mezcla.
Incorpora los ingredientes secos a los líquidos poco a poco y mezcla con un cucharón hasta obtener una masa.
Una vez este lista la masa, agrega las nueces picadas y amasa nuevamente hasta integrar muy bien el fruto seco.

Toma porciones pequeñas y forma bolitas, colócalas en una bandeja para hornear con papel de horno dejando espacio entre ellas. Presiona con tu mano para aplanar de manera uniforme hasta formar un disco.
Hornea a 182°C durante 10 a 15 minutos. Cuando estén listas estarán doradas por la parteinferior. Retíralas y déjalas enfriar antes de retirar de la bandeja para evitar que se rompan.

name: Oatmeal Cream Pies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350ºF (180ºC).
In a large bowl, mix the butter and brown sugar until well combined.
Add the molasses, vanilla, and eggs, and whisk thoroughly.
Sift in the flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon. Mix until just combined.
Add the oats and mix until incorporated. Be careful not to overmix the batter or it might result in tougher cookies.
Using an ice cream scoop (or about 2 tablespoons), scoop out cookies onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 3 inches (8 cm) between each one.
Bake for 7-9 minutes. The cookies will still be very soft, so be sure to let them cool thoroughly.
While cooling, make the filling by beating the butter, powdered sugar, cream, vanilla, and marshmallow fluff until well combined.
Once the cookies are cooled, put a spoonful of the filling on one cookie and sandwich with another. Repeat until all the sandwiches are made.
Enjoy!

name: Oatmeal Fudge Bars
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Combine 1 cup butter, brown sugar, white sugar, and eggs in a large bowl until smooth.
Combine oats, flour, and baking soda in a separate large bowl; slowly beat into butter mixture with an electric mixer until well combined.
Spread ¾ oat mixture into an ungreased 9x13-inch baking pan; press lightly to even out crust.

Combine chocolate chips, condensed milk, remaining ⅓ cup butter, and vanilla extract in a saucepan over medium-low heat; heat and stir until chocolate and butter are melted and smooth, about 2 minutes. Pour chocolate mixture over oatmeal crust, spreading evenly.
Drop tablespoons of remaining ¼ oatmeal mixture over chocolate; press down lightly to flatten and swirl oatmeal mixture into chocolate.
Bake in the preheated oven until top is light brown, 25 to 30 minutes (chocolate should still be moist). Cool completely on a wire rack, about 45 minutes. Cut into squares.

name: Oatmeal Fudge Squares
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees). Spray a rimmed cookie sheet with cooking spray.
Mix butter, eggs, and vanilla extract together in a large bowl with an electric mixer. Add oats, baking mix, and brown sugar; mix to combine.
Stir condensed milk, chocolate chips, margarine, vanilla, and salt in a saucepan over low heat until chocolate chips have melted, 6 to 8 minutes.
Spread 3/4 of the oat mixture onto the prepared baking sheet. Pour the chocolate mixture over the top. Place small pieces of the remaining oat mixture randomly over the chocolate.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are golden, 15 to 20 minutes. Let cool before cutting into squares.

name: Oatmeal Ice Cream Cookie Sandwiches
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Cook butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat, swirling often, until it foams, then browns, 5–8 minutes. Scrape brown butter and toasty solids into a heatproof measuring glass and let cool.

Process waffle cones, oats, flour, and salt in a food processor in long pulses until oats are broken up and cones are finely ground. Add brown sugar and pulse to combine. Whisk egg yolk, vanilla, and 2 Tbsp. water in a small bowl. With the motor running, slowly drizzle into food processor, then stream in brown butter; process until dough forms a ball around the blade.

Portion out slightly rounded tablespoonfuls of dough to make 26 balls (each should weigh about ¾ oz.). Roll balls between your palms to smooth and divide between 2 parchment-lined rimmed baking sheets, spacing 3" apart (the cookies will spread as they bake). Cover with another sheet of parchment paper and use the bottom of a glass to flatten each into a 2½" round.

Bake cookies, rotating sheets front to back and top to bottom halfway through, until golden all over and browned around the edges, 12–15 minutes. Let cool on baking sheets; use a thin metal spatula to loosen cookies from parchment. Turn half of cookies over (you’ll have 2 extra).

Remove 2 pints of ice cream (same flavor) from containers (just peel away container if it’s paper, or use a rubber spatula to help slide ice cream out intact if container is plastic). Cut ice cream into 2” pieces and place in a large bowl. Let sit until slightly softened, about 5 minutes, then stir with a wooden spoon or a large rubber spatula until the consistency of thick cake batter.

Using a 4-oz. ice cream scoop or ½-cup measuring cup, and working one at a time or in small batches, scoop out large domes of ice cream onto upside-down cookies. Top each with a right-side-up cookie, then press down gently until ice cream extends to the edges. Transfer sandwiches to a rimmed baking sheet set in the freezer as you work. Repeat softening process with remaining 2 pints of ice cream and assemble remaining sandwiches.
Freeze sandwiches until ice cream is hard, about 2 hours. Cover tray with plastic wrap and freeze at least another 8 hours to let cookies soften.
Do Ahead: Cookies can be baked 1 week ahead; transfer to a resealable plastic freezer bag and freeze. Sandwiches can be assembled 5 days ahead; keep frozen.

name: Oatmeal Ice Cream Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 tatlı kaşığı bal veya hurma püresi

instructions: 1. Dondurulmuş muzları, süt ve bal ile blenderdan geçirin.
2. Yulaf ekleyip tekrar karıştırın.
3. Kaplara paylaştırıp buzlukta 4 saat bekletin.
4. Servisten önce 5 dakika dışarıda bekletin, top şeklinde alın.

name: Oatmeal No-bake Study Buddies
instructions: Add the instant oatmeal, ground flaxseed, chia seeds, and honey to a medium bowl and mix until thoroughly combined.
Add your favorite mix-ins. To make the Peanut Butter “Monster”, add in the crushed pretzels, M&M’s, and peanut butter. Stir to combine.
To make the Chocolate Hazelnut, add in the chopped hazelnuts and hazelnut spread. Stir to combine.
To make the Almond Berry, add in the dried cranberries and almond butter. Stir to combine.
To make the Coconut Cookie add in the chopped cashews, coconut flakes, and cookie butter. Stir to combine.
Roll the mixture into tablespoon-sized balls.
Let sit at room temperature for 2-4 hours.
Store in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 1 week.
Enjoy!

name: Oatmeal Pan Toast Recipe

ingredients.item: 2–3 dilim hindi füme veya sucuk (isteğe bağlı)
Yulaf ezmesi yerine yulaf unu kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha tok bir yapı için yulafın yarısını tam buğday unu ile karıştırabilirsiniz.
Glutensiz beslenenler için sertifikalı glutensiz yulaf tercih edilebilir.
Yumurta kullanmak istemezseniz 1 yemek kaşığı chia tohumu + 3 yemek kaşığı su karışımını bağlayıcı olarak kullanabilirsiniz.
2 yemek kaşığı lor peyniri de kıvam ve protein desteği sağlar.
Yoğurt yerine kefir kullanarak daha yumuşak bir doku elde edebilirsiniz.
Daha hafif bir versiyon için 1–2 yemek kaşığı süt eklenebilir.
Kaşar peyniri yerine mozzarella veya cheddar kullanabilirsiniz.
Lor peyniri + maydanoz karışımı ile daha hafif bir iç hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Sucuk yerine hindi füme, tavuk füme ya da közlenmiş sebze tercih edebilirsiniz.
Vejetaryen bir alternatif için mantar, kapya biber ve ıspanak ekleyebilirsiniz.
Hamura bir tutam kekik, pul biber veya karabiber ekleyebilirsiniz.
üzerine susam veya çörek otu serperek daha çıtır bir yüzey elde edebilirsiniz.
İç harca az miktarda hardal veya pesto sos ekleyerek farklı bir aroma yakalayabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Yulaf ezmesini rondodan geçirerek un haline getirin (isteğe bağlı olarak direkt de kullanabilirsiniz).
2. Yulafı, yumurta, yoğurt, tuz ve kabartma tozu ile karıştırarak koyu bir hamur elde edin.
3. Yapışmaz tavayı hafifçe yağlayın ve hamurun yarısını tavaya yayıp kapağını kapatın.
4. Kısık ateşte altı kızarana kadar pişirin.
5. Üzerine kaşar peyniri ve diğer iç malzemeleri yerleştirin.
6. Kalan hamuru üzerine yayıp kapağı tekrar kapatın.
7. Altı kızarınca dikkatlice çevirin ve diğer tarafını da pişirin.
8. Kaşar eridiğinde ocaktan alın, dilimleyerek servis edin.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Oatmeal Pancakes Recipe

ingredients.item: ½ taza de avena en hojuelas
1 pizca de edulcorante (o azúcar si no te importa nada)

instructions: Bate el huevo y las tres claras en un bowl. Agrega la avena, la sal y el edulcorante y mezcla bien con una batidora eléctrica de mano.
La leche desnatada la vas a agregar a tu gusto, pero en muy poca cantidad para que la mezcla no te quede aguada. Si efectivamente te queda aguada, pon un poco más de avena.
En este paso puedes ponerle medio plátano cortado previamente en trozos pequeños. Le da un toque de sabor y textura increíbles.
Calienta una sartén antiadherente a fuego medio y ponle un chorro muy pequeño de aceite vegetal.
Con una cuchara de servir sopa coje un poco de la mezcla y échala de manera uniforme sobre la sartén.
Cocina hasta que empiecen a hacerse burbujas sobre la superficie de la tortita. Voltéala y cocina un par de minutos por el otro lado.
Repite este proceso con todas tus tortitas de avena hasta que se termine la mezcla.

name: Oatmeal Parfait
instructions: 1. Yulaf ezmesini kuru ısıda kavurun ve tereyağını ilave edip kavurmaya devam edin.
2.  Yulaflar iyice renk alınca pekmezi ilave edip çevirin ve soğuması için bir tepsiye yayın.
3.  Bir kasede yoğurt, labne peynir, vanilin ve 2-3 yemek kaşığı suyu yoğun bir kıvam elde edene kadar çırpın.
4.  Servis kasesine önce meyveleri, ardından yoğurtlu karışımı ve en üste de çıtır yulafları ekleyerek servis edin.

name: Oatmeal Peanut Butter Cookies
instructions: In a large bowl, cream together 1/2 cup butter or margarine, 1/2 cup peanut butter, white sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla. Add egg and beat well.
In another bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt. Add these dry ingredients to the creamed mixture. Stir. Add oatmeal and stir.
Drop by teaspoons onto greased baking sheet, and press each mound down with a fork to form 1/4 inch thick cookies. Bake at 177°C (175 degrees C) for 10 minutes, or until cookies are a light brown.

To Make Filling: Cream 3 tablespoons butter or margarine with the confectioners' sugar, 1/2 cup smooth peanut butter, and the cream. Spread filling onto half of the cooled cookies, then top with the other half to form sandwiches.

name: Oatmeal Pie

ingredients.item: Recipe pastry for a 9 inch single crust pie

instructions: Mix together eggs, corn syrup, brown sugar, coconut, oats, butter or margarine, and salt. Pour into the unbaked pie shell.
Bake at 163°C (165 degrees C) for 45 minutes, or until golden in color and knife inserted in center comes out clean.

name: Oatmeal Pilaf With Nuts And Dried Fruits
original_name: Πλιγούρι πιλάφι με ξηρούς καρπούς και αποξηραμένα φρούτα

ingredients.item: 2 κ.σ.μαυροδάφνη ή άλλο γλυκό κρασί ή άλλο γλυκό κρασί
2 κ.σ.μαυροδάφνη ή άλλο γλυκό κρασί ή άλλο γλυκό κρασί

instructions: Ξεπλένουμε πρώτα το πλιγούρι σε σουρωτήρι κάτω από τρεχούμενο νερό, το βάζουμε σε μπολ και το καλύπτουμε με βραστό νερό (2 δάχτυλα πάνω από την επιφάνειά του).
Ανακατεύουμε καλά με κουτάλι και σκεπάζουμε το μπολ.
Αφήνουμε να μουλιάσει για 20 λεπτά μέχρι να πιει όλο το νερό και να διπλασιαστεί σε όγκο.
Στο μεταξύ, σε τηγάνι λιώνουμε το βούτυρο σε χαμηλή φωτιά και σοτάρουμε τα ψιλοκομμένα καρότα για 7 με 8 λεπτά.
Προσθέτουμε τα φιστίκια, τα κουκουνάρια, την αμυγδαλόψιχα και σοτάρουμε για 3 με 4 λεπτά.
Τέλος προσθέτουμε τα βερίκοκα, τους χουρμάδες και το κρασί.
Αχνίζουμε για 2 με 3 λεπτά.
Μέσα στο τηγάνι προσθέτουμε το μουλιασμένο πλιγούρι, ρίχνουμε αλάτι, πιπέρι και ανακατεύουμε πολύ καλά με κουτάλι.
Πασπαλίζουμε με το μαϊντανό και καλύπτουμε με καθαρή πετσέτα.
Αποσύρουμε από τη φωτιά και αφήνουμε σκεπασμένο το πιλάφι για 10 λεπτά να αρωματιστεί.
Το σερβίρουμε σε πιατέλα κι αν θέλουμε γαρνίρουμε το κέντρο της πιατέλας με γιαούρτι.
Το πλιγούρι πιλάφι συνοδεύει τέλεια χοιρινό, κυνήγι και πουλερικά.

name: Oatmeal Pumpkin Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line baking sheets with parchment paper.

Combine all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, oats, wheat germ, baking soda, cinnamon, allspice, cloves, and salt together in a bowl. Beat butter, coconut sugar, and brown sugar together in a separate bowl using an electric mixer until light and fluffy; add pumpkin puree, egg, and vanilla extract and mix well.
Stir flour mixture into pumpkin mixture until dough is well mixed; fold in walnuts and raisins. Drop dough, about 1 tablespoon per cookie, on the the prepared baking sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until cookies are lightly browned on the edges, about 15 minutes. Cool cookies on baking sheets for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.

name: Oatmeal Raisin Biscuit
instructions: 1. Yemek tarifleri arasında kolay hazırlanan bir tarif.
2.  Fırını 170 dereceye ayarlayın.
3.  Tereyağını mikserle çırpıp krema haline getirin.
4.  Margarin, esmer şeker, toz şeker, vanilya ve yumurtaları ekleyip iyice çırpın.
5.  Un, karbonat, tarçın ve tuzu ayrı bir kapta harmanlayıp diğer karışıma ekleyin.
6.  Üzüm ve yulafı ilave edip yoğurun.
7.  Fırın tepsisine yağlı kağıt serin.
8.  Hamurdan tatlı kaşığı ile parçalar alıp aralıklarla tepsiye yerleştirin.
9.  10-12 dakika pişirip soğuyunca servis yapın.

name: Oatmeal Raisin Cookie Pancakes
instructions: Process oats in a food processor until finely ground. Mix oats, flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg together in a bowl.
Whisk buttermilk, milk, sugar, 1/4 cup vegetable oil, and egg in a separate bowl until smooth; mix into oat mixture until batter is well-mixed, about 30 strokes. Fold raisins and walnuts into batter.

Lightly oil a skillet or griddle and place over medium heat. Drop batter by large spoonfuls onto the griddle and cook until bubbles form and the edges are dry, 3 to 4 minutes. Flip and cook until browned on the other side, 2 to 4 minutes. Repeat with remaining batter.

name: Oatmeal Raisin Energy Balls
instructions: Place almond flour and dates in a food processor and pulse until sticky.
Add the raisins, almond butter, cinnamon, vanilla extract, and salt, and pulse until a sticky dough forms.  Add 1 tablespoon of water if batter seems too dry.
Transfer the mixture to a bowl and stir in the rolled oats.
Roll the mixture into tablespoon-sized balls and let sit at room temperature for 2-4 hours.
Store in an airtight container for up to 1 week.
Enjoy!

name: Oatmeal Raisin Energy Bites
instructions: Mix oats, almond butter and honey in a large bowl.
Add raisins, pecans, cinnamon, vanilla and salt. Mix.
Place bowl in the refrigerator for 30-60 minutes, or until the mixture has solidified.
Mold mixture into bite-sized balls.
Serve immediately.
Enjoy!

name: Oatmeal Raisin Molasses Bread
instructions: Place oats, molasses, butter, and salt into the bread maker bowl; add the boiling water.
Measure 1/4 teaspoon sugar into a small cup and set aside. Pour remaining sugar into the oat mixture and stir. Let mixture cool to about 38°C/38 degrees C, about 20 minutes.
Pour warm water into the reserved sugar in the small cup; add yeast.
Pour bread flour atop the oat mixture. Pour yeast mixture over the flour.

Select Dough setting and press start. Check your owner's manual to see how long the kneading lasts, so you can add raisins to the dough 5 minutes before it finishes kneading. Let the bread maker run the full dough cycle, about 1 hour, though it will depend on your machine.
Grease 2 bread pans.

Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface. Punch down dough, but do not knead. Separate into two loaves and place in prepared pans; cover each with a damp towel and allow to rise for about 1 hour.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake in preheated oven until the top is golden brown and the bottom of loaf sounds hollow when tapped, 15 to 20 minutes.

name: Oatmeal Salad With Cranberries, Fruits And Nuts
original_name: Πλιγούρι σαλάτα με κράνμπερι, φρούτα και ξηρούς καρπούς
instructions: Ξεκινάμε να φτιάξουμε το πλιγούρι σαλάτα, βάζοντάς το σε ένα μπολ και καλύπτοντάς το με βραστό νερό (ίσα να το σκεπάσει).
Βάζουμε καπάκι και το αφήνουμε στην άκρη να φουσκώσει για 15 λεπτά, για να μαλακώσει και είναι τέλεια η πλιγούρι σαλάτα.
Το αφρατεύουμε ανακατεύοντάς το με πιρούνι.
Βάζουμε σε ένα άλλο μπολ το μαϊντανό, το δυόσμο, τον κόλιανδρο, το κράνμπερι, το ρόδι, το φιστίκι, το χυμό, το λάδι, και το πλιγούρι.
Αλατίζουμε και ανακατεύουμε καλά. Ελέγχουμε την οξύτητα και το αλάτι.
Μπορούμε αν θέλουμε να προσθέσουμε και χυμό λεμόνι.

name: Oatmeal Scotchies Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).

In a mixing bowl, beat butter, brown sugar, white sugar, egg, and vanilla extract until well combined. Beat in flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and rolled oats until thoroughly mixed. Stir in butterscotch chips and coconut. Drop dough by tablespoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto the baking sheets.
Bake cookies in the preheated oven until bottoms are light brown, 7 to 8 minutes. If you prefer crunchier cookies, bake 9 to 10 minutes.

name: Oatmeal Stick Cookies
instructions: 1. Suyu geniş bir tavaya koyup yüksek ısıda kaynatın.
2.  Ocağı kısarak tuzu ekleyin ve yulaf ezmesini tahta bir kaşıkla yavaş yavaş içine dökün.
3.  Karıştırarak Tavayı ateşten alın.
4.  Kaşar peyniri, tereyağ karabiber ve tuzu ekleyin.
5.  Tereyağı tamamen eriyene ve suyunu hafif çekene kadar karıştırarak 3-5 dakika pişirin.
6.  Karışımı, mermer bir tabaka ya da bir fırın tepsisi gibi pürüzsüz bir yüzeye dökün.
7.  Yulaf ezmesini bir palet bıçağı kullanarak, 2 cm kalınlığında yayın ve dikdörtgen biçiminde şekillendirin.
8.  Soğuyana kadar bekletin.
9.  Yulaf tabakalarını keskin bir bıçakla önce ikiye sonra eşit şeritler halinde kesin.
10.  Fırın tepsilerini zeytinyağıyla yağlayın.
11.  Yulaf şeritlerini koyu altın sarısı olana kadar önceden 200 derecede ısıtılmış fırında 40-50 dakika pişirin.
12.  Sıcak servis yapın.

name: Oatmeal With Cacao Nibs And Figs
instructions: Combine cooked oats and ¼ cup water in a medium saucepan over medium-low heat. Stir in cacao nibs and chopped figs and continue to cook, stirring occasionally, until oats are warmed through, about 3 minutes. Thin to desired consistency with almond milk, and serve topped with sliced figs.

name: Oatmeal With Honey, Creamy Drink
instructions: Alista todos los ingredientes.
Coloca en un plato uno de los plátanos.
Con la ayuda de un tenedor tritura el plátano hasta conseguir un puré. No necesitas que quedé perfecto, con textura es más delicioso.
En los cuatro vasos comienza a coloca media cucharada de linaza molida en cada uno de ellos.
Seguidamente añade media taza de hojuelas de avena, una cucharada de crema de almendras, una cucharada de puré de plátano y y 3/4 tazas de leche.

Con la ayuda de una cucharilla, mezcla todo hasta que quede bien integrado y refrigera por, no menos de 8 horas para conseguir que la avena se hidrate y pueda quedar una bebida cremosa como esperamos.
Pasado este tiempo decora cada vaso con rebanadas del plátano restante, y miel.

name: Oatmeal, Apple And Cinnamon Cookies
original_name: Bolachas de aveia, maçã e canela

ingredients.item: Flocos de aveia finos para polvilhar
Açúcar demerara ou moreno para polvilhar

instructions: Leve ao lume um tacho com água abundante e sal. Quando começar a ferver, adicione o arroz, mexa e deixe cozer bem. Retire do lume e escorra num coador. Lave as maçãs, retire-lhes os caroços e corte-as em pedaços. Forre um tabuleiro (42x 32 cm) com papel vegetal.

Num copo liquidificador ou num robot, deite o arroz cozido, as maçãs, as tâmaras, a aveia, a canela, o azeite e a água. Triture bem, retire o preparado para uma tigela e deixe descansar durante 30 minutos, no frigorífico.

Espalhe alguns flocos de aveia num prato fundo e deite por cima algumas colheradas de massa. Molde bolas e espalme um pouco. Distribua as bolachas pelo tabuleiro e polvilhe com um pouco de açúcar demerara.
Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, durante cerca de 20 a 30 minutos. Retire as bolachas do forno e deixe arrefecer. Retire do tabuleiro e sirva.

name: Oatmeal, Fig, And Walnut Bars

ingredients.item: (2 sticks) chilled vegan 'butter' (such as earth balance) or margarine

instructions: Combine first 4 ingredients in heavy medium saucepan. Bring to simmer over medium heat, stirring until sugar dissolves. Reduce heat to low. Cover and simmer 5 minutes. Uncover and simmer until figs are very soft and filling is thick, stirring often, about 10 minutes. Mix in lemon juice and vanilla, then walnuts. Cool completely. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before using.

Position rack in top third of oven and preheat to 177°C. Spray 13x9x2-inch metal baking pan with nonstick spray. Combine oats and next 5 ingredients in large bowl and whisk to blend. Add cubed 'butter.' Using fingertips, blend until mixture forms small moist clumps.
Firmly press half of crust mixture (about 3 cups) over bottom of prepared pan. Spread filling evenly over crust. Sprinkle remaining crust mixture over filling; press to adhere.

Bake bars until deep brown and firm to touch, about 35 minutes. Cool in pan on rack. Cut crosswise into 6 strips. Make 8 lengthwise cuts, forming 2x1-inch bars. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover pan with foil; store at room temperature.

Place powdered sugar in medium bowl. Using narrow spatula, remove as many bars as desired from pan. Roll half of bars in powdered sugar to coat. Arrange coated bars and plain bars alternately on platter.
For longer storage, cover pan and chill. Bars will keep one week, but crust will soften.

name: Oatmeal-banana Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a muffin tin with paper liners.
Mash bananas in a bowl. Mix in applesauce, egg, sugar, and vanilla extract.

Mix einkorn flour, oats, blueberries, coconut, cinnamon, baking powder, salt, and baking soda together in another bowl. Add to banana mixture and stir until just combined. Spoon batter into the muffin cups.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 20 to 25 minutes.

name: Oatmeal-crusted Brownies
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish.

Mix oats, 3/4 cup flour, brown sugar, baking soda, and 1/4 teaspoon salt together in a bowl. Stir 3/4 cup melted butter into oat mixture until evenly coated. Measure 3/4 cup oat mixture and reserve for later. Press remaining oat mixture into the prepared baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Combine white sugar, 1 cup melted butter, and vanilla extract in a bowl. Beat eggs, 1 at a time, into sugar mixture, mixing well after each addition, until thoroughly blended.

Sift 1 1/2 cups flour, cocoa powder, and 1 teaspoon salt together in a bowl; stir into sugar-egg mixture just until batter is blended. Fold chocolate chips into batter; pour over oat crust. Sprinkle reserved oat mixture over batter.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center of the brownies comes out clean, 35 to 40 minutes.

name: Oaxaca Old Fashioned Cocktail

ingredients.prep: Del Maguey San Luis del Rio preferred

instructions: Mix the tequila, mezcal, agave nectar, and bitters in a mixing glass with ice.
Strain over a fresh rock in an Old Fashioned glass.
Flame an orange peel over the top of the drink, and rest the twist in the glass as a garnish.

name: Oaxacan Tamales Recipe

ingredients.item: 500 gr de carne de cerdo o pollo deshebrado

instructions: Bate la manteca hasta que esté esponjosa.
Una vez lista, incorpora la masa de maíz poco a poco, alternando con el caldo de pollo, el polvo para hornear y la sal. La masa debe quedar suave y ligera.
Cocina la carne de cerdo o pollo hasta que esté tierna, deshebra y reservar.
Calienta el mole oaxaqueño y agrega la carne deshebrada, mezclando bien hasta que esté bien integrada.
Corta las hojas de plátano en rectángulos de aproximadamente 30 cm por 20 cm.
Coloca una porción de masa en el centro de cada hoja y aplanar ligeramente. Añade una cucharada de relleno de mole con carne en el centro de la masa.
Dobla los lados de la hoja de plátano hacia el centro y luego dobla los extremos hacia abajo, formando un paquete bien envuelto.
Coloca los tamales en una vaporera, con la parte doblada hacia abajo.
Cocina al vapor durante aproximadamente 1 hora y 30 minutos, o hasta que la masa esté firme y se desprenda fácilmente de la hoja de plátano.

name: Obatzda, The Bavarian Cream Cheese Spread
original_name: Obatzda, la crema de queso bávara para untar

ingredients.item: 200 g de queso camembert o queso brie
2 cucharadas de mantequilla sin sal, a temperatura ambiente

instructions: En un tazón grande, coloca el queso Camembert o Brie y el queso crema. Asegúrate de que estén a temperatura ambiente para facilitar su mezcla.
Con un tenedor, aplasta los quesos hasta obtener una mezcla suave y homogénea.
Agrega la cebolla picada y la mantequilla a temperatura ambiente. Continúa mezclando hasta que todos los ingredientes estén bien combinados.
Incorpora el pimentón dulce y el comino molido a la mezcla. Mezcla nuevamente para distribuir los sabores de manera uniforme.
Prueba la mezcla y sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto. Ajusta los condimentos según tus preferencias personales.
Transfiere el Obatzda a un recipiente adecuado para servir y decora con cebollino picado si lo deseas.
Cubre el recipiente con papel film y refrigera durante al menos 1 hora para que los sabores se mezclen y se enfríe adecuadamente.
category: Recetas de Aperitivos, Tapas y Pinchos

name: Obe Ata Stew With Chicken And Spinach

ingredients.prep: thigh and drumstick; about 3 lb. total
seeds and ribs removed, coarsely chopped
sliced into  0.5" rounds (or 2 medium Yukon Gold potatoes, cut into 1" pieces)

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Season chicken with salt and cook (skin side down), undisturbed, until skin is browned and crisp, 8–10 minutes. Turn and cook just until lightly browned, about 3 minutes longer. Using tongs, transfer chicken to a plate (it will not be cooked through).

Cook bell peppers and onion in same pot, stirring often, until onion is golden brown and vegetables are softened, 6–8 minutes. Add tomatoes, chiles, and pepper and cook, stirring often, until tomatoes are broken down and softened, about 6 minutes longer. Transfer to a blender (reserve pot) and pour in broth. Purée until very smooth.

Return purée to pot along with chicken and potatoes. Bring to a simmer over medium-high heat, partially cover pot, and reduce heat to maintain a simmer. Cook until chicken and potatoes are very tender, 45–50 minutes. Season with salt to taste and stir in spinach. Cook, stirring, until spinach is wilted, about 1 minute.
Divide stew among bowls. Spoon rice into soup alongside chicken and chives.

name: Obituary Cocktail
instructions: Combine all the ingredients except the lemon twist in a mixing glass filled with ice and stir until chilled, about 30 seconds. Strain into a chilled coupe. Express a lemon twist over the drink and drop into the glass.

name: Ochazuke (japanese Green Tea Over Rice)

ingredients.item: Hulled white or black sesame seeds
. surigoma or a combination of nori and toasted sesame seeds
. grated fresh wasabi or wasabi paste

instructions: Heat a medium dry skillet over medium-low heat. Add the sesame seeds, stirring constantly until the seeds become fragrant and lightly colored (but not browned), about 5 minutes. Black sesame seeds will not turn color but will become fragrant. When a few seeds pop, that is the sign to monitor carefully and start taking them off the heat. Transfer the hot toasted seeds into a mortar and crush the seeds with the pestle until your desired coarseness or smoothness is achieved (or grind them in a food processor). Leave some seeds whole for good texture. Cool completely and store in an airtight container in a cool, dark place or in the refrigerator, where the seeds will keep for up to 1 month.

Preheat the broiler. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and brush it with the oil. Season the salmon with salt and pepper. Place the salmon on the baking sheet and broil for about 6 to 10 minutes, to desired doneness. If using smoked salmon, it will cook in half the time. Let cool and flake the meat.

Divide the rice among individual rice bowls and spoon the flaked salmon on top. At the table, pour about 1 cup (240 ml) of the hot tea over each and garnish with the surigoma or nori and sesame seeds, and scallions. Serve topped with the wasabi, if desired.

name: Ochazuke (japanese Steeped Rice)

ingredients.item: White soy sauce or 3 tablespoons regular soy sauce

ingredients.prep: such as hojicha, genmaicha, or unro
dark-green parts only, very thinly sliced crosswise
furikake seasoning or toasted sesame seeds, and shredded toasted nori (for serving)

instructions: Scoop ½ cup rice onto a clean surface. Dampen your hands in a small bowl of salted water (this will prevent the rice from sticking to them and season them slightly). Firmly compress rice into a tight ball, then press down on surface to gently flatten to a 2½–3" round. Repeat with remaining rice to form 4 rice cakes.

Heat oil in a large skillet, preferably nonstick, over medium-high. Brush one side of rice cakes with soy sauce. Cook, soy sauce side down, until edges are golden brown and crisp, 5–6 minutes. Brush tops of rice cakes with soy sauce. Turn and cook remaining side until golden brown and crisp, another 5–6 minutes. Remove from heat.

Meanwhile, pour water into a large saucepan to a depth of 2". Bring to a boil, then reduce heat so water is at a gentle simmer. Crack an egg into a small bowl, then gently slide egg into simmering water. Repeat with remaining eggs, waiting until whites of eggs in water are opaque before adding the next (about 30 seconds apart). Poach, shaping with a slotted spoon if needed, until whites are set but yolks are still runny, about 3 minutes. Using slotted spoon, transfer eggs to paper towels as they are done.
Add spinach to saucepan and cook until just wilted, 20–30 seconds. Drain; let cool slightly, then squeeze out excess water with your hands.

Heat 3 cups water in a small saucepan over high until right when water starts to steam (an instant-read thermometer will register 172°). Add tea and let steep 2 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a small bowl; discard solids. Stir in remaining ¼ cup soy sauce.

Divide rice cakes, spinach, and eggs among bowls. Pour tea mixture over, then top with scallions, pickled ginger, furikake, and nori. Finely grate mushroom over with a microplane just before serving, if using.

name: Ocopa, Step By Step

ingredients.item: 150 gr de queso fresco o serrano

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta, calentando un sartén con aceite de oliva.
Corta la cebolla, los ajíes amarillos y el mirasol en julianas o tiras delgadas. Trocea el ajo y el huacatay.
Cuando el aceite esté calienta, vamos a sofreír el ajo, luego la cebolla. Posteriormente, los ajíes y por último vas a agregar el huacatay. Sofríe por 5 minutos. Apaga y deja reposar.
En un licuadora o procesadora, añade la leche evaporada. Luego, le añadirás las verduras sofritas, y sal al gusto.
Luego, vamos a añadir el queso picado en trozos y la galletas que le darán textura. Licúa hasta que tengas una salsa homogénea y bien procesada.
Corta las papas a la mitad, y le esparcirás la salsa Ocopa por toda la superficie.
Ahora, estará lista para comer. ¡Degústalo!

name: Octopus Confit
instructions: Για το χταπόδι κονφί θα χρησιμοποιήσουμε όσο πιο μικρό σκεύος έχουμε, ώστε τα λίγα υγρά να είναι συγκεντρωμένα γύρω από τα πλοκάμια χταποδιού. Με το αργό ψήσιμο το χταπόδι κονφί θα μελώσει στο λάδι.

Τα βάζουμε στο σκεύος και προσθέτουμε όλα τα υπόλοιπα υλικά. Σκόρδο με το ντύμα του, κόκκους πιπεριού, καυτερή πιπεριά (προαιρετικά) δαφνόφυλλο, μαραθόριζα σε φέτες, ντοματίνια, ρίγανη ή και λίγο θυμάρι.
Περιχύνουμε με το ξύδι και το ελαιόλαδο μέχρι να σκεπαστεί το χταπόδι.
Καλύπτουμε με αντικολλητικό χαρτί και σφραγίζουμε το σκεύος με αλουμινόχαρτο ή με καπάκι ώστε να κρατήσουμε μέσα όλα τα υγρά.
Ψήνουμε σε αντιστάσεις στους 170ºC στην κάτω σχάρα για 45´ μέχρι να μαλακώσει το χταπόδι, αλλά προσοχή να μην λιώσει.
Το αφήνουμε σκεπασμένο μέσα στα ζουμάκια του να κρυώσει.
Ωστόσο ετοιμάζουμε την φάβα.

name: Octopus Cooked In Red Wine

ingredients.item: Batatas e espinafres cozidos para acompanhar

instructions: Descasque os alhos e corte-os em rodelas. Descasque a cebola e corte-a em tiras.

Coloque a cebola e o alho num tacho grande, adicione o azeite, o louro, sal, pimenta, o vinho, o polvo e o tomilho, leve ao lume e deixe cozer, por cerca de 1 hora, com o tacho tapado e em lume baixo. Verifique se o polvo está cozido, retifique os temperos e retire do lume.
Transfira o polvo para um prato e corte-o em pedaços grandes. Junte batatas e espinafres cozidos e regue tudo com o molho da cozedura. Sirva de seguida.

name: Octopus Dried On Coals
instructions: Ο πιο ωραίος νησιωτικός μεζές είναι το χταπόδι λιαστό στα κάρβουνα ή χταπόδι λιόκαφτο όπως το λέμε στα νησιά, που ψήνεται και μοσχοβολάει όλος ο τόπος. Δεν είναι απαραίτητο να είναι μεγάλο το χταπόδι, αλλά είναι απαραίτητο να έχει λιαστεί. Αν θέλεις να φάς χταπόδι στα κάρβουνα, όπως αυτό που σερβίρουμε στα νησιά, το χταπόδι πρέπει να το στεγνώσεις με την παρακάτω διαδικασία:

Απλώνουμε το χταπόδι πάνω σε σχοινί και το αφήνουμε να στεγνώσει στον καυτό ήλιο. Απαραίτητα ραντίζουμε το χταπόδι με λίγο ξύδι και το προφυλάσσουμε από τα έντομα με ένα τουλπάνι.  Το σκεπάζουμε με το τουλπάνι και το αφήνουμε να στεγνώσει.
Ανάλογα με το μέγεθος και το πόσο καυτός είναι ο ήλιος θα χρειαστεί 3-5 ώρες. Λιαστό χταπόδι στα κάρβουνα με κρουστή υφή, είναι χαρακτηριστικός μεζές στα νησιά μας και αποτελεί μεγάλη απόλαυση.
Τους χειμερινούς μήνες, που δεν έχει μεγάλη ηλιοφάνεια, το αφήνουμε στον αέρα, να στεγνώσει από τον αέρα.
Αλλά πώς ψήνεται το λιαστό χταπόδι: Χρειάζεστε θράκα με μέτρια φωτιά στα κάρβουνα και μία σχάρα πολύ καθαρή και καυτή.
Το λάδωμα είναι περιττό και δε χρειάζεται να λαδώσετε ούτε τη σχάρα ούτε το χταπόδι. Μόνο που πρέπει να είναι πολύ καθαρή η σχάρα και στεγνό σωστά το λιαστό χταπόδι.
Χωρίζουμε τα πλοκάμια τραβώντας τα, και τα ακουμπάμε στη σχάρα.
Θέλουν περίπου 5′ με 8′ από κάθε πλευρά, ανάλογα με το μέγεθος και το πάχος των πλοκαμιών.
Όταν σταματήσουν να βγαίνουν φυσαλίδες από το πλοκάμια πάνω στη σχάρα που ψήνεται, τότε το χταπόδι στα κάρβουνα είναι έτοιμο και σωστά ψημένο.
Μετά το ψήσιμο, κόβετε με ένα μαχαίρι το χταπόδι σε διαγώνιες φέτες και στύβετε λίγο λεμόνι. Δε χρειάζεται μυρωδικά. Απολαύστε το σκέτο ή με λίγες σταγόνες λεμόνι.
Δεν βάζουμε ποτέ λάδι σε ένα λιαστό χταπόδι ψημένο στα κάρβουνα. Είναι περιττό.
Απολαύστε το ζεστό όσο ακόμα έχει τους χυμούς του σε κάθε κομμάτι. Εμείς στο νησί το συνοδεύουμε πάντα με Σούμα Πάρου.

name: Octopus Feijoada In 30 Minutes

ingredients.item: 1 lata pequena  tomate pelado em cubos ((390 g))

instructions: Descasque as cebolas e os alhos, corte-os em meias-luas e aloure-os num tacho com o azeite. Junte o pimento, limpo e cortado em pedaços pequenos, e o polvo, cortado em pedaços igualmente pequenos. Adicione os cubos de tomate e envolva.

Junte o feijão escorrido e deixe cozinhar, em lume brando, por cerca de 15 minutos (se necessário, adicione um pouco de água). No final, tempere com sal e pimenta, polvilhe com a salsa picada e sirva.

name: Octopus Fillets With Oven-baked Rice
original_name: Filetes de polvo com arroz de forno
instructions: Coloque o polvo num tacho, cubra com água, leve ao lume e deixe cozer durante 40 minutos. Retire o polvo do tacho, deixe arrefecer e depois corte-o em pedaços, sendo que as partes mais grossas devem ser cortadas ao meio para ficarem um género de filetes. Tempere com o sumo de limão e uma pitada de sal e pimenta e reserve.
Passe a água do polvo por um passador, deite-o num tacho e leve a lume brando, deixando ferver.

Num tacho à parte, aloure a cebola e os alhos picados no azeite, juntamente com a folha de louro. Adicione 200 ml da água do polvo, tape e deixe cozinhar durante 10 minutos. Junte depois o arroz e as partes mais finas do polvo, bem como mais 1,3 l da água do polvo. Tempere com sal, tape e deixe cozinhar durante 5 minutos. De seguida, leve o tacho tapado ao forno, pré-aquecido a 200ºc, durante 20 minutos.

Escorra os filetes de polvo, passe-os por farinha, depois pelos ovos batidos e, por fim, por pão ralado. Leve-os a fritar em óleo quente, até ficarem douradinhos de ambos os lados. Retire, deixe escorrer sobre papel absorvente e sirva com o arroz.

name: Octopus Grilled In Aluminum Foil
instructions: Για να φτιάξουμε το χταπόδι ψητό στο αλουμινόχαρτο, καθαρίζουμε πρώτα το χταπόδι και το βάζουμε ολόκληρο μέσα σε ένα μπολ.
Προσθέτουμε το ελαιόλαδο, το μπαλσάμικο (ή απλό ξύδι από κρασί), το δαφνόφυλλο, το σκόρδο και τη ρίγανη κι ανακατεύουμε καλά όλα τα υλικά μαζί.
Απλώνουμε σταυρωτά στον πάγκο δύο μεγάλα κομμάτια αλουμινόχαρτο και ακουμπάμε επάνω ένα κομμάτι αντικολλητικό χαρτί ψησίματος.
Τοποθετούμε το χταπόδι στη μέση και το περιχύνουμε με το μείγμα.
Πιάνουμε σταυρωτά το αντικολλητικό χαρτί και κλείνουμε με το αλουμινόχαρτο σε πακέτο – όχι σφιχτό γιατί φουσκώνει με το ψήσιμο.
Ψήνουμε το χταπόδι για περίπου 1 ώρα και 15 λεπτά έως 1 ώρα  και 30 λεπτά στους 180ºC και το σερβίρουμε.

name: Octopus Honeyed With Crushed Potatoes In The Oven
original_name: Χταπόδι μελωμένο με τσακιστές πατάτες στο φούρνο
instructions: Καθαρίζουμε και πλένουμε το χταπόδι . Το στραγγίζουμε σε σουρωτήρι.
Σε μια μικρή κατσαρόλα βάζουμε όλα τα υλικά ολόκληρα: τα καθαρισμένα κρεμμύδια, το φινόκιο κομμένο σε τέταρτα, τις σκελίδες σκόρδου, τα ντοματίνια, τα κλωνάρια μαϊντανού, την ρίγανη και το θυμάρι.
Προσθέτουμε τα δαφνόφυλλα και τους κόκκους πιπέρι.
Από πάνω βάζουμε το χταπόδι.
Περιχύνουμε με το ελαιόλαδο και το ξύδι.
Σκεπάζουμε την κατσαρόλα με καπάκι που να σφραγίζει καλά.
Αφήνουμε σε χαμηλή προς μέτρια φωτιά το χταπόδι στην κατσαρόλα, για περίπου 50’ να μαλακώσει. Ελέγχουμε με ένα μαχαίρι να δούμε αν έχει βράσει στα υγρά του και είναι τρυφερό.
Στην μέση του βρασμού η κατσαρόλα θα έχει πολλά υγρά από το χταπόδι αλλά σιγά σιγά θα συμπυκνωθούν και στο τέλος θα μοιάζουν με αραιό ζελέ.
Βάζουμε τις τσακιστές πατάτες σε ταψί που να τις χωράει σε μια στρώση.
Προσθέτουμε 2-3 κ.σ ελαιόλαδο, αλάτι και φρεσκοτριμμένο πιπέρι.
Βάζουμε 2 σκελίδες σκόρδο ανάμεσα. Προσθέτουμε θυμάρι ή ρίγανη.
Ακουμπάμε το μαγειρεμένο χταπόδι πάνω στις τσακιστές πατάτες.
Βάζουμε τα γλασαρισμένα λαχανικά της κατσαρόλας ανάμεσα στις πατάτες.
Περιχύνουμε με τα λίγα υγρά του χταποδιού που έμειναν στην κατσαρόλα.
Αν θέλουμε προσθέτουμε λίγη καυτερή πιπεριά, ταιριάζει πολύ.
Ψήνουμε το χταπόδι με τις τσακιστές πατάτες σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 200°C στον αέρα για 20-25’, μέχρι οι πατάτες να ρουφήξουν όλα τα υγρά του ταψιού και να μείνουν μόνο με το λάδι τους.
Προαιρετικά, πασπαλίζουμε με λίγο μαϊντανό στο σερβίρισμα.
Σερβίρουμε το χταπόδι με τις πατάτες ζεστό.

name: Octopus In The Oven With Vegetables
instructions: Καθαρίζουμε πρώτα το χταπόδι. Αφαιρούμε το στόμα του, μπήγοντας τον δείκτη μας και τραβώντας. Γυρίζουμε την κουκούλα του, τα μέσα έξω, αφαιρούμε ότι έχει μέσα (κρατώντας μόνο τον ολό, δηλαδή το αυγό). Πλένουμε πολύ καλά και κόβουμε το χταπόδι σε μεγάλα κομμάτια (αφήνουμε τα πλοκάμια ολόκληρα αν είναι μικρό ή το κόβουμε σε μπουκιές αν είναι μεγάλο). Να θυμάστε όμως ότι σε ό,τι μέγεθος το κόψετε, μετά το μαγείρεμα θα έχει μικρύνει ο όγκος του κατά το 1/3.
Καθαρίζουμε τις πατάτες, τις κόβουμε σε φέτες πάχους από 0,5 εκ. έως 1 εκ. Τις κάνουμε μία στρώση σε βαθύ ταψί για το χταπόδι στο φούρνο.
Καθαρίζουμε τα κρεμμύδια και τα κόβουμε σε δαχτυλίδια-ροδέλες και τα κάνουμε στρώση πάνω στις πατάτες.
Κόβουμε τις ντομάτες σε φέτες και τις κάνουμε στρώση.
Αραδιάζουμε τα πλοκάμια του χταποδιού επάνω. Προσθέτουμε τα μυρωδικά, δάφνη, θυμάρι, μαϊντανό και το σκόρδο.
Αλατοπιπερώνουμε (με προσοχή γιατί το χταπόδι αν είναι φρέσκο είναι συνήθως πολύ αλμυρό).
Περιχύνουμε με το ελαιόλαδο.
Σκεπάζουμε με αλουμινόχαρτο και κλείνουμε γύρω γύρω καλά το ταψί να σφραγίσει, ώστε να κρατήσει όλη τη γεύση.
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο για 1 ώρα και 30 λεπτά στους 170 βαθμούς C. Δεν προσθέτουμε υγρά γιατί το χταπόδι και τα λαχανικά θα βγάλουν πολλά.

name: Octopus In The Shell With Spinach And Lentil Pasta
original_name: Χταπόδι στη γάστρα με ζυμαρικά σπανάκι και φακές
instructions: Βράζουμε πρώτα τις φακές σε μπόλικο νερό για περίπου 20′ να είναι μισοβρασμένες. Τις στραγγίζουμε καλά.
Ρίχνουμε σε μια στρώση τις μισοβρασμένες φακές στη γάστρα.
Κάνουμε μια στρώση το σπανάκι χοντροκομμένο.
Ζεσταίνουμε το μισό ελαιόλαδο και σε μέτρια φωτιά αφήνουμε τα κρεμμύδια να μαλακώσουν ελαφρά για 10′.
Προσθέτουμε τα σκόρδα σπασμένα, τις πιπεριές, το καρότο και ανακατεύουμε.
Προσθέτουμε το χταπόδι δυναμώνουμε τη φωτιά και αφήνουμε για λίγα λεπτά να κατεβάσει τα υγρά του, μέχρι να αλλάξει χρώμα.
Σβήνουμε με το μπαλσάμικο.
Ανακατεύουμε καλά να εξατμιστεί τελείως το ξίδι.
Προσθέτουμε την έτοιμη σάλτσα ντομάτας κι αφήνουμε να βράσει για 10′.
Κάνουμε μια στρώση την σάλτσα χταπόδι επάνω στα υπόλοιπα υλικά στη γάστρα και ανακατεύουμε καλά.
Σκεπάζουμε τη γάστρα και ψήνουμε για 30′.
Προσθέτουμε τα ζυμαρικά, ανακατεύουμε καλά σκεπάζουμε και συνεχίζουμε το ψήσιμο για 20′ με σκεπασμένη τη γάστρα.
Όταν θα βάλουμε τα ζυμαρικά στη γάστρα θα πρέπει να υπάρχει αρκετό ζουμάκι από όλα τα υλικά ώστε να σκεπάζεται το ζυμαρικό. Αν χρειάζεται, προσθέτουμε λίγο ζεστό νερό ώστε να βράσουν σωστά.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι πάντα στο τέλος γιατί το χταπόδι είναι αρκετά κι όσο ψήνεται βγάζει την νοστιμιά του στο φαγητό.
Πασπαλίζουμε με πολύ ψιλοκομμένο μαϊντανό και σερβίρουμε.

name: Octopus Lasagna
instructions: Coza o polvo em água, com a cebola inteira descascada e a folha de louro, durante cerca de 40 minutos ou até ficar tenro. Retire-o, reservando a água da cozedura, e corte-o em pedacinhos.

Reduza a cebola a puré e refogue-a numa frigideira com azeite. Adicione o tomate, tempere com sal e pimenta e deixe apurar ligeiramente. Junte o polvo e a salsa picada, cozinhe por mais 5 minutos e reserve.

Unte um tabuleiro com azeite. Demolhe ligeiramente cada placa de lasanha na água de cozer o polvo e forre o tabuleiro com uma primeira camada. Disponha metade do preparado de polvo e cubra com molho bechamel, queijo da ilha e queijo mozarela.
Repita mais uma vez o processo anterior, cobrindo a última camada de massa com molho bechamel e os queijos. Regue com um fio de azeite e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 190ºC, durante 20 minutos.

name: Octopus Meatballs
