Toss arugula with olive oil, lemon juice, 1 pinch salt, and 1 pinch black pepper in a bowl until coated; place ¼ onto mayonnaise sides each bread slice.

Coat a skillet with cooking spray over medium-high heat; crack eggs into skillet, one at a time. Cook on one side until whites are firm and yolks are slightly runny, 2 to 3 minutes; season with salt and black pepper. Gently place 1 egg on each open-faced sandwich.

name: Open Mouth Dumplings
instructions: 1. Unu, hamur yoğurma kabına eleyip ortası nı havuz gibi açın.
2.  Yumurta sarıları, tuz ve azar azar su ilave ederek orta sertlikte bir hamur elde edinceye kadar yoğurun.
3.  Hamura top şekli verip üzerini bir bezle örtün ve 15 dakika dinlendirin.
4.  İç malzeme için soğanı temizleyip ince ince kıyın.
5.  Kıyma, tuz ve karabiberi ilave edip yoğurun.
6.  Hamuru üç bezeye ayırın.
7.  Her bir bezeyi un serpilmiş tezgahın üzerinde hazır yufkadan biraz daha kalınca açın.
8.  Yufkaları dörder santim çapında yuvarlaklar şeklinde kesin.
9.  Her yuvarlağın ortasına iç malzemeyi paylaştırın ve ortasından tutup birleştirin.
10.  Yağlanmış fırın tepsisine dizip bir su bardağı kadar su ilave edin.
11.  Önceden ısıtılmış 170 dereceye ayarlı fırında arada bir suyu bittikçe su ilave ederek pişirin.
12.  Üzeri için, tereyağını bir tavada eritip toz kırmızıbiberi ekleyin.
13.  Mantıyı servis tabağına alın.
14.  Üzerine yoğurt ve tereyağlı sosu gezdirerek dökün.
15.  Sıcak servis yapın.

name: Open Mouth Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 adet kuru soğan (ince doğranmış veya rendelenmiş)
Kıyma yerine, daha aromatik bir lezzet için dana ve kuzu karışımı kıyma tercih edebilirsiniz. daha hafif bir seçenek isteyenler az yağlı kıyma kullanabilir.
İç harca küçük küpler halinde doğranmış kapya biber veya ince kıyılmış maydanoz ekleyerek harcı zenginleştirebilirsiniz.
Biber salçası yerine, daha yumuşak bir tat için domates salçası kullanabilir ya da ikisini karıştırabilirsiniz.
Baharatları damak tadınıza göre çeşitlendirebilir; çok az kimyon veya kuru kekik ekleyerek farklı aromalar elde edebilirsiniz.
Yoğurt yerine, süt kullanarak daha yumuşak bir hamur hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Hamura bir miktar zeytinyağı eklemek, daha hafif bir aroma sağlar.
Unun bir kısmını tam buğday unu ile değiştirerek farklı bir tat yakalayabilirsiniz; kıvam için sıvı miktarını dengelemeyi unutmayın.
Daha kabarık bir hamur için kabartma tozu yerine instant maya ile hazırlayıp kısa süre mayalanmasını bekleyebilirsiniz.
Kızartma yerine önceden ısıtılmış fırında pişirerek daha hafif bir sonuç elde edebilirsiniz.
Daha az yağ kullanmak için kontrollü şekilde airfryer da tercih edilebilir; bu durumda pişirme süresi farklılık gösterebilir.

instructions: 1. Yoğurma kabına unu eklemeden diğer hamur malzemelerini alın ve karıştırın.
2.  Ardından unu azar azar ilave ederek yumuşak kıvamlı bir hamur elde edene kadar yoğurun.
3.  Hamurun üzerini kapatıp kısa süre dinlendirin.
4. İç harcı hazırlamak için tüm malzemeleri bir kaseye alın ve homojen bir karışım elde edene kadar iyice karıştırın.
5. Dinlenen hamuru iki eşit bezeye ayırın.
6.  Bezeleri oklava veya merdane yardımıyla çok ince olmayacak şekilde açın.
7. Açtığınız hamurdan bir kalıp ya da kapak yardımıyla yuvarlak parçalar çıkarın.
8.  Hamurların kenarlarına fırça ile hafifçe su sürerek daha kolay kapanmalarını sağlayın.
9. Hazırladığınız iç harçtan hamurların ortasına yerleştirin.
10.  Kenarlarını parmak uçlarınızla bastırarak kapatın ve orta kısmını açık bırakın.
11. Tavaya yeterli miktarda sıvı yağ ekleyip ısıtın.
12.  Ağzı açıkları, harçlı kısmı alta gelecek şekilde tavaya yerleştirin ve her iki tarafını da kızarana kadar pişirin.
13. Kızaran hamurları tavadan alıp fazla yağını süzdürün.
14.  Hazırladığınız boyuta bağlı olarak yaklaşık iki düzine adet elde edebilirsiniz; daha büyük hazırlarsanız sayı değişebilir.

name: Open Pies With Vegetables And Cream Cheese
original_name: Ανοιχτές πίτες µε λαχανικά και τυρί κρέμα

ingredients.item: 1 κόκκινη ή κίτρινη πιπεριά σε καρέ
1 ξερό κρεμμύδι κομμένο σε μικρά καρέ
Λίγος ψιλοκομμένος φρέσκος βασιλικός ή δυόσμος ή ρίγανη
1 κόκκινη ή κίτρινη πιπεριά σε καρέ
1 ξερό κρεμμύδι κομμένο σε μικρά καρέ
Λίγος ψιλοκομμένος φρέσκος βασιλικός ή δυόσμος ή ρίγανη

instructions: Ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο σε βαθύ τηγάνι και σοτάρουμε το κρεμμύδι για 3 με 4 λεπτά να γίνει διάφανο, χωρίς όμως να πάρει χρώμα.
Προσθέτουμε την πιπεριά, τη μελιτζάνα και το κολοκύθι και τα αφήνουμε λίγα λεπτά να μαραθούν.
Τα αλατοπιπερώνουμε.
Ανοίγουμε τα φύλλα στον πάγκο και τα κόβουμε στη μέση.
Με μαχαίρι ή με το ειδικό ροδάκι αφαιρούμε τις γωνίες και τους δίνουμε στρογγυλό σχήμα.
Αλείφουμε λίγη σάλτσα στη μέση κάθε φύλλου.
Ισομοιράζουμε πάνω τα ψημένα λαχανικά και τα ντοματίνια και πασπαλίζουμε με το μυρωδικό.
Ρίχνουμε στο κέντρο κάθε πίτας με ένα κουτάλι τυρί κρέμα.
Ανασηκώνουμε το κάθε φύλλο γύρω γύρω και το διπλώνουμε προς τα μέσα, φτιάχνοντας ανοιχτές πιτούλες.
Τις βάζουμε σε λαδωμένη λαμαρίνα και τις ψήνουμε για περίπου 40 λεπτά στους 180°C μέχρι να ροδίσει το φύλλο.
Ζεστές ή κρύες είναι τέλειες!

name: Open Sandwich
instructions: Κόβουμε τα λαχανικά, τη μελιτζάνα και το κολοκύθι σε πολύ λεπτές φέτες.
Κόβουμε την πιπεριά αφαιρούμε τους σπόρους και τις ίνες και την ψιλοκόβουμε σε μικρά καρέ.
Ζεσταίνουμε ένα τηγάνι σε δυνατή φωτιά και προσθέτουμε το ελαιόλαδο.
Ρίχνουμε τα λαχανικά στο καυτό τηγάνι και σοτάρουμε για 3-4´ ανακατεύοντας σε δυνατή φωτιά.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι κατά βούληση.
Προσθέτουμε τα ντοματίνια κομμένα στη μέση σοτάρουμε για 2’
Προσθέτουμε το βαλσαμικό κι ανακατεύουμε.
Αποσύρουμε τα λαχανικά από την φωτιά και προσθέτουμε τα φύλλα μαϊντανού.
Βάζουμε το ψωμί σε μικρό ταψί.
Μοιράζουμε τα ψητά λαχανικά στις φέτες ψωμιού.
Καλύπτουμε με 2 φέτες τυρί.
Το αφήνουμε το για 5’ στο φούρνο στους 180 ºC στον αέρα να λιώσει ελαφρά το τυρί.
Απολαύστε το ζεστό και λαχταριστό.

name: Open Stuffed Peppers

ingredients.item: Yarımşar demet nane, maydanoz ve dereotu

instructions: 1. Siyez bulgurunu temizleyip yıkayın ve zeytinyağında kavrulmuş soğana ilave edin.
2.  Ayrı bir yerde su ısıtın.
3.  Siyez bulguru da iyice kavrulduktan sonra baharatları ilave edin.
4.  Limon sıkın ve suyunu verinceye kadar pişip demlendikten sonra taze baharatları ekleyin.
5.  Kapya biberleri közleyip soyun.
6.  Çekirdeklerini aldıktan sonra doğrayın, güzelce suyu uçana kadar kavurun.
7.  El blender’ı ile pürüzsüz olana kadar çekip sıkma torbasına alın.
8. Yoğurdu istediğiniz şekilde tatlandırıp sıkma torbasına alın.
9.  Kuru biberleri ıslatıp ikiye böldükten sonra içini sıyırın.
10.  Üzerine baskı uygulayarak iyice kurutun.
11.  Yağda yakmadan kızartın.
12.  İki çıtır yaprağın arasına iç dolguyu koyup yaprağın üzerine köz biber püresini ve yoğurdu koyarak servis edebilirsiniz.

name: Open With Olive Paste
instructions: 1. Ilık süt ve mayayı büyük bir kaseye alıp karıştırın.
2.  Tuz, şeker ve ayçiçek yağını başka bir kapta karıştırıp mayalı karışıma ekleyin.
3. Üzerine unu ilave ederek hamuru yoğurun.
4.  Yumuşak bir kıvam elde edinceye kadar yoğurma işlemine devam edin.
5. Hamur hafifçe ele yapışır kıvama geldiğinde üzerini streç folyoyla kapatıp sıcak bir ortamda mayalanmaya bırakın.
6. Elinizi hafifçe yağlayıp hamurdan büyükçe bir parça koparın.
7.  Hamuru elinizle pasta tabağı büyüklüğünde açıp üzerine zeytin ezmesi sürün.
8. Rulo şeklinde sarıp uçlarından tutarak ters yönlere doğru çevirin ve uçlarını birbirine yapıştırın.
9.  Üzerine yumurta sarısı sürüp susam ve çörek otu serpin.
10. Önceden 175 derecede ısıtılmış fırında üzeri kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
11.  Pişirdiğiniz açmaları bir kenarda soğumaya bırakın.
12.  Şimdiden afiyet olsun.

name: Open-face Crab Burgers With Red Pepper Dressing

ingredients.item: Minced drained roasted red pepper from jar
Minced drained roasted red pepper from jar
(1/4 stick) butter plus more for rolls
Crisp heart of romaine lettuce leaves

instructions: Mix all ingredients in small bowl. Season dressing with salt and pepper.

Whisk first 7 ingredients in large bowl. Mix in red pepper and green onion. Gently mix in crab and 3/4 cup panko. Sprinkle 1 cup panko on rimmed baking sheet. Using 1/4 cup for each burger, shape crab mixture into twelve 3-inch patties. Press into crumbs on sheet to coat both sides; keep crab burgers on sheet. Cover with plastic wrap. Chill at least 1 hour.
Preheat broiler. Spread cut sides of rolls with butter. Broil rolls, buttered side up, until golden, about 2 minutes; cover.
Melt 2 tablespoons butter with oil in large skillet over medium-high heat. Working in 2 batches, add burgers to skillet. Sauté until brown, about 5 minutes per side.
Arrange 1 roll half, cut side up, on each plate. Top each with lettuce leaf, then 2 crab burgers. Spoon dressing over.

name: Open-face Egg Salad Sandwiches With Mixed Herbs
instructions: Combine egg yolk, mustard, and a pinch salt in a medium bowl. Anchor bowl by setting it inside a towel-lined saucepan, which will afford you 2 free hands—1 for pouring and 1 for whisking. Whisk until very smooth.

Combine olive and vegetable oils in a measuring glass and pour into yolk mixture, drop by drop at first, then in a slow steady stream as mixture stiffens, until all the oil has been added. Whisk in vinegar and hot sauce; season with salt and pepper. Thin mayo with water if needed, adding a teaspoonful at a time until just loose enough to fall off a spoon.

Gently lower eggs into a large saucepan of boiling salted water, and cook, maintaining an active simmer, 9 minutes. Immediately transfer eggs with a slotted spoon to a bowl of ice water and stir until cool enough to handle, about 1 minute. Drain, pat dry, and peel eggs. Tear eggs into large pieces and add to mayonnaise. Gently fold just to coat; season with salt and pepper. Spoon over bread.
Toss scallions, basil, dill, chives, and lemon zest in a small bowl. Add lemon juice, drizzle with oil, and season with salt. Toss to coat. Pile herbs on top of egg.

name: Open-face Eggplant Sandwiches With Ricotta And Pickled Onions

ingredients.prep: red leaf, or romaine lettuce leaves (for serving)

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Combine red onion, sugar, a big pinch of salt, 2 Tbsp. vinegar, and 2 Tbsp. hot water in a small bowl. Let sit, tossing occasionally, until you’re ready to assemble sandwiches.

Brush eggplant rounds generously with oil on one side. Heat a large skillet, preferably nonstick, over medium-high. Working in batches if needed, cook eggplant in skillet, oil side down, in a single layer, until well browned, about 4 minutes. Brush each round with oil, turn over, and cook until other side is browned and eggplant is tender, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a baking dish or wide shallow bowl.
Whisk 1 Tbsp. plus 1½ tsp. oil and remaining 1 Tbsp. red wine vinegar in another small bowl to combine; season with salt and pepper. Pour over eggplant, toss gently to coat, and set aside.

Toast walnuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Let cool slightly, then pile on a cutting board along with basil. Add a pinch of salt and finely chop. Transfer to a clean small bowl and add ricotta and honey. Finely grate in garlic and mix well; season with salt and pepper.
Spread ricotta mixture over toast. Top with lettuce leaves, pickled onion, and reserved eggplant.

name: Open-face Sausage And Peppers Sandwiches

ingredients.item: Roasted red peppers from a jar

instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add sausages and cook, turning occasionally, until browned all over and cooked through, 8–10 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and slice into 1/2-inch pieces. Return sausage to skillet and add roasted peppers, vinegar, honey, cayenne, and remaining 1 Tbsp. oil. Cook, stirring occasionally, until peppers are warmed through and sauce is thickened, about 4 minutes. Stir in basil and season with salt and pepper. Divide sausage mixture evenly over toasted side of rolls.

name: Open-face Steak Sandwich With Parmesan Dressing

ingredients.item: Mature arugula leaves with tender stems

instructions: Heat a dry large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high. Using a sharp knife, lightly score steak on both sides in a crosshatch pattern. Season generously with salt and pepper, then rub all over with vegetable oil. Cook steak, turning once or twice to brown evenly, until medium-rare and lightly charred, 8−10 minutes. Transfer steak to a cutting board and let rest at least 15 minutes; reserve skillet.
Meanwhile, place onion in a small bowl; cover with cold water. Set aside.

Blend mustard and lemon juice in a blender to combine. With motor running, stream in ½ cup olive oil, then gradually add Parmesan. Stream in 1 Tbsp. cold water and blend until dressing is smooth and thick. Season with salt and pepper.
Heat reserved skillet over medium. Drizzle cut sides of ciabatta with olive oil. Working with 1 half at a time, cook, cut side down, until golden brown and crisp, about 5 minutes each.

Place bread, cut side up, on a platter and drizzle with one-third of dressing. Top with arugula; drain reserved onion and scatter over arugula. Season with salt and pepper and drizzle with half of remaining dressing. Thinly slice steak and arrange over dressed arugula. Drizzle with remaining dressing, season with more salt, then cut sandwiches crosswise into pieces.

name: Open-faced Pepper Pie
instructions: Σοτάρουμε πρώτα τις πιπεριές για λίγα λεπτά με μία κουταλιά σούπας από το λιωμένο βούτυρο μέχρι να μαλακώσουν.
Αφήνουμε να κρυώσουν.
Προσθέτουμε το μαϊντανό και την πάπρικα και ανακατεύουμε.
Ανοίγουμε το κανταΐφι. Το ξάνουμε σε μικρά κομμάτια.
Το αφήνουμε στον πάγκο λίγο να στεγνώσει.
Σε μπολ χτυπάμε τα αυγά, το γάλα, το γιαούρτι και το λιωμένο βούτυρο ώστε να ενωθούν. Αλατοπιπερώνουμε.
Προσθέτουμε στο μείγμα τις πιπεριές, τα τυριά και τους σπόρους. Ανακατεύουμε καλά.
Τέλος, προσθέτουμε το ξερό φύλλο.
Ανακατεύουμε πολύ καλά και απλώνουμε σε λεπτή στρώση, σε λαδωμένο ταψί.
Πασπαλίζουμε με το καλαμποκάλευρο και ραντίζουμε πεταχτά με τα δάχτυλα με λίγο νερό.
Ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 180 βαθμούς C για περίπου 50΄, μέχρι να ροδίσει η επιφάνεια.

name: Open-faced Roasted Squash Sandwich

ingredients.prep: sliced avocado, salsa, and cilantro leaves (for serving)

instructions: Real Talk: If you can’t find delicata squash, which you can identify by its long oblong shape, pale yellow skin, and distinctive green stripes, that’s totally fine. Acorn or half of a butternut squash will work just great too. And here’s how to chop one up if you’ve never done it before.
Preheat oven to 450°. Toss squash, shallots, 3 Tbsp. oil, and 2 tsp. chili powder on a rimmed baking sheet and roast until squash is browned and tender, 15–20 minutes.

Meanwhile, combine beans and their liquid with remaining 3 Tbsp. oil and 2 tsp. chili powder in a medium skillet; bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Smash beans with a potato smasher, meat pounder, large spoon, or whatever you’ve got handy until mixture is all nicely smashed and smooth. Continue to cook until mixture is creamy, about 5 minutes.

Spread bean mixture onto toast. Toss cabbage with 2 Tbsp. pickled pepper brine in a medium bowl. Pile on cabbage, avocado, salsa, and cilantro over bean mixture. Top with squash mixture and pickled peppers.
Do Ahead: Squash can be roasted 1 day ahead; cover and chill. Bean mixture can be made 1 day ahead; cover and chill.

name: Open-faced Tuna Melt Sandwich

ingredients.item: Sea salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
Whole wheat or whole grain bread

instructions: Set the oven to broil and move the rack to the highest position.

In a medium bowl, combine tuna, mayonnaise, mustard, red onion, capers, cornichons, lemon juice, thyme, salt, and pepper and stir thoroughly until combined. Leave the tuna in slightly large chunks, if possible.
Arrange bread on a baking sheet and spread mayonnaise on each slice. Divide tuna salad evenly among slices, then top each with 2 slices of tomato and 1 slice of cheese.
Broil tuna melts until cheese is golden brown and bubbling, 3 to 4 minutes. Serve warm.

name: Open-topped Minced Meat Pie
instructions: 1. Hamuru için unun ortasına yumurtayı kırın.
2.  Tuz, süt ve ayçiçeği yağını ekleyip, su ilave ederek yoğurun.
3.  Hamuru dinlenmeye bırakın.
4.  Kıymanın içine küp doğranmış soğan, salça, pul biber, karabiber ve tuzu ekleyin.
5.  Su ilave edip yumuşak bir kıvama getirin.
6.  Hamurdan bezeler koparıp tatlı tabağı büyüklüğünde açın ve üzerlerine iç harcı paylaştırın.
7.  Kenardan bir parmak boşluk bırakın.
8.  Boşlukları üzerine geniş pile yapar gibi şekil verip, içe doğru bastırarak kıvırın.
9.  Börekleri unladığınız fırın tepsisine yerleştirip önceden ısıtılmış 180 dereceye ayarlı fırında pişirin.
10.  Sıcak servis yapın.

name: Opening Pastry

ingredients.item: 1 yemek kaşığı instant maya veya 20 gr yaş maya

instructions: 1. Süt, ayçiçek yağı, yumurta akı, maya, tuz, şeker ve unu hamur yoğurma kabına alıp yoğurun.
2.  Üzerini nemli bir bezle örterek hamur iki katı olana kadar dinlendirin.
3. Beyaz peyniri çatalla ezerek kıyılmış maydanozla karıştırın.
4.  Hamurdan portakal büyüklüğünde bezeler koparın.
5.  Hamuru merdane yardımıyla daire şeklinde açın.
6. Açtığınız hamuru dört eşit parçaya bölün.
7.  Elde ettiğiniz üçgen parçaların üzerinde bıçak yardımıyla parmak uzunluğunda çentikler açın.
8.  Her bezeye aynı işlemi uygulayın.
9. Geniş tarafına peynirli harçtan ekleyerek içe doğru sararak ay çöreği şekli verin.
10.  Yumurta sarısı sürün.
11. Önceden ısıttığınız 170 derece fırında üzeri kızarana kadar pişirin.
12.  Servis yapın.
13.  Şimdiden afiyet olsun.

name: Opening Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 paket kuru maya veya 20 g yaş maya

instructions: 1. Öncelikle şeker, süt, su ve mayayı geniş bir yoğurma kabına alın ve iyice karıştırdıktan sonra 5 dakika kadar bekleyin, maya aktive olsun.
2. Yumurtaları sarısından ayırarak sadece aklarını hamura ekleyin, ardından sıvı yağı ve tuzu ilave edin.
3. Unu azar azar ekleyerek yumuşak ve ele yapışmayan bir hamur yoğurun.
4. Hamurun üzerini örterek yaklaşık bir saat boyunca mayalanmaya bırakın, hacmi iki katına çıkana kadar bekleyin.
5. Mayalanan hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparın ve uzun, ince şekil verin.
6.  İki parçayı uçlarından birleştirip birbirinin üzerinden geçirerek örgü formu oluşturun.
7. Örgünün iki ucunu birleştirip tepsiye dizin ve hamurun tepside 10 dakika kadar ikinci bir mayalanma yapmasına izin verin.
8. Üzerine yumurta sarısı sürün ve üzerine susam veya çörek otu serpiştirin.
9. Önceden ısıtılmış 180°C fırında 30–40 dakika, üzeri altın rengi alana kadar pişirin.
10. Fırından çıkan açmalar servise hazır.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Opera Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line 2 jelly roll pans with parchment paper.
Beat 6 egg whites in a glass, metal, or ceramic bowl with an electric mixer until soft peaks form. Slowly add 2 tablespoons white sugar and beat on high speed until whites are stiff and glossy.

Beat almond flour, confectioners' sugar, 4 eggs, and 2 egg yolks in a separate bowl for 3 minutes. Add all-purpose flour and beat on low speed until combined; gently fold in egg whites. Divide batter between jelly roll pans; spread evenly.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, about 5 minutes. Invert onto wire racks and peel off parchment paper; cool.
While cake is cooling, combine ½ cup boiling water, ⅓ cup white sugar, and 1 ½ tablespoons coffee powder in a small bowl; stir until dissolved. Set coffee syrup aside.
Combine 2 tablespoons boiling water and 2 tablespoons coffee powder in a separate small bowl; set coffee mixture aside for buttercream.

Combine 1 cup white sugar, ¼ cup water, and vanilla extract in a small saucepan; bring to a boil. Cook, without stirring, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into sugar syrup reaches 124°C (124 degrees C).

Meanwhile, beat 1 egg and 1 egg yolk together in the bowl of a stand mixer on high speed until pale and foamy. Pour hot sugar syrup carefully down the side of the bowl, beating continuously until the bottom of the bowl feels cool to the touch.
Beat 14 tablespoons butter in a separate bowl until creamy. Gradually add butter to egg mixture, beating until frosting is fluffy. Add reserved coffee mixture; beat until well incorporated.

Place dark chocolate in a heat-proof bowl. Bring milk and cream to a boil in a saucepan; pour over chocolate, then stir until melted and smooth. Whisk in 4 tablespoons butter until ganache looks smooth and creamy; cool.

Cut cooled cake layers in half crosswise. Place halved cake layer on a rectangular serving plate. Sprinkle some coffee syrup over cake, then spread on an even layer of buttercream. Top with a second halved cake layer, sprinkle some coffee syrup over cake, and spread on an even layer of buttercream. Spread ½ ganache on top. Repeat with remaining each two halved cake layers, coffee syrup, and buttercream. Top cake with remaining ½ ganache.

name: Opium Twist Recipe

ingredients.item: 200 gr haşlanmış yeşil mercimek (yaklaşık 1 su bardağı)
Geleneksel un yerine tam buğday unu veya glütensiz un kullanabilirsiniz.
üzüm sirkesi yerine elma sirkesi, limon suyu veya beyaz sirke tercih edebilirsiniz.
Ilık su yerine ılık süt kullanarak hamurun daha yumuşak ve aromatik olmasını sağlayabilirsiniz.
Sıvı yağ yerine eritilmiş tereyağı veya zeytinyağı tercih edilebilir.
Ezilmiş haşhaş yerine ceviz, fındık veya susam da kullanılabilir.
Daha aromatik bir tat için haşhaşın içine az miktarda tarçın veya şeker ekleyebilirsiniz.
Yeşil mercimek yerine kırmızı mercimek, nohut püresi veya haşlanmış barbunya kullanılabilir.
Maydanoz yerine dereotu, taze nane veya roka ile aromayı çeşitlendirebilirsiniz.
Baharatları damak zevkinize göre ayarlayabilirsiniz; örneğin kimyon, pul biber veya karabiber miktarını artırabilirsiniz.
Susam veya pul biber yerine haşhaş, çörek otu veya keten tohumu serpebilirsiniz.
Böreğin daha hafif olmasını istersen üzerini yumurta sürmeden pişirebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Unu geniş bir kaba alın, tuz ve üzüm sirkesini ekleyin.
2.  Ilık suyu azar azar ekleyerek ele yapışmayan yumuşak bir hamur yoğurun.
3.  Hamuru streç filmle sarıp 20-30 dakika dinlendirin.
4. Haşlanmış mercimeği bir kaseye alın, doğranmış maydanoz ve baharatları ekleyip karıştırın.
5. Dinlenen hamuru eşit parçalara bölün ve her parçayı ince yuvarlak veya dikdörtgen şekilde açın.
6. Açtığınız hamurun yüzeyine sıvı yağ sürün, üzerine ezilmiş haşhaş serpin.
7.  Hamuru katlayarak tekrar üzerine yağ ve haşhaş uygulayın.
8. Hamurun bir kenarına mercimekli harçtan yayın ve hamuru rulo şeklinde sarın.
9.  Uç kısmını altına alarak bükme şeklini verin.
10. Bükmeleri yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine yerleştirin.
11.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 25-30 dakika alt üstü kızarana kadar pişirin.
12. Fırından çıkardıktan sonra biraz dinlendirin ve dilimleyerek servis edin.
13.   Afiyet olsun.

name: Orange Almond Brownie
instructions: 1. Fırını 170 dereceye ayarlayın.
2.  20 cm x 20 cm ölçülerinde bir kalıba yağlı kağıt serin.
3.  Bademleri yapışmaz yüzeyli tavada kavurup soğumaya bırakın.
4.  Tereyağı, şeker ve portakal suyu ile rendelenmiş kabuğunu mikserle iyice çırpın.
5.  Teker teker yumurta sarılarını ekleyip çırpmaya devam edin.
6.  Çikolatayı benmari usulü eritip karışıma ekleyin.
7.  Un ve toz bademi ilave edin.
8.  Kuru ve temiz bir kapta yumurta aklarını 1 tutam tuz ile katılaşıncaya kadar çırpın.
9.  Çikolata karışımına ekleyip spatula ile çırpmadan yavaşça karıştırın.
10.  Bademleri ekleyip hamuru kalıba aktarın ve 30-40 dakika pişirin.
11.  Üzeri için krema ve balı sos tenceresine alıp kaynamaya bırakın.
12.  Çikolatayı ekleyip eriyinceye kadar karıştırın.
13.  Tereyağını ekleyin ve karıştırmaya devam edin.
14.  Ocaktan alıp soğumaya bırakın.
15.  Kekin üzerine döküp servis yapın.

name: Orange Almond Ice Cream Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağı krema (tercihe göre yağsız veya light krema)
Yarım su bardağı kavrulmuş badem, iri doğranmış
Portakal yerine portakal esansı veya doğal meyve püresi de kullanılabilir.
Ayrıca elma püresi veya muz püresi de yumurta yerine bağlayıcı görev görür.
Kavurmadan eklenirse dondurmaya daha yoğun ve çıtır bir doku katabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Süt ve kremayı bir tencerede kaynamaya yakın ısıtın, kaynatmayın.
2. Portakal kabuğu rendesini ekleyin ve birkaç dakika birlikte ısıtın.
3. Yumurta sarılarını ve şekeri bir kasede çırpın, açık sarı krema kıvamına gelene kadar çırpın.
4. Sıcak süt-krema karışımını yavaşça yumurta sarısına ekleyip sürekli karıştırın (tempering yöntemi).
5. Tüm karışımı tekrar tencereye alın ve kısık ateşte sürekli karıştırarak koyulaşana kadar pişirin.
6. Karışım krema kıvamına geldiğinde ocaktan alın ve vanilin ile portakal suyunu ekleyin.
7. Karışımı oda sıcaklığına gelene kadar soğutun.
8. Dondurma makinesine aktarın ve üretici talimatına göre dondurun.
9. Makine yoksa, karışımı derin bir kaba aktarın, 30 dakikada bir çırparak 3–4 saat dondurun.
10. Dondurmanın son aşamasında iri doğranmış bademleri ekleyin ve karıştırın ve servis edin.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Orange And Almond Cookies

ingredients.item: 60 g  miolo de amêndoa ralado tostado

instructions: Numa tigela, misture a amêndoa com a farinha, o fermento e o sal. Reserve.

À parte, bata a manteiga com o açúcar, durante cerca de 3 minutos. Junte a gema, a raspa de laranja e a baunilha e continue a bater até ficar tudo bem misturado. Acrescente os ingredientes secos e bata mais um pouco.
Forme uma bola com a massa, envolva em película aderente e leve ao frigorífico durante 1 hora.
Após esse tempo, aqueça o forno a 180ºC e forre um tabuleiro com papel vegetal. Estenda a massa e corte bolachas com um cortador.
Prepare a cobertura: coloque a clara num prato e as amêndoas laminadas noutro. Pincele as bolachas com a clara e, de seguida, polvilhe com as amêndoas. Leve ao forno durante cerca de 15 minutos.

name: Orange And Almond Pie
instructions: Unte um tabuleiro com manteiga, forre-o com papel vegetal e volte a untar. Coloque os ovos numa tigela.
Junte o açúcar, a manteiga, a raspa e do sumo das laranjas.
Acrescente a amêndoa ralada e misture muito bem com uma vara de arames.
Deite a massa no tabuleiro, leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, durante 15 minutos, depois desenforme sobre um pano polvilhado com açúcar e enrole. Deixe arrefecer e sirva.

name: Orange And Cardamom Brownie
instructions: 1.  Çikolata ve tereyağını benmari usulü eritin.
2.  Ocaktan alıp soğumaya bırakın.
3.  Geniş bir karıştırma kabında toz şeker, un ve kakaoyu harmanlayın.
4.  Soğuyan çikolata ve yumurtaları ilave edip pürüzsüz bir kıvam elde edinceye kadar mikser yardımıyla çırpın.
5.  Rendelenmiş portakal kabuğu ve kakuleyi ekleyip bir spatula yardımıyla karıştırın.
6.  Karışımı yağlı kağıt serili kare bir fırın kabına aktarın.
7.  Önceden ısıtılmış 175 derece fırında 30-35 dakika pişirin.
8.  Üzerini rendelenmiş portakal kabuğu ve portakallı çikolata parçaları ile süsleyerek servis yapın.

name: Orange And Carrot Compote
instructions: Com a ajuda de uma faca, corte a casca das laranjas em tirinhas e deite-as num tacho. Esprema o sumo das laranjas e deite também no tacho, bem como o sumo de limão. Adicione a água e leve ao lume, até levantar fervura.
Depois reduza o lume, tape e deixe ferver durante cerca de 1 hora, até as cascas ficarem macias.
Acrescente a cenoura ralada e o açúcar e mexa, em lume brando, até que este fique dissolvido. Aumente o lume e deixe ferver por mais 5 a 10 minutos, de modo a ficar com a consistência de compota.
Retire o tacho do lume e deixe arrefecer por cerca de 5 minutos. Distribua a compota por frascos esterilizados, feche-os e guarde-os em local seco e escuro.

name: Orange And Chocolate Bundt

ingredients.item: 3 colheres (sopa) bem cheias  cacau em pó

instructions: Pré-aqueça o forno a 180ºc. Unte uma forma grande de buraco com manteiga e polvilhe-a com farinha. Reserve.
Peneire a farinha com o fermento e o sal e reserve. Numa tigela, bata a manteiga e o queijo creme, ate ficar homogeneo. Junte aos poucos o açúcar e a raspa de laranja e bata por mais 5 minutos.

Adicione um ovo de cada vez, batendo bem entre cada adição. Acrescente o sumo de laranja e bata mais um pouco. Junte a mistura da farinha e envolva. Divida a massa em duas tigelas, adicione o cacau a uma delas e envolva.

Deite as massas na forma, intercalando-as para criar o efeito mármore, ou coloque primeiro a massa branca e depois a massa de cacau. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 160ºc, por cerca de 60 a 80 minutos. Retire do forno e aguarde 10 minutos antes de desenformar.

name: Orange And Chocolate Chip Muffins
instructions: Σε ένα μπολ βάζουμε το ηλιέλαιο, την ζάχαρη, το αυγό , το γιαούρτι και το ξύσμα πορτοκαλιού.
Ανακατεύουμε καλά με ένα σύρμα να ενωθούν τα υλικά.
Προσθέτουμε τον χυμό πορτοκαλιού και ανακατεύουμε ώστε να αναμειχθούν καλά.
Κοσκινίζουμε το αλεύρι , το μπέικιν, τη σόδα , το αλάτι και τα ρίχνουμε μέσα στα υγρά υλικά.
Απαλά, ανακατεύουμε με σπάτουλα το μείγμα.
Βάζουμε 6 χάρτινες θήκες σε ταψάκι για muffins.
Ισομοιράζουμε τα μαφιν πορτοκαλιού στις θήκες.
Ακουμπάμε κομμάτια σοκολάτας στην επιφάνεια τους.
Ψήνουμε τα μαφιν πορτοκαλιού σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 170ºC στον αέρα στη μεσαία σχάρα για περίπου 25 λεπτά.
Ελέγχουμε αν ψήθηκαν στο κέντρο τους βυθίζοντας μια οδοντογλυφίδα πριν τα βγάλουμε από τον φούρνο.
Αφήνουμε να σταθούν 10 λεπτά στην φόρμα και έπειτα τα ξεφορμάρουμε.

name: Orange And Coconut Cake
instructions: Aqueça o forno a 180ºC. Separe as gemas das claras. Bata as claras em castelo e reserve.
À parte, bata as gemas com o açúcar, a manteiga derretida e o sumo de 1 laranja. Adicione a farinha e o fermento, misture e depois envolva delicadamente as claras.
Unte uma forma de buraco com manteiga e polvilhe-a com farinha. Deite nela a massa anterior e leve ao forno por cerca de 30 minutos.
Entretanto, misture a raspa e o sumo da restante laranja com o coco ralado. Retire o bolo do forno, deixe arrefecer e desenforme. Cubra com a mistura anterior e sirva.
Aqueça o forno a 180ºC. Separe as gemas das claras. Bata as claras em castelo e reserve.
À parte, bata as gemas com o açúcar, a manteiga derretida e o sumo de 1 laranja. Adicione a farinha e o fermento, misture e depois envolva delicadamente as claras.
Unte uma forma de buraco com manteiga e polvilhe-a com farinha. Deite nela a massa anterior e leve ao forno por cerca de 30 minutos.
Entretanto, misture a raspa e o sumo da restante laranja com o coco ralado. Retire o bolo do forno, deixe arrefecer e desenforme. Cubra com a mistura anterior e sirva.

name: Orange And Hazelnut Dessert
instructions: 1. Unu hamur yoğurma kabına eleyin.
2.  İrmik, Hindistan cevizi, oda ısısında yumuşatılmış tereyağı, yoğurt, pudra şekeri, yumurtalar, kabartma tozu, vanilya ve rendelenmiş portakal kabuğunu ekleyip yoğurun.
3.  Hamuru iki parça yağlı kağıt arasında yarım santim kalınlığında açın.
4.  Hamurun üzerine ufalanmış fındık serpin.
5.  Hamuru rulo şeklinde sarın.
6.  İki parmak kalınlığında dilimleyin.
7.  Yağlanmış fırın tepsisine dizin.
8.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında kızarana kadar pişirin.
9.  Şerbet için, şeker ve suyu tencereye alıp 10 dakika kaynatın.
10.  Portakal suyunu ekleyip karıştırın ve tencereyi ocaktan alın.
11.  Şerbetin ılınmasını sağlayın.
12.  Tepsiyi fırından çıkardıktan hemen sonra ılık şerbeti pişmiş hamurların üzerine gezdirerek dökün.
13.  Tatlılar soğuyana kadar bekletin.
14.  Servis yapın.

name: Orange And Jalapeño Spritzer
instructions: Juice limes and 6 oranges into a large pitcher. (You should have about ¾ cup lime juice and 1¼ cups orange juice.) Discard lime rinds and half of the orange rinds. Cut remaining orange rinds into quarters and place in a large saucepan.

Coarsely chop 1 jalapeño and add to orange rinds along with sugar and salt. Using a muddler or dowel-style rolling pin, muddle rinds until thoroughly smooshed and much of the sugar and salt is dissolved, about 3 minutes. Stir in 1 cup warm water and let sit at least 10 minutes and up to 1 hour.

Strain orange mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into pitcher with juice, gently pressing with a spoon to extract as much liquid as possible; discard solids. Thinly slice remaining orange and add to pitcher. Remove seeds from remaining jalapeño; thinly slice into rounds and add to pitcher.
To serve, pour 2 oz. juice mixture into an ice-filled glass. Top off with club soda; stir to combine.
Do Ahead: Juice mixture can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

name: Orange And Milk-braised Pork Carnitas
instructions: Season pork with pepper and salt.
Heat oil in large pot over high heat. Working in batches, cook pork in the hot oil until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Return all cooked pork and accumulated juice to pot.

Season pork with bay leaves, cumin, dried oregano, and cayenne pepper. Stir in fresh orange juice, orange zest, and milk. Bring mixture to a boil over high heat; reduce heat to low. Cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until meat is fork tender but not falling apart, about 2 hours.
Preheat oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).

Remove pork from liquid. Skim some fat from the pot to grease a baking dish. Transfer the pieces of pork to the baking dish. Drizzle about 2 more tablespoons of the floating fat over the meat. Season with more salt, if needed.
Bake in preheated oven until pork is browned, about 15 minutes. Stir pork.
Turn on oven's broiler. Cook pork under broiler until crisp, 2 to 3 minutes.

name: Orange And Poppy Seed Dessert
instructions: 1. Şerbet için şeker, su ve portakal suyunu tencereye alın.
2.  Orta ateşte kaynamaya bırakın.
3.  Kaynadıktan sonra limon suyunu ekleyip 5-6 dakika daha kaynatın ve ocaktan alarak soğumaya bırakın.
4.  Margarin, yumurta, vanilya, rendelenmiş portakal kabuğu, irmik ve şekeri bir kapta karıştırın.
5.  Un ve kabartma tozunu ekleyip iyice yoğurun.
6.  Hamurdan parçalar kopartıp yuvarlayın.
7.  Önce süte ardından haşhaş tohumuna bulayın ve yağlanmış tepsiye dizin.
8.  Her birinin üzerine ceviz içi yerleştirip 180 derece fırında kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
9.  Tatlıları fırından alıp 5 dakika beklettikten sonra şerbeti üzerine kepçe ile gezdirin.
10.  Ara ara tepsideki şerbeti kaşık ile üzerine gezdirin ve en az 2 saat beklettikten sonra servis yapın.

name: Orange And Poppy Seed Stollen

ingredients.item: You will also need a large baking sheet

instructions: Put the sultanas into a mixing bowl. Chop the candied citrus peel into small dice and add to the sultanas. Finely grate the zest from the orange and add to the bowl. Squeeze in the juice of the orange, pour in the rum or brandy and vanilla, then toss together and leave for an hour.

Melt the butter in a small pan, then leave to cool down. Put the flour into a large mixing bowl. No need to sieve it. If using fresh yeast, warm the milk to body temperature (it should feel comfortable rather than cold or scalding when you insert your finger), then crumble in the yeast and stir to dissolve. Add the sugar and salt to the flour and mix well. Beat the egg. Stir in the egg and the warm milk and butter. (If you are using dried yeast, add the yeast straight to the flour, then stir in the other ingredients followed by the warm milk, egg and butter.)

Mix thoroughly—the dough should be soft, shiny and rather sticky. In all honesty it may be very sticky. Turn out on to a generously floured board and knead for a good eight minutes. As you knead, the dough will become less and less sticky and more like a bread dough—though it will be heavier because of the butter and egg. When the dough is soft, elastic and no longer sticking to the board, scoop it up and put it into a floured bowl. Set aside, covered with a clean tea towel, somewhere warm and draught-free for a good hour or until it is well risen. (It won't be quite twice the size of the original dough but well on the way.) Alternatively, mix and knead using a food mixer fitted with a dough hook until the dough comes cleanly away from the sides of the bowl.

Break the cardamom pods open and remove their seeds. Crush the seeds to a coarse powder using a pestle and mortar or a spice mill, then mix in a small bowl with the poppy seeds, cinnamon and almonds. Dust the work surface in the flour and tip your risen dough onto it. Knead the spice and seed mixture and the soaked fruits, leaving behind most of the liquid, into the dough.

Roll into a long loaf about 22cmx16cm and flatten it slightly: Roll the marzipan into a cylinder nearly the length of the dough, then place it in the centre. Brush the edges with a little beaten egg and press together. Turn the dough over and place it on a lined baking sheet, cover with a towel and return it to a warm place to prove for a further hour and a half.

Heat the oven to 177°C/180°C/Gas 4. Place the loaf in the hot oven and bake for about thirty-five to forty minutes, until pale gold. Melt the butter for the glaze and brush over the loaf. Cool on a wire rack, then dust generously with icing sugar.
When the loaf is thoroughly cool, wrap loosely in waxed paper or clingfilm and keep in a cookie tin.

name: Orange And Saffron Panettone
instructions: Prepare the sponge the night before you mix the dough: Mix 1.5 cups all-purpose flour with 1/8 teaspoon yeast in a bowl. Add 2/3 cup cool water. Cover with plastic wrap and let sponge stand at room temperature 8 hours to overnight.

Toss raisins with Cointreau in a bowl. Mix orange and lemon peel in with raisins and add an extra tablespoon of Cointreau and let them soften, if they are on the hard side. Cover with plastic wrap and let stand 8 hours to overnight.

Pour milk into a saucepan and crumble in saffron threads; heat just to a simmer. Transfer to the bowl of a stand mixer, taking care to get all of the saffron bits into the bowl. Let cool to just barely warm (43°C) or room temperature.

Transfer sponge to a mixing bowl, breaking up slightly with a spoon. Mix in eggs, stirring a few times by hand. Add 2 1/3 cups bread flour, sugar, 2 1/4 teaspoons yeast, and salt. Mix with the paddle attachment on low speed for about 5 minutes, stopping to scrape down sides of bowl occasionally; the dough will be very loose.

Switch to the dough hook attachment and increase speed to medium. Add butter, one piece at a time, mixing until each piece is fully incorporated. Increase to high speed for 1 minute if the mixer can handle it; the dough should be climbing the dough hook and starting to clear the sides of the bowl. Add soaked raisins, orange peel, and lemon peel. Mix on low speed for 2 minutes; the fruit may not be fully dispersed.
Transfer dough to a greased bowl. Flop the dough over itself a couple of times (it's a little too wet to fold), cover the bowl with plastic wrap, and let rise for 60 minutes.
Fold dough a few times to release gas and mix in fruit. Cover again with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 4 hours or overnight.

Turn the dough onto a floured work space. Divide in half and shape into 2 balls. Place each ball seam-side down in a 6' paper panettone form and set on a baking sheet. Beat egg with water, and brush egg wash onto each loaf. Cover panettone forms loosely with plastic wrap and let rise until doubled, about 90 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Brush loaves with egg wash again and sprinkle pearl sugar on top.
Place baking sheet in the hot oven, immediately reducing the temperature to 191°C (190 degrees C). Bake for 20 minutes, then rotate the baking sheet and bake for an additional 10 minutes.

Reduce oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C) and continue baking until a tester inserted in the center of each loaf comes out clean, about 20 minutes more. Cool completely on a wire rack before slicing.

name: Orange And Soy-glazed Baby Back Ribs

ingredients.prep: cut between bones into individual ribs (18–20 ribs)

ingredients.item: Scallions (white and light-green parts separated from dark-green parts)
Fresh orange juice plus zest from 1 orange

instructions: Place ribs, 1/2 cup soy sauce, 3 minced garlic cloves, 2 tsp. cumin seeds, and 1 tsp. red pepper flakes in a large pot; add water to cover completely. Bring to a boil and immediately reduce to a simmer. Cover with lid ajar; cook until ribs are tender, about 2 hours. Drain ribs; set aside for 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat oil in a small saucepan over medium heat; add remaining 3 tsp. cumin seeds and 2 tsp. red pepper flakes. Toast lightly until fragrant, about 30 seconds; add remaining 6 minced garlic cloves and white and pale-green scallions. Sauté until just soft, about 2 minutes. Add remaining 1/2 cup soy sauce, orange juice, and honey. Bring to a boil and cook until sauce is thick, 12–15 minutes.

Preheat broiler. Line a rimmed baking sheet with foil. Place ribs on prepared sheet; brush with sauce. Broil until sauce bubbles, 2–3 minutes. Turn, brush with additional sauce, and broil until ribs are heated through and sauce is bubbling, 2–3 minutes longer. Transfer to a platter. Drizzle with remaining sauce. Sprinkle dark-green scallions and citrus zest over.

name: Orange And Yogurt Parfaits With Red Wine Caramel

ingredients.prep: fruity red wine, such as Syrah

instructions: Stir sugar, star anise, cream of tartar, and 3 tablespoons water in a medium saucepan to blend. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat and cook, swirling occasionally (do not stir), until sugar is caramelized and the color of dark maple syrup, about 8 minutes. Remove from heat and carefully add 1/4 cup red wine (mixture will bubble vigorously), stirring to dissolve. Add remaining 1/4 cup red wine. Boil for 30 seconds, stirring to make sure all sugar is dissolved. Let cool completely. DO AHEAD Red wine caramel can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill. Rewarm slightly to loosen before using.
Using a sharp knife, remove all peel and white pith from oranges. Slice into 1/8 inches-1/4 inches rings.

Layer 1-2 orange rings (cut slices in half if large) each in the bottom of small glass jars (clear jars or glasses show off the pretty layers, but you can also use bowls). Drizzle with 1 generous teaspoons red wine caramel; top with a spoonful of yogurt. Sprinkle nuts over. Repeat layering twice more, ending with nuts. Drizzle a bit more caramel over; garnish parfaits with mint leaves. DO AHEAD Parfaits can be made 30 minutes ahead. Cover; chill.

name: Orange Angel Food Cake With Caramel Sauce And Tropical-fruit Compote

ingredients.prep: peeled, quartered lengthwise, then cut crosswise into 1/2-inch slices

instructions: Combine sugar and 1/3 cup water in heavy medium saucepan. Stir over medium-low heat until sugar dissolves. Increase heat to medium-high; boil without stirring until syrup is deep amber, occasionally brushing down sides of pan with wet pastry brush and swirling pan, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat. Carefully add cream (mixture will bubble vigorously). Place pan over low heat; stir until caramel bits dissolve and sauce is smooth. Remove from heat; add butter, cardamom, and pinch of salt; stir until butter melts. Cool. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 week ahead. Cover; chill. Bring to room temperature or rewarm over low heat before using.
Preheat oven to 177°C. Sift powdered sugar, flour, and salt 3 times. Place in medium bowl.

Using electric mixer, beat egg whites in large bowl until foamy. Add cream of tartar; beat until whites are opaque and soft peaks form. Gradually add superfine sugar, beating until whites are thick and shiny and fluffy peaks form (peaks should droop over gently; do not overbeat). Add orange peel and vanilla; beat just until blended. Sift 1/4 of flour mixture over whites. Using large rubber spatula, gently fold flour mixture into whites. Repeat with remaining flour mixture in 3 more additions. Transfer batter to ungreased 10-inch-diameter angel food cake pan with removable bottom and 4-inch-high sides (do not use nonstick pan); smooth top.

Bake cake until golden and springy to touch, about 50 minutes. Immediately invert pan onto work surface if pan has feet, or invert center tube of pan onto neck of bottle or funnel. Cool cake completely.
Gently tap bottom edge of pan on work surface while rotating pan until cake loosens. Transfer to platter. DO AHEAD Can be made 8 hours ahead. Cover with cake dome; let stand at room temperature.

Cut all peel and white pith from oranges. Using small sharp knife and working over bowl to catch juices, cut between membranes to release orange segments into bowl. Squeeze remaining juice from membranes into bowl. If orange segments are large, cut each in half or thirds. Cut passion fruits in half; scoop out pulp and add to orange segments. Add remaining fruits, sugar, mint, and pinch of salt. Toss gently to combine. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Cover and chill.
Slice cake; transfer to plates. Spoon compote alongside; top with caramel.

name: Orange Balsamic Glazed Salmon

ingredients.prep: stalks and core removed, thinly sliced

instructions: Combine 1/4 cup Marie's Balsamic Vinaigrette, pepper, honey, and orange liqueur to make glaze. Zest orange and add to the glaze.
Slice peel off orange, removing all of white pith. Slice oranges into rounds, then into quarters. Reserve.
Preheat the oven's broiler. Cover a broiler pan with nonstick foil. Sprinkle salmon with salt. Broil salmon, brushing often with glaze until cooked, about 8 minutes. Do not turn.
Toss spring mix with asparagus, fennel, and remaining 1/2 cup Marie's Balsamic Vinaigrette. Divide among 4 plates and top with salmon. Garnish salads with orange pieces and Parmesan.

name: Orange Bavaroise
instructions: Raspe a casca e esprema o sumo às laranjas, deite para um tacho, junte metade do açúcar e a essência de baunilha, leve ao lume e deixe ferver durante 10 minutos.
Ponha a gelatina a demolhar em água fria durante 5 minutos e depois escorra. Retire o tacho do lume, junte a gelatina, mexa até ficar bem dissolvida e deixe arrefecer.

Bata as natas em chantilly adicionando o resto do açúcar aos poucos e batendo sempre, junte depois o preparado da laranja e misture delicadamente. Deite para uma forma grande ou várias mais pequenas previamente passadas por água fria e leve ao frio até solidificar. Antes de servir, mergulhe a forma em água quente, desenforme e sirva decorado a gosto.

name: Orange Bitters Martini
instructions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice.
Pour in gin and vermouth, and add a couple shakes of orange bitters.
Strain into a chilled martini glass and garnish with olive.

name: Orange Bread Recipe
instructions: Precalienta tu horno a 179°C.
En un recipiente mezcla los ingredientes secos, la harina, el polvo para hornear y la sal.
En otro recipiente, agrega la mantequilla y mezcla hasta hacerla crema.
Agrega el azúcar y sigue mezclando.
Cuando esté bien integrado, agrega los huevos uno por uno.
A esta mezcla añade la ralladura de naranja y el jugo de naranja. Bate muy bien hasta que los ingredientes estén incorporados para luego añadir la mezcla de la harina y las nueces.
Con una espátula, mueve todos los ingredientes de manera envolvente hasta lograr una masa homogénea.
Vierte la masa en un molde previamente engrasado y enharinado y hornea a 179°C durante 50 minutos.
Golpea un poco la base de la torta contra el mesón para que el aire salga y la masa se esparza bien por todo el molde.
Sabrás que está listo cuando introduzcas un cuchillo en el pan y este salga limpio.
Retira del horno, espera a que enfríe durante 10 minutos y luego desmolda.
Decora con azúcar glass y sirve.

name: Orange Brigadiers

ingredients.item: Açúcar em pó ou óleo para untar
Corante alimentar cor de laranja q.b.
Bolinhas prateadas e/ou douradas para decorar

instructions: Prepare a massa dos brigadeiros de um dia para o outro, para ser mais fácil moldá-los.

Leve a lume baixo o leite condensado com a raspa de laranja, a farinha maisena peneirada, o sumo e a manteiga. Mexa até o preparado começar a descolar-se do tacho. Retire, deixe arrefecer e leve ao frigorífico ou ao congelador até ficar duro.

Molde pequenas bolas com o preparado anterior e coloque-as num recipiente levemente, polvilhado com açúcar em pó ou untado com óleo. Num prato fundo, deite uma ou duas gotas de corante, até obter a cor laranja desejada. Junte o açúcar extrafino e misture bem.

Passe os brigadeiros pelo açúcar laranja e coloque-os dentro de forminhas de papel plissado. Decore o centro de cada um com uma bolinha prateada e/ou dourada e leve ao frigorífico para secarem um pouco. Sirva-os frios.

name: Orange Broccoli
instructions: 1. Brokolileri küçük çiçekler şeklinde kesip saplarından ayırın.
2.  Kaynar tuzlu suda hafif diri kalacak şekilde haşlayın.
3.  Soğuk sudan geçirip içi yağlanmış fırın kabına dizin.
4.  Unu tavaya alın.
5.  Kısık ateşte karıştırarak kavurun.
6.  Tereyağını ekleyip una yedirin.
7.  Su ve portakal suyunu azar azar ekleyip karıştırın.
8.  Karışım koyulaştığında tuz ve kırmızı pul biberi ekleyin.
9.  Hazırladığınız sosu brokolilerin üzerine gezdirerek ilave edin.
10.  Portakalın kabuğunu soyup üçgen dilimler şeklinde kesin.
11.  Sosun üzerine dizin.
12.  Rendelenmiş kaşar peynirini üzerine serpin.
13.  Önceden ısıtılmış 200 derece fırında peynir eriyip hafifçe kızarana kadar pişirin.
14.  Sıcak servis yapın.

name: Orange Broccoli, Beef, And Mushrooms

ingredients.item: Grated peeled ginger plus 2 1/2-inch piece peeled ginger
Kosher salt plus more for seasoning

instructions: Stir orange juice, soy sauce, and 1 tsp. grated ginger in a small bowl. Set aside.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large slope-sided skillet or a wok over high heat. Place a large plate or platter on work surface near skillet. Stir julienned ginger into oil; add broccoli and cook, tossing to coat, for 1 minute. Stir in 1 tsp. salt and sugar; add 1/4 cup water and cover. Steam, lifting cover and stirring once, until broccoli is bright green and crisp-tender, 2–3 minutes. Transfer broccoli mixture to plate and set aside.

Wipe out skillet, then heat 1 Tbsp. oil in skillet over medium-high heat. Season flank steak with salt and pepper. Cook for 1 1/2 minutes; turn and cook for 1 1/2 minutes longer. Transfer steak to a cutting board. Let rest for 3 minutes. Cut against the grain into 1/4"-thick slices.

Meanwhile, wipe out skillet, then heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in skillet. Add shallot and garlic and cook, stirring often, for 1 minute. Add mushrooms and a pinch of salt; cook, stirring occasionally, for 1–2 minutes. Add reserved broccoli and orange juice mixture; increase heat to high and cook, stirring occasionally, until pan is almost dry, about 1 minute. Add flank steak and remove from heat.
Season with additional soy sauce, if desired, and serve hot with rice.

name: Orange Bundt Cake

ingredients.item: 250 grαλεύρι για όλες τις χρήσεις κοσκινισμένο
Λίγο βούτυρο και αλεύρι για τη φόρμα
250 grαλεύρι για όλες τις χρήσεις κοσκινισμένο
Λίγο βούτυρο και αλεύρι για τη φόρμα

instructions: Όλα τα υλικά πρέπει να είναι σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου.
Αλείφουμε με μαλακό βούτυρο μεγάλη στρογγυλή φόρμα για κέικ 25 εκ.
Πασπαλίζουμε με λίγο αλεύρι και τινάζουμε το περιττό.
Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο στους 160°C στον αέρα. Θα ψήσουμε μεσαία σχάρα.
Κοσκινίζουμε το αλεύρι με το μπέικιν και τα κρατάμε στην άκρη.

name: Orange Cake

ingredients.item: 2½ φλ.αλεύρι που φουσκώνει μόνο του κοσκινισμένο
2½ φλ.αλεύρι που φουσκώνει μόνο του κοσκινισμένο

instructions: Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο στους 170°C, στον αέρα.
Αλείφουμε με μαλακό βούτυρο μια στρογγυλή φόρμα για κέικ . Την πασπαλίζουμε με αλεύρι και τινάζουμε να φύγει η περιττή ποσότητα.

Ανακατεύουμε σε ένα μπολ την ψιλή ζάχαρη με το ξύσμα πορτοκαλιού και τρίβουμε το μείγμα με τα δάχτυλα μέχρι να υγροποιηθεί η ζάχαρη και να γίνει κίτρινη από το ξύσμα – όσο περισσότερο το τρίψουμε τόσο πιο δυνατό άρωμα πορτοκαλιού θα έχει το κέικ.
Ρίχνουμε τα αυγά, ένα ένα, χτυπώντας με το μίξερ χειρός για 4 λεπτά, μέχρι να λιώσει καλά η ζάχαρη, να αφρατέψουν και να φουσκώσουν τα αυγά.
Όταν το μείγμα αποκτήσει πλούσια κρεμώδη υφή, προσθέτουμε το λάδι, το χυμό, τη σόδα και το αλάτι και ανακατεύουμε.
Τέλος, ενσωματώνουμε το κοσκινισμένο αλεύρι ανακατεύοντας απαλά μέχρι να απορροφηθεί τελείως από το αραιό μείγμα.
Αδειάζουμε τη ζύμη μέσα στην έτοιμη φόρμα. Χτυπάμε ελαφρά τη φόρμα στον πάγκο για να φύγει ο εγκλωβισμένος αέρας και να ψηθεί ομοιόμορφα το κέικ.
Ψήνουμε στη μεσαία σχάρα για περίπου 50 λεπτά. Είναι έτοιμο όταν ροδίσει ελαφρά, φουσκώσει και στεγνώσει στο κέντρο.
Προτού το βγάλουμε από το φούρνο, ελέγχουμε πάντα αν ψήθηκε σωστά βυθίζοντας στην καρδιά του τη λάμα ενός μαχαιριού – αν βγει στεγνή από ζύμη, είναι έτοιμο.
Αφήνουμε το κέικ να σταθεί στη φόρμα του για 10-15 λεπτά και μετά το ξεφορμάρουμε σε σχάρα να στεγνώσει.
Ζεσταίνουμε λίγη μαρμελάδα πορτοκάλι για να αραιώσει και αλείφουμε ολόγυρα με αυτήν το κέικ, όσο είναι ακόμη ζεστό, για να γυαλίσει

name: Orange Cake Recipe
instructions: 1. Yumurta ve şekeri beyazlaşana kadar çırpın.
2. Süt, sıvı yağ, portakal suyu ve kabuğunu ekleyin.
3. Un, kabartma tozu ve vanilini eleyerek ekleyin.
4. Kek kalıbını yağlayın, harcı dökün.
5. Önceden ısıtılmış 170°C fırında 40 dakika pişirin.
6. Kürdan testini geçince fırından alın, soğuyunca dilimleyin.

name: Orange Cake Recipe With Almonds
original_name: Receta de bizcocho de naranja con almendras fácil

ingredients.item: 1  sobre de polvo de hornear (10–12 g)

instructions: Precalienta el horno a 180 ºC. Engrasa un molde redondo de 22–24 cm y, si quieres asegurarte un desmoldado limpio, coloca papel en la base.

Lava bien la naranja. Córtala en trozos, retira semillas y tritura con piel incluida. Debe quedar una pasta espesa con pequeños fragmentos, no un puré totalmente líquido. Esa textura ayuda a que el bizcocho quede más aromático.
Bate los huevos con el azúcar hasta que la mezcla pierda el grano y se vuelva más pálida. No necesitas montarlos, solo integrar aire suficiente para que la miga no quede pesada.
Incorpora el aceite y mezcla sin batir en exceso. Añade la naranja triturada y remueve hasta que la masa tome un color uniforme.
Mezcla harina, almendra molida, polvo de hornear y sal. La almendra aporta humedad y grasa natural, así que equilibra bien la textura final.
Añade los secos en dos tandas, mezclando con suavidad. La masa debe quedar densa pero fluida. Si notas que está demasiado espesa según el tamaño de la naranja, ajusta con 1–2 cucharadas de leche.
Vierte la mezcla en el molde y alisa la superficie. Coloca algunas almendras enteras encima; no solo decoran, también se tuestan y aportan contraste.
Hornea entre 45 y 50 minutos. El bizcocho está en su punto cuando la superficie se dora, se forman pequeñas fisuras y un palillo sale con migas húmedas pero sin masa cruda.
Deja reposar 10 minutos antes de desmoldar. Enfría en rejilla y espolvorea con azúcar glas justo al final para que no se humedezca antes de tiempo.

name: Orange Cake Step By Step
original_name: Bizcocho de naranja paso a paso

ingredients.item: ½ taza de jugo exprimido de una naranja

instructions: Precalienta el horno a 180 grados centígrados.
Mezcla en un bowl la mantequilla y el azúcar usando preferiblemente una batidora eléctrica.
Agrega uno a uno los huevos.
Ahora echa la harina de trigo poco a poco y la cucharadita de levadura en polvo.
Para este momento ya tendrás una mezcla básica de bizcocho. Agrégale el jugo de naranja y la ralladura.
Mezcla un par de minutos más y listo.
Engrasa y enharina un molde para bizcochos, redondo, cuadrado, el que se te antoje, pero donde quepa bien la mezcla, tomando en cuenta que va a crecer.
Echa la mezcla en dicho molde y pon a hornear por 35-40 minutos aproximadamente.

Como muchas veces los hornos hacen lo que les da la gana y cocinan a temperaturas diferentes a las que indican, debes estar atento y revisar si tu bizcocho de naranja está listo unos minutos antes del tiempo que te indiqué.

Para verificar esto, simplemente introduce un palito de madera largo, o incluso un cuchillo, en el centro del bizcocho. Si al sacar el palito éste no tiene en su superficie ningún rastro de masa, entonces tu bizcocho está listo.
Apaga el horno y saca el bizcocho. Déjalo reposar a temperatura ambiente.
Cuando se enfríe, sácalo con cuidado del molde.

name: Orange Cake With Almond Flour (keto And Gluten-free Recipe)
original_name: Bizcocho de naranja con harina de almendras (receta keto y sin gluten)

ingredients.item: 1 taza de harina de almendras (120 g)
1 cucharadita de polvo de hornear o levadura en polvo
1/3 taza de aceite de coco (80 g) o aceite de oliva suave (75 g)

instructions: Precalentar el horno a 180ºC y engrasar un molde para bizcocho.
Batir los huevos en un tazón grande hasta que estén espumosos.
Agregar la harina de almendras, la levadura o el polvo de hornear, y el aceite de coco o de oliva suave y mezclar hasta que estén combinados.
Agregar el eritritol y seguir batiendo hasta que la mezcla esté suave y esponjosa.
Añadir la ralladura de naranja y el zumo de naranja fresca y mezclar hasta que estén incorporados.
Verter la mezcla en el molde para bizcocho y llevar al horno durante 25-30 minutos o hasta que un tenedor insertado en el centro del bizcocho salga limpio.
Dejar enfriar el bizcocho en el molde durante 10 minutos antes de desmoldarlo y dejarlo enfriar completamente en una rejilla.
category: Recetas de Meriendas Fáciles, Recetas de Postres Caseros

name: Orange Cake With Oil
instructions: Βάζουμε σε ένα μπολ τη ζάχαρη, το ελαιόλαδο, το κονιάκ, το ξύσμα πορτοκαλιού, την κανέλα, το γαρύφαλλο και το αλάτι.
Τα ανακατεύουμε με ένα κουτάλι.
Διαλύουμε τη σόδα στο χυμό και τα προσθέτουμε.
Τέλος, ανακατεύουμε το αλεύρι ολικής με το μπεικιν πάουντερ και το ρίχνουμε μέσα στα υγρά υλικά.
Ανακατεύουμε με ένα κουτάλι το μείγμα.
Προσθέτουμε τις σταφίδες.
Ισομοιράζουμε σε λαδωμένη ατομική φόρμα για κέικ.
Από την ώρα που αναμειγνύουμε τις διογκωτικές ουσίες (baking powder και σόδα) με υγρό, ξεκινάει η δράση τους.
Γι’ αυτό, το μείγμα πρέπει να μπει άμεσα στο φούρνο, για να ολοκληρωθεί σωστά η διόγκωση.
Ψήνουμε στους 170°C βαθμούς στις αντιστάσεις για 30 λεπτά.
Αν ψήσουμε σε αέρα, στους 160°C βαθμούς για 20 με 25 λεπτά.

name: Orange Cake With Red Fruits
original_name: Bolo de laranja com frutos vermelhos

ingredients.item: 200 g  mistura de frutos vermelhos frescos

instructions: Unte uma forma redonda com buraco com manteiga e polvilhe-a com farinha.
Num liquidificador, coloque a laranja, com casca e partida em pedaços, o açúcar, os ovos e o óleo. Ligue até ficar tudo bem triturado.

Transfira para uma tigela, junte a farinha e mexa até que esta fique bem incorporada e sem grumos. Adicione os frutos vermelhos, envolva. Deite a massa para a forma e leve-a ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, por cerca de 45 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer e desenforme.

name: Orange Cake With Semolina And Almonds

ingredients.prep: scrubbed and coarsely chopped (with the skin)

instructions: Combine chopped oranges and 1 tablespoon water in a small saucepan, cover, and cook over medium-low heat until oranges are soft and excess liquid has evaporated, about 30 minutes. Set aside to cool, about 20 minutes.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line the bottom and sides of an 8-inch springform pan with parchment paper.
Place oranges in the bowl of a food processor; pulse until finely chopped.
Beat egg whites in a glass, metal, or ceramic bowl until stiff peaks form. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar, continuing to beat for 1 more minute.

Beat egg yolks and remaining 1/2 cup sugar in a separate bowl until pale and thick, 2 to 3 minutes. Whisk in finely chopped oranges. Fold in ground almonds, semolina, vanilla extract, and fiori di Sicilia. Stir in 3 spoonfuls of whisked egg white to loosen the batter. Gently fold in remaining egg whites with a spatula or large metal spoon. Pour batter into prepared springform and level the top.

Bake in the preheated oven until cake is golden and a skewer inserted in the center comes out clean, about 50 minutes. Check cake after 20 and 30 minutes to see if it is starting to brown too quickly. Cover top lightly with aluminum foil once cake starts to brown.
Remove from oven and cool in the pan. Remove ring, peel away parchment paper and transfer cake to a serving plate. Drizzle with liqueur and dust with confectioners' sugar.

name: Orange Caramelized Tarte Tatin
instructions: 1. Karamelize işlemi için, toz şeker ve suyu bir sos tenceresine alın.
2.  Şeker eriyip kaynamaya başlayıncaya kadar ısıtın.
3.  Kaynadıktan sonra renginin koyulaşması için 5 dakika daha kaynatıp ocaktan alın.
4.  Karameli 20 cm’lik bir kek kalıbının tabanına iyice yayın.
5.  Karamelin üzerine beyaz kısımlarını temizleyin.
6.  Yuvarlak dilimlediğiniz portakalları yerleştirip file badem serpin.
7.  Milföy hamurlarını birleştirip tart kalıbının boyutlarında açın.
8.  Portakalların üzerini açtığınız milföy hamuruyla kapatın.
9.  Hamurun üzerine çatalla delikler açın.
10.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında milföy hamuru kızarana kadar yaklaşık 35 dakika pişirin.
11.  Ilık olarak servis yapın.

name: Orange Carpaccio With Orange-flower Water And Pistachios
instructions: Arrange orange slices on four plates, overlapping slightly.
Whisk together oil and orange-flower water, if using, in a small bowl. Drizzle oil mixture evenly over oranges; top with pistachios and sea salt, if using.

name: Orange Carrot Ginger Juice
instructions: Place a collection container under the exit spout of a juicer; turn the juicer on. Place orange halves into the feeding chute; insert the food pusher and gently guide orange halves down the chute. Repeat with carrot and ginger. Turn off the juicer.
Pour lemon juice into the collection container and stir to combine. Pour over ice.

name: Orange Carrot Jam
instructions: 1. Havuç, böğürtlen, ceviz, şeftali, gül ve limon ile yapacağınız reçellerle kahvaltı sofralarınızda yeni lezzetler keşfedin.
2.  Havuç ve portakal kabuklarını irice rendeleyip düdüklü tencereye alın.
3.  Portakal suyunu sıkın ve havuçlara ekleyin.
4.  Şeker, su ve limon suyunu da ilave edip düdüklü tencerenin kapağını kapatın.
5.  Yüksek ateşte buhar sesini duyduktan sonra kısık ateşe alarak 10 dakika daha pişirin.
6.  Reçeli kavanoza doldurup soğumaya bırakın.
7.  Servis yapın.

name: Orange Carrot Smoothie
instructions: Put orange juice, yogurt, carrot, banana, mango, orange and ice into a blender.
Blend until smooth and slushy. Add more juice if you prefer a thinner consistency.
Chill if desired and serve.
Enjoy!

name: Orange Celery Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 tatlı kaşığı bal veya pekmez (isteğe bağlı)
Havuç (rendelenmiş; tek başına ya da kerevizle karıştırılabilir)
Mandalina suyu (daha aromatik bir lezzet için)
Greyfurt suyu (biraz daha ekşi bir seçenek)
Taze sıkılmış limon suyu (portakal suyuyla karıştırılarak kullanılabilir)
Ceviz yağı (özellikle salata gibi sunumlarda aroma katar)
Şekersiz elma püresi (tatlılık ve yoğunluk için)

instructions: 1. Kerevizleri soyup, ince ince doğrayın veya rendeleyin.
2. Doğranmış kerevizleri geniş bir kaseye alın, üzerine limon suyunu ekleyerek kararmasını önleyin.
3. Portakalların suyunu sıkın ve kabuklarının ince rendesini hazırlayın.
4. Küçük bir kapta portakal suyu, portakal kabuğu rendesi, zeytinyağı, bal, tuz ve karabiberi iyice karıştırın.
5. Hazırladığınız sosu kerevizlerin üzerine dökün ve iyice karıştırın.
6. Kerevizlerin sosu iyice çekmesi için buzdolabında en az 30 dakika dinlendirin.
7. Servis yaparken üzerine taze maydanoz serpebilirsiniz.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Orange Cheesecake
instructions: Triture as bolachas numa picadora, deite numa tigela, junte a manteiga derretida, misture bem e depois forre uma forma de fundo amovível com este preparado, pressionando com uma colher.

Demolhe as folhas de gelatina em água fria. Numa tigela, bata o queijo creme com o açúcar, depois junte os iogurtes e bata novamente. Escorra e derreta as folhas de gelatina em banho-maria ou no micro-ondas, sem deixar ferver, e incorpore-as no creme, em fio e batendo sempre.
Numa tigela a parte, bata as natas em chantili e envolva-o também na mistura. Retire a raspa e o sumo das laranjas e envolva-os igualmente no creme, reservando um pouco de raspa para o final.
Deite o creme na forma, sobre a bolacha, alise e leve ao frio ate solidificar. Retire, desenforme com cuidado e decore com a raspa de laranja que reservou.

name: Orange Cheesecake, A Delicious Citrus Dessert
original_name: Cheesecake de naranja, un postre cítrico delicioso

ingredients.item: 50 gr de galletas tipo digestive o maría
150 gr  de queso crema a temperatura ambiente
50 gr de yogur natural o griego
15 ml de jugo de naranja recién exprimido

instructions: Tritura las galletas hasta obtener polvo fino y mézclalas con la mantequilla derretida y el azúcar moreno.
Presiona la mezcla en un molde pequeño desmontable (aprox. 10 cm de diámetro) formando la base. Refrigera 15 minutos.
En un bol, bate el queso crema hasta que esté cremoso. Añade el yogur, azúcar, huevo, ralladura y jugo de naranja, y la vainilla hasta integrar completamente.
Vierte la mezcla sobre la base de galleta y hornea a 160°C por 25-30 minutos. El centro debe estar firme pero ligeramente tembloroso.
Deja enfriar a temperatura ambiente y luego refrigera mínimo 2 horas.
Para el glaseado, calienta el jugo de naranja con miel y maicena hasta que espese. Vierte sobre el cheesecake antes de servir.

name: Orange Cheesecakes

ingredients.item: Sumo e raspa de 1 laranja grande

instructions: Ligue o forno a 180ºC. Unte com manteiga 12 forminhas para queijadas e polvilhe-as com farinha. Reserve.
Num tacho, deite a água, o açúcar, o sumo e raspa da laranja. Leve ao lume e deixe ferver até o açúcar ficar completamente dissolvido. Reserve.
Numa tigela, misture o coco com a farinha. De seguida, junte os ovos e as gemas, bata muito bem e envolva no preparado anterior.
Distribua a massa pelas formas e leve ao forno, em banho-maria, durante 30 minutos. Retire do forno, deixe arrefecer e desenforme.

name: Orange Chicken (inspired By Panda Express)
instructions: Combine the egg, white pepper and salt in a mixing bowl. Add the cubed chicken breast, make sure it’s coated with the egg mixture.
In another bowl, combine corn starch and flour. Add the coated chicken to the flour mixture. Stir to coat.
Working in batches, fry the coated chicken until golden and done. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
In a large pan or wok, add oil, garlic, ginger and red chili flakes. Stir fry until fragrant.
Add rice wine and stir for a few seconds. Proceed to add all of the other sauce ingredients, including soy sauce, vinegar, water, sugar and orange zest.
Add the fried chicken. Stir to coat in sauce. Thicken the sauce with the cornstarch slurry.
Garnish with chopped scallions and serve with rice.
Enjoy!

name: Orange Chocolate Cake
instructions: Όλα τα υλικά πρέπει να είναι σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου. Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο στους 170ºC στις αντιστάσεις, θα ψήσουμε στην κάτω σχάρα.
Βουτυρώνουμε και αλευρώνουμε μακρόστενη φόρμα για κέικ 8×22 εκατ.
Κοσκινίζουμε το αλεύρι και στη συνέχεια κοσκινίζουμε το κακάο και τα αφήνουμε στην άκρη.
Σε ένα μπολ βάζουμε το βούτυρο και το χτυπάμε με μίξερ χειρός για 1’ να αφρατέψει.
Προσθέτουμε τη ζάχαρη και χτυπάμε με το μίξερ χειρός για 3-4’ μέχρι να λιώσει η ζάχαρη και να κρεμώσει το βούτυρο.
Ένα – ένα ρίχνουμε τα αυγά.
Κάθε φορά που ρίχνουμε ένα αυγό πρέπει να έχει ενσωματωθεί πλήρως το προηγούμενο.
Τέλος προσθέτουμε το αλεύρι, το αλάτι και χτυπάμε για λίγα δευτερόλεπτα σε χαμηλή ταχύτητα μέχρι να χαθεί το αλεύρι.
Ισομοιράζουμε το μείγμα σε δυο μπολ.

name: Orange Chocolate Cookie Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 tatlı kaşığı (5 g) nişasta (mısır ya da buğday nişastası)
Tereyağı yerine aynı miktarda hindistan cevizi yağı kullanarak daha hafif ve kokulu bir cookie hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Daha ekonomik bir seçenek isterseniz bitkisel margarin kullanabilirsiniz; ancak tereyağı kadar aromatik olmayacaktır.
Yarı yarıya tereyağı + zeytinyağı karışımı da modern tariflerde tercih edilen bir alternatiftir.
Esmer şeker yoksa tamamen toz şekerle yapabilirsiniz, ancak cookie biraz daha kıtır olur.
Daha yumuşak bir kıvam için bal, akçaağaç şurubu veya pekmez ile şekerin bir kısmını değiştirebilirsiniz.
Daha doğal bir tatlandırıcı isteyenler için hindistan cevizi şekeri mükemmel bir alternatiftir.
Portakal yerine limon, mandalina veya greyfurt kabuğu kullanabilirsiniz.
Portakal suyu yerine sadece kabuk aromasıyla da yapabilir veya portakal aromalı özüt ekleyebilirsiniz.
Mısır nişastası yerine buğday nişastası veya pirinç nişastası kullanılabilir.
Nişasta hiç kullanılmazsa iç doku biraz daha kıtır olur.
Unun bir kısmını badem unu ile değiştirerek daha dolgun ve hafif nemli bir texture elde edebilirsiniz.
Glutensiz yapmak isterseniz, glutensiz çok amaçlı un karışımları kullanılabilir.
Tam buğday unu kullanabilirsiniz; fakat cookie daha koyu renk ve daha tok dokulu olur.
Sütlü çikolata yerine bitter çikolata, beyaz çikolata veya portakallı çikolata gibi aromalı türleri tercih edebilirsiniz.
Damla çikolata yerine iri kıyılmış çikolata blokları daha profesyonel bir görünüm sağlar.
Kakao oranı yüksek çikolatalar, portakal aromasıyla daha dengeli bir tat oluşturur.
Karbonat yerine aynı miktarda kabartma tozu kullanılabilir (dokusu biraz daha yumuşar).
Tuz olarak deniz tuzu veya himayala tuzu kullanarak aromayı derinleştirebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Yumuşamış tereyağı, toz şeker ve esmer şekeri derin bir kapta 2–3 dakika çırparak açık renkli, hafif kabaran bir kıvam elde edin.
2.  Cookie’nin iç dokusunu bu aşama belirler.
3. Yumurtayı, portakal kabuğu rendesini ve portakal suyunu ekleyip tekrar çırpın.
4.  Portakal suyu hamurun aromatik olup hafif nemli olmasını sağlar.
5. Un, nişasta, karbonat ve tuzu birlikte eleyin.
6.  Spatula ile hamura yedirin.
7.  Mikser kullanmayın; cookie hamuru fazla çırpılırsa yayılma yapar.
8. Hamura iri kıyım sütlü çikolataları katın.
9.  Hamur hafif yapışkan kıvamda olmalıdır.
10. Hamuru buzdolabında en az 30 dakika, tercihen 1 saat dinlendirin.
11.  Bu adım, hem daha iyi form tutmasını hem de aromaların derinleşmesini sağlar.
12. Fırını 180°C’ye ısıtın.
13. Hamurdan cevizden biraz büyük parçalar alın, tepsiye aralıklı dizin.
14. 12–14 dakika pişirin.
15.  Kenarlar hafif kızarınca çıkarın; ortası yumuşak kalmalı.
16. Fırından çıkınca 10 dakika tepside bekletin ve servis edin.
17.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Orange Cinnamon Cake

ingredients.item: 2-2,5 su bardağı un (un miktarı unun cinsine göre değişiklik gösterebilir)

instructions: 1. Öncelikle şeker ve yumurtaları bembeyaz olana kadar çırpabildiğiniz kadar çırpalım.
2. Akabinde sıvı malzemeleri ekleyip sadece 30 saniye kadar çırpıyoruz.
3. En son bütün kuru malzemeleri un, kabarma tozu ve vanilyayı eleyerek karışıma ekliyoruz ve el çırpıcısı veya spatula ile karışıma yediriyoruz.
4. Daha öncesinde yağlayıp unladığımız kek kalıbımıza döküp 180 derece de pişiriyoruz.
5. Portakallı Tarçınlı Kek Tarifinin Püf Noktaları Nelerdir?Her fırının pişirme süresi farklıdır.
6.  Lütfen ara ara kontrol ediniz.
7. Un Ekledikten sonra eğer mikserle çırpmaya devam ederseniz, undaki gluten açığa çıkacağından kekiniz lastik gibi tabir ettiğimiz kıvamda olur.
8. Kuru malzemeler muhakkak elenerek eklenmeli.
9. Evet şimdi harika bir kek yapmanın tüm püf noktalarını biliyorsunuz :) Hadi herkes mutfağa.

name: Orange Citrus Cheesecake

ingredients.item: Reynolds wrap® heavy duty aluminum foil

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Line the outside of a 9-inch springform pan with a double layer of 18-inch-wide Reynolds Wrap® Heavy Duty Aluminum Foil. Bring edges of the foil up and mold the foil around the sides of the springform pan to form a watertight seal outside of the pan.
Zest 1 teaspoon orange zest from the orange. Juice 1/4 cup orange juice from the orange set both aside.

Combine vanilla wafers, pecans (if using), and 1 tablespoon granulated sugar in a medium bowl. Stir in melted butter. Press the mixture onto the bottom and about 1 1/2 inches up the sides of the prepared springform pan. Place in a roasting pan.

Beat cream cheese, 3/4 cup granulated sugar, flour, and orange zest together in a large bowl using an electric mixer on low speed until combined. Add orange juice and beat until smooth. Beat in eggs and white chocolate.
Pour filling into crust-lined pan. Place roasting pan on the oven rack. Pour enough boiling water into roasting pan to reach halfway up the sides of the springform pan.

Bake 1 hour or until top is just set and edges jiggle slightly when pan is gently shaken. Turn oven off and allow cheesecake to stand in oven for 1 hour (it will continue to set up during standing time in oven).

Remove springform pan from water bath and cool on a wire rack for 15 minutes. Using a small sharp knife, loosen the crust from sides of the springform pan cool for 30 minutes. Remove sides of springform pan cool cheesecake on wire rack for 2 hours.
Cover and chill for at least 4 hours before serving. Top with Cranberry Orange Sauce to serve.

Cranberry Orange Sauce: Combine 1 cup fresh cranberries, coarsely chopped 1/4 cup granulated sugar and 2 tablespoons orange juice in a small saucepan over medium heat. Bring to a simmer and cook, stirring frequently, until the sugar is dissolved and the cranberries start to break down. Remove from heat and cool completely before serving.

name: Orange Cocoa Cake Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağı taze sıkılmış portakal suyu
1 tatlı kaşığı portakal kabuğu rendesi (isteğe bağlı)
Bal veya akçaağaç şurubu (daha doğal tatlandırıcılar)
Tam buğday unu (daha lifli ve besleyici)
Badem unu veya badem tozu (glutensiz ve aroma zengini)
Mandalina suyu (daha tatlı ve hafif aroma)
Portakal aromalı doğal meyve suları (şekersiz olanlar tercih edilmeli)
Sütlü kakao tozu (daha hafif tat için)
Raw cacao nibs (daha doğal ve yoğun aroma için)

instructions: 1. Fırını 175 derece’ye ısıtın.
2. Yumurta ve şekeri mikserle köpürene kadar çırpın.
3. Sıvı yağ ve portakal suyunu ekleyip karıştırmaya devam edin.
4. Un, kakao, kabartma tozu ve vanilini eleyerek karışıma ekleyin.
5.  Spatula ile nazikçe karıştırın.
6. Portakal kabuğu rendesini ekleyin ve hafifçe karıştırın.
7. Hamuru yağlanmış kek kalıbına dökün.
8. Önceden ısıtılmış fırında 40-45 dakika pişirin.
9.  Kürdan testi ile kontrol edin.
10. Kek soğuduktan sonra kalıptan çıkarıp dilimleyin ve üzerini portakal dilimleri ile süsleyerek servis yapın.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Orange Coconut Stars
instructions: Heat oven to 177°C. Cut dough in half; roll out both halves to an even 1/4-inch thickness. Cut out cookies with a 2-inch star cookie cutter; reroll scraps to get 40 cookies. Coat 2 cookie sheets with cooking spray; place cookies on sheets 1 inch apart and bake 1 batch at a time until firm and slightly golden at edges, 4 to 5 minutes. Cool on wire racks. Line baking sheet with foil; spread coconut on foil. Bake, stirring once or twice, until golden, 3 to 4 minutes. Spread coconut on sheet of wax paper; crush with fingers. Whisk sugar, zest and juice in a bowl until combined. Dip 1 side of cookie into orange glaze, then press into coconut; let set on wire racks.

name: Orange Cookies

ingredients.item: 1 φλ.χυμό πορτοκαλιού (ή ½ πορτοκάλι - ½ λεμόνι)
1 φλ.χυμό πορτοκαλιού (ή ½ πορτοκάλι - ½ λεμόνι)

instructions: Φτιάχνουμε πρώτα το κανελόζουμο, βράζοντας 2 ξυλάκια κανέλας σε νερό για 5 λεπτά.
Κρατάμε μισό φλιτζάνι κανελόζουμο και αφήνουμε να κρυώσει.
Βάζουμε το σουσάμι σε τηγάνι σε χαμηλή φωτιά και το καβουρδίζουμε για λίγα λεπτά μέχρι να ροδίσει και το αφήνουμε να κρυώσει.
Κοσκινίζουμε το αλεύρι (1.200 γραμ.) με το μπέικιν πάουντερ.
Χτυπάμε τη ζάχαρη με το λάδι με σύρμα ή στο μίξερ, για 5 λεπτά να ασπρίσει το μείγμα.
Διαλύουμε τη σόδα στο χυμό και τα προσθέτουμε στο ελαιόλαδο.
Προσθέτουμε, το κανελόζουμο, το τσίπουρο και το αλεύρι.
Ρίχνουμε αρχικά το 1 κιλό αλεύρι και το υπόλοιπο λίγο – λίγο , όσο πάρει (περίπου 1.200 γραμ. αλεύρι στο σύνολο).
Τα πλάθουμε και τα βουτάμε στο σουσάμι.
Αραδιάζουμε τα κουλουράκια πορτοκαλιού σε λαμαρίνες και ψήνουμε για 30-35 λεπτά σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 160°C στον αέρα, μέχρι να ροδίσουν ελαφρά.

name: Orange Cookies ( Recipe)
instructions: Misture a farinha com o fermento e o açúcar. Adicione a gema, a manteiga e o sumo de laranja e envolva muito bem.
Molde pequenas bolas com cerca de 3 cm, disponha-as num tabuleiro forrado com papel vegetal e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, até ficarem douradas.

name: Orange Cooler
instructions: In a half-gallon pitcher, combine orange juice concentrate, lemon juice and sugar. Stir in enough water to make 1/2 gallon.

name: Orange Coscorões
instructions: Deite a margarina num tacho, junte a água e a raspa de laranja, leve ao lume, deixe ferver e retire do lume.

Coloque a farinha com o fermento na bancada, misture e abra uma cavidade ao meio. Junte o preparado anterior, aos poucos e amassando sempre muito bem. Adicione depois o ovo e o sumo de laranja e amasse novamente muito bem até que fique uma massa muito bem batida e homogénea. Coloque-a numa tigela, tape com um pano húmido e deixe repousar durante 15 minutos.

Retire pedaços de massa, estenda-os numa bancada polvilhada com farinha até que fiquem muito finos, corte-os em triângulos ou rectângulos e faça-lhes uns cortes, como vê na foto. Leve-os então a fritar em óleo, poucos de cada vez, até ficarem bem douradinhos e estaladiços, retire-os e coloque-os a escorrer sobre papel absorvente. Passe-os de seguida por uma mistura de açúcar e canela e sirva.

name: Orange Coscorões Recipe
instructions: Coloque numa tigela todos os ingredientes indicados, exceto a farinha. Junte depois a farinha e volte a amassar muito bem.
Estenda a massa sobre a bancada polvilhada com farinha e corte em retângulos. Dê 2 ou 3 golpes no centro de cada retângulo.
Leve ao lume uma frigideira com óleo abundante e frite os coscorões de ambos os lados. Retire, escorra sobre papel absorvente e passe por açúcar.

name: Orange Covered Cake
instructions: Unte uma forma com margarina e polvilhe-a com farinha. Ligue o forno a 170 graus.
Lave a laranja, corte-a em pedaços com a casca, elimine as sementes e deite no liquidificador. Junte o açúcar, os ovos e o óleo, ligue e deixe bater até obter uma mistura lisa.
Transfira a massa para uma tigela, adicione a farinha e o fermento e bata bem. Deite na forma e leve ao forno durante 40 minutos. Retire, desenforme, coloque sobre uma grelha e deixe arrefecer.
Entretanto, prepare a cobertura: leve ao lume um tacho com o sumo de laranja e a farinha maisena, mexendo sempre até ferver. Deite sobre o bolo e deixe arrefecer.

Retire a casca fina da laranja (vidrado), corte-a em tiras finas, deite-as para outro tacho, junte o açúcar e 1 colher (sopa) de água e leve ao lume até obter um xarope. Retire o tacho do lume, escorra o vidrado de laranja, espalhe sobre o bolo e sirva.

name: Orange Cream Cake
instructions: 1. Yemek tarifleri arasında portakal severlere harika bir tarif.
2.  Kelepçeli kek kalıbını (23 cm’lik) yağlayın.
3.  Un, kabartma tozu ve puding tozunu bir kaseye eleyin.
4.  Yumurtalar, şeker, tereyağı, portakal kabuğu ve portakal suyunu ekleyip mikserle iyice çırpın.
5.  Karışımı kek kalıbına aktarıp 180 dereceye ayarlı fırında 50 dakika pişirin.
6.  Keki fırından çıkarıp 5 dakika bekletin.
7.  Tel ızgara üzerine alın.
8.  Üzerine pişirme kağıdı ile örtün.
9.  Küçük bir kasede pudra şeker, labne peyniri, tereyağı, portakal suyu ve bir tatlı kaşığı portakal kabuğunu iyice karıştırın.
10.  İyice soğumuş olan kekin üzerini krema ile sıvayın ve 30 dakika buzdolabında soğumaya bırakın.
11.  Üzerini rendelenmiş portakal kabuğu ile süsleyerek servis yapın.

name: Orange Cream Milk - Recipe
original_name: Leite creme de laranja - receita fácil
