instructions: Leve ao lume um tacho com o leite, o sumo de laranja com metade do açúcar, o pau de canela e casca de laranja e deixe ferver. Retire o pau de canela e a casca de laranja e reserve.
Numa tigela, envolva o restante açúcar com as gemas, adicione a farinha e mexa bem. Adicione o leite quente em fio, mexendo sempre, e leve novamente ao lume sempre a mexer até engrossar.
Coloque o preparado em tigelas e leve ao frio durante 2 horas. Coloque açúcar sobre o creme, queime com um maçarico e sirva.

name: Orange Cream Milk Punch
instructions: Place the ice cream and sherbet in a punch bowl.
Pour in the milk and lemon-lime soda.
Stir gently and serve immediately.

name: Orange Creamsicle Candied Pecans
instructions: Preheat oven to 149°C (150 degrees C). Heavily butter a large metal baking sheet.
Beat egg whites and water together in the bowl of a stand mixer until stiff peaks form. Add orange extract and vanilla extract; beat until incorporated, 1 minute.

Mix sugar, cinnamon, salt, and black pepper together in a separate bowl; fold sugar mixture into egg white mixture until just incorporated. Fold in rosemary and tangerine zest until evenly mixed. Add pecans to the sugar-egg white mixture; toss to coat. Spread coated pecans in one layer onto the prepared baking sheet.

Bake in the preheated oven, turning the baking sheet and stirring the pecans with a metal spoon every 8 to 10 minutes, until crispy and golden brown, 30 to 40 minutes. Transfer to a sheet of parchment paper to cool completely.

name: Orange Creamsicle Fluff Salad

ingredients.item: Tub frozen whipped topping (such as cool whip®)

instructions: Stir together pineapple, pudding mix, and orange extract in a medium bowl until well combined. Stir in food coloring until well mixed. Fold in whipped topping and mini marshmallows. Reserve 2 to 3 tablespoons pecans for topping; stir in remaining pecans until incorporated.
Top with reserved pecans and chill for at least 1 hour in the refrigerator.

name: Orange Creamsicle Protein Shake
instructions: Combine orange segments, zest, soy milk, yogurt, ice, protein powder, and vanilla in a blender.
Blend until smooth.

name: Orange Creme Brulee Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 adet portakalın kabuğu (rendelenmiş, beyaz kısmı olmadan)

instructions: 1. Kremayı bir sos tenceresine alın, içine rendelenmiş portakal kabuğunu, vanilyayı ve 40 g şekeri ekleyin.
2.  Orta ateşte kaynama noktasına gelmeden ısıtın.
3.  Daha yoğun aroma için 5 dakika dinlendirin, ardından süzün.
4. Ayrı bir kapta yumurta sarılarını çırpın.
5.  Üzerine yavaş yavaş ılık kremayı ekleyerek karıştırın.
6.  (Kremanın çok sıcak olmamasına dikkat edin, aksi halde yumurta kesilebilir.
7. )Karışımı porsiyonluk ısıya dayanıklı ramekin kaplarına paylaştırın.
8.  Bu kapları derin bir fırın tepsisine yerleştirin.
9.  Tepsiye kapların yarısına gelecek kadar sıcak su ekleyin (benmari yöntemi).
10. 150°C’de önceden ısıtılmış fırında yaklaşık 40–45 dakika pişirin.
11.  Ortası hafif sallanır kıvamda olmalı.
12. Oda sıcaklığında soğuduktan sonra en az 3–4 saat (tercihen 1 gece) buzdolabında bekletin.
13. Servis öncesi her birinin üzerine ince bir tabaka şeker serpin.
14.  Mutfak pürmüzü ile şeker eriyip karamelize olana kadar yakın.
15.  Eğer pürmüz yoksa, fırının üst ızgarasında birkaç dakika yüksek ısıda kızartın ve servis edin.
16.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Orange Crush
instructions: Peel 2 oranges with a vegetable peeler; reserve peels. Juice oranges into a liquid measuring cup to measure ½ cup. Transfer juice to a blender and add ½ cup sugar. Blend until sugar dissolves, about 20 seconds—if you taste it, it should not be gritty.

Return syrup to liquid measuring cup. Express oil from reserved peels into cup and stir to combine. Pour into a resealable jar. Seal and chill until ready to use.
Do ahead: Orange syrup can be made 6 days ahead. Keep chilled. Shake well before using.
Fill a Collins glass with ice. Add 1 oz. chilled club soda.
Combine 1 tsp. acid phosphate, 1 oz. Orange Syrup, and 2 dashes orange bitters, if using, in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice, cover, and shake just until lightly chilled, about 5 seconds.
Strain into prepared glass. Top off with more club soda. Garnish with orange twist.

name: Orange Crush! Fresh Squeezed Orange And Vodka Cocktail
instructions: Fill a pint glass with ice cubes. Pour in orange-flavored vodka, triple sec, and orange juice, then top with lemon-lime soda.
Mix well and garnish with orange slice.

name: Orange Cumin Vinaigrette
instructions: Place olive oil, rice wine vinegar, orange zest, orange juice, Dijon mustard, cumin, and red pepper flakes into a jar with a screw top; season with salt and black pepper.
Cover jar; shake vigorously to form a temporary emulsion, about 2 minutes.

name: Orange Date Pinwheel Cookies
instructions: In a medium saucepan, over medium heat, combine the dates, 1/4 cup sugar, a pinch of salt, orange juice and water. Cook, stirring frequently until the dates have softened. Remove from heat and stir in 1 teaspoon orange zest and pecans. When mixture has cooled, process in a food processor or blender until pecans are finely ground. Set aside.

Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda and 3/4 teaspoon salt; set aside. In a large bowl, cream together the butter, 1/2 cup white sugar and brown sugar until smooth. Beat in the eggs one at a time then stir in the vanilla and 2 teaspoons orange zest. Gradually mix in the dry ingredients to form a smooth dough. Divide dough into thirds, wrap in plastic, and refrigerate until firm.

Roll each third of the dough out into a rectangle 1/4 inch in thickness. Spread 1/3 of the filling over each rectangle leaving a 1 inch strip of dough uncovered on one of the long sides. Starting at the edge opposite of the uncovered strip, roll the dough up jellyroll style and press lightly to seal. Wrap the rolls in waxed paper and refrigerate until firm.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease cookie sheets. slice chilled rolls of dough into coins about 1/4 inch thick. Place slices 2 inches apart onto the prepared cookie sheets.
Bake for 12 to 15 minutes in the preheated oven, or until lightly golden. Allow cookies to cool for a few minutes on the cookie sheets before removing to wire racks to cool completely.

name: Orange Dessert With Honey And Mint: Refreshing And
original_name: Postre de naranjas a la miel y menta: refrescante y fácil

ingredients.item: Hojas de menta fresca al gusto

instructions: Pela las naranjas, eliminando toda la piel blanca para evitar el amargor. Corta las naranjas en rodajas finas.
Coloca las rodajas de naranja en una sartén a fuego medio. Añade la miel sobre las naranjas y agrega los 20 ml de ron a la sartén.
Cocina las naranjas ligeramente, durante unos 3-5 minutos.
Cocinar hasta que las naranjas empiecen a ablandarse y la miel se mezcle con el jugo de las naranjas, formando un almíbar.
Retira las naranjas de la sartén y colócalas en un plato de servir. Rocía el jugo de cocción sobre las naranjas. Decora con hojas de menta fresca picada y algunas enteras para decorar. ¡Disfruta!

name: Orange Dream Punch
instructions: Place sherbet and frozen orange juice concentrate in a punch bowl.
Allow to thaw for 10 to 15 minutes.
Stir in ginger ale.

name: Orange Duck, Traditional French Recipe
original_name: Pato a la Naranja, receta francesa tradicional

ingredients.item: 1/2 taza de grand marnier o cointreau
Sal y pimienta negra al gusto
1/2 taza de vinagre de vino blanco
2 cucharadas de grand marnier o cointreau (opcional)

instructions: Lava y seca el pato con cuidado. Asegúrate de eliminar cualquier exceso de grasa. Haz pequeñas incisiones en la piel del pato sin llegar a la carne. Esto ayudará a que la grasa se derrita durante la cocción y la piel se vuelva más crujiente. Sazona el pato con sal y pimienta, tanto por fuera como por dentro.

En un tazón grande, combina el jugo y la ralladura de 2 naranjas, el Grand Marnier o Cointreau, el azúcar morena, la sal y la pimienta. Mezcla bien para crear el marinado. Coloca el pato en una fuente lo suficientemente grande como para contenerlo y vierte el marinado sobre él. Asegúrate de que el pato esté bien cubierto por el marinado. Cubre la fuente con papel film y refrigera durante al menos 4 horas o, idealmente, durante toda la noche. Da vuelta el pato ocasionalmente para asegurarte de que esté marinado de manera uniforme.

Precalienta el horno a 180°C. Retira el pato del marinado y escúrrelo, reservando el marinado para la salsa. Coloca el pato en una bandeja para horno y sazónalo con sal y pimienta. Hornea el pato durante aproximadamente 2 horas, o hasta que la piel esté dorada y crujiente, y los jugos salgan claros cuando lo pinches en la parte más gruesa del muslo. Gira el pato ocasionalmente durante la cocción para asegurarte de que se cocine de manera uniforme.

Mientras el pato se está cocinando, puedes preparar la salsa de naranja. En una cacerola, combina el jugo y la ralladura de las naranjas, el azúcar y el vinagre. Lleva la mezcla a ebullición y luego reduce el fuego a bajo y cocina a fuego lento hasta que la salsa se reduzca y espese, aproximadamente 15-20 minutos. Añade el caldo de pollo y el licor (si lo deseas) a la salsa y cocina durante otros 5 minutos. Ajusta la sazón con sal y pimienta según tu preferencia.
Una vez que el pato esté cocinado, retíralo del horno y déjalo reposar durante unos 10 minutos antes de cortarlo. Corta el pato en porciones y sírvelo con la salsa de naranja por encima.

name: Orange Fish In Parchment

ingredients.item: Indian green chile or serrano chile
Cooked white rice and lime wedges

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 450°. Mix garlic, chile, ginger, oil, and turmeric in a small bowl to make a paste. Place fish on a paper towel and pat dry. Season all over with salt. Using half of the paste, coat 1 side of each fillet. Place a 2-foot sheet of parchment paper on work surface. Arrange fillets, paste side down, on half of parchment; coat top sides with remaining paste, making sure to evenly cover the entire surface. Top fillets with finely chopped clementine peel and fold other half of parchment up and over fish. Fold each open side over three times to seal parchment and make a pouch. Chill 30 minutes.

Transfer pouch to a rimmed baking sheet and bake 10–12 minutes. Turn off oven and let fish sit in oven 1 minute longer—the pouch should have puffed up at this point. Remove from oven, let pouch cool 1 minute, then open (be careful of the hot steam inside!).
Transfer fillets to plates and spoon juices from pouch over. Serve with rice and lime wedges for squeezing over.

name: Orange Flan Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 taza de jugo de naranja natural ((colado para evitar pulpa))

instructions: En una sartén a fuego medio, combina el azúcar y el agua. Cocina sin revolver hasta que tome un color ámbar dorado.
Vierte el caramelo caliente en un molde para flan, inclinándolo para cubrir uniformemente el fondo. Deja enfriar.
En un tazón grande, bate los huevos hasta que estén bien mezclados.
Añade la leche condensada, la leche entera, el jugo de naranja, la ralladura de naranja y la vainilla. Mezcla hasta obtener una preparación homogénea.
Cuela la mezcla para garantizar una textura suave y viértela sobre el caramelo en el molde.
Precalienta el horno a 175 °C (177°C).
Coloca el molde en una bandeja profunda y llénala con agua caliente hasta cubrir la mitad de la altura del molde.
Hornea durante 50-60 minutos o hasta que al insertar un palillo, este salga limpio.
Retira el flan del horno y deja enfriar a temperatura ambiente.
Refrigera al menos 4 horas o preferentemente toda la noche.
Para desmoldar, pasa un cuchillo por los bordes y voltea el flan sobre un plato grande.

name: Orange Gelatin
instructions: In a medium bowl, soak gelatin in cold water for 5 minutes. Add boiling water, stirring until gelatin dissolves.
To 3 tablespoons of the orange juice add the orange and lemon zest; set aside for 5 minutes.
Strain the zest out of the orange juice and discard the zest. To the gelatin add all of the orange juice, sugar, lemon juice and salt. Stir until well blended and set aside to cool.
Pour cooled mixture into a 4-cup mold which has been rinsed in cold water. Cover and refrigerate to congeal.

name: Orange Glaze And Potato Cake
instructions: 1. Fırını 180 dereceye ayarlayın.
2.  Kek kalıbını yağlayın.
3.  Tereyağı, esmer şeker, tuz, muskat ve vanilyayı geniş bir kapta mikserle krema kıvamına gelinceye kadar çırpın.
4.  Yumurtayı ekleyin.
5.  Çatalla ezilmiş patates ve yoğurdu ilave edip iyice karıştırın.
6.  Un ve kabartma tozunu ayrı bir yerde harmanlayıp eleyerek hamura ekleyip iyice karıştırın.
7.  Karışımı kek kalıbına aktarın ve 35 dakika pişirin.
8.  Fırından çıkarınca ızgara teli üzerinde soğumaya bırakın.
9.  Şeker ve portakal suyunu karıştırıp soğuyan kekin üzerine dökün.
10.  Nane yaprağıyla süsleyerek servis yapın.

name: Orange Glazed Ham
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Place ham on its side in a roasting pan. Mix marmalade and spices in a small bowl until well blended. Brush 1/2 of the marmalade mixture over ham, gently separating slices so mixture can reach middle of ham. Cover loosely with foil.
Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour, basting occasionally with pan drippings. Remove foil. Brush with remaining marmalade mixture. Bake 45 minutes longer. Serve ham with pan drippings.

name: Orange Honey Chicken Recipe
instructions: 1. Tavuğu yıkayıp kâğıt havlu ile iyice kurulayın.
2. Bir kapta portakal suyu, bal, zeytinyağı, sarımsak, tuz ve baharatları karıştırarak sosu hazırlayın.
3. Hazırladığınız sosu tavuğun her yerine, özellikle derisinin altına gelecek şekilde iyice sürün.
4. Tavuğun içine portakal, soğan ve taze otları yerleştirin.
5. Tavuğu fırın tepsisine alın, etrafına portakal dilimlerini dizin ve tepsiye yarım çay bardağı su ekleyin.
6. Önceden 180°C’ye ısıtılmış fırında yaklaşık 1 saat 20 dakika, üzeri güzelce kızarana kadar pişirin.
7. Pişirme sırasında tavuğun kurumaması için ara ara kendi suyundan üzerine gezdirin ve servis edin.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Orange Iced Tea
instructions: Place tea bags and sugar in a large heatproof pitcher or measuring glass and pour 7 cups boiling water over; stir to dissolve sugar. Let steep 15 minutes.
Remove tea bags and stir in orange-flower water, half of orange slices, and 4 mint sprigs. Chill 4–8 hours.
Strain tea into ice-filled glasses and garnish drinks with remaining orange slices and more mint sprigs.

name: Orange Jellie

ingredients.item: 3 su bardağı taze sıkılmış portakal suyu

instructions: 1. Portakal suyu, şeker ve suda çözülmüş nişastayı ekleyip orta ateşte koyulaşıncaya kadar pişirin.
2.  İçine portakal kabuğu rendesini ekleyip 2 dakika daha pişirip ocaktan alın ve karışımı kaselere paylaştırın.
3.  Buzdolabında birkaç saat bekletin.
4.  Üzerini süsleyerek servis yapın.

name: Orange Juicy Celery Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağı taze sıkılmış portakal suyu
Kereviz miktarını azaltıp içine patates ekleyerek daha yumuşak ve doyurucu bir zeytinyağlı elde edebilirsiniz.
Havuç yerine pırasa veya kabak ekleyerek daha hafif bir tat yakalayabilirsiniz.
Kereviz saplarını ince doğrayıp yemeğe ekleyerek aromayı güçlendirebilirsiniz.
Portakal suyu yerine mandalina suyu kullanarak daha yumuşak ve tatlı bir aroma elde edebilirsiniz.
Portakal suyu ile limon suyunu yarı yarıya karıştırarak daha dengeli bir ekşilik yakalayabilirsiniz.
Daha hafif bir lezzet için portakal suyunun bir kısmını sıcak suyla seyreltebilirsiniz.
Zeytinyağı miktarını azaltıp pişirme sonunda üzerine çiğ zeytinyağı gezdirebilirsiniz.
Daha aromatik bir tat için az miktarda portakal kabuğu rendesi ekleyebilirsiniz (beyaz kısmı olmadan).
Şeker yerine az miktarda bal veya elma suyu kullanılabilir.
Karabiber yerine beyaz biber veya çok az yenibahar ekleyerek farklı bir aroma yakalayabilirsiniz.
Defne yaprağı ekleyerek daha derin bir lezzet elde edebilirsiniz (pişirme sonunda çıkarın).
Dereotu yerine taze nane veya maydanoz kullanılabilir.
Serviste üzerine ince çekilmiş ceviz serpiştirerek farklı bir doku kazandırabilirsiniz.
Yemeği portakal dilimleriyle süsleyerek sunumu daha şık hale getirebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Kerevizleri soyun, ortadan ikiye bölün ve dilimleyin.
2.  Kararmamaları için limonlu suya alın.
3. Soğanı yemeklik doğrayın.
4.  Havuçları halka halka kesin.
5. Tencereye zeytinyağını ekleyin, soğanları ilave edin ve hafifçe yumuşayana kadar kavurun.
6. Kerevizleri ve havuçları ekleyin.
7.  Portakal suyunu, sıcak suyu, tuzu ve şekeri ilave edin.
8. Tencerenin kapağını kapatın.
9.  Kısık ateşte kerevizler yumuşayana kadar pişirin.
10. Ocağı kapatın.
11.  Yemeği tenceresinde soğumaya bırakın ve servis edin.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Orange Leek Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 adet büyük boy portakal (suyu sıkılmış – yaklaşık 1 çay bardağı)
Beyaz soğan ve havuçla hazırlanan sade bir zeytinyağlı sebze yemeği
Mandalina suyu (daha tatlı ve aromatik bir sonuç verir)
Kan portakalı suyu (renk ve aroma farkı yaratır)
Kuskus veya bulgur (farklı dokular denemek isteyenler için)
Pirinç kullanmak istemeyenler tamamen çıkarabilir; pırasa kendi suyu ve portakal suyuyla da lezzetli olur.
Hafif aromalı soğuk sıkım ayçiçek yağı
Portakal aromalı zeytinyağı (çok yakışır, aroma yükselir)
Esmer şeker (daha karamelsi bir tat verir)
1 küçük dal tarçın (portakala çok yakışır, hafif aroma verir)
Birkaç damla limon suyu (ekşiliği dengelemek için)
Patates yerine küçük küp balkabağı (tatlı aromayı destekler)

instructions: 1. Pırasaları temizleyip yaklaşık 3 cm uzunluğunda verev şekilde doğrayın.
2. Geniş bir tencerede zeytinyağını ısıtın, havuçları ekleyip biraz soteleyin.
3. Pırasaları ekleyip 3–4 dakika karıştırarak kavurun.
4. Pirinci ekleyin.
5.  Ardından portakal suyu, limon suyu, su, tuz ve şekeri tencereye ilave edin.
6. Tencerenin kapağını kapatıp kısık ateşte pırasalar yumuşayana kadar, yaklaşık 30 dakika pişirin.
7. Soğuduktan sonra servis tabağına alın, üzerine biraz zeytinyağı gezdirin.

name: Orange Liqueur
instructions: Πλένουμε πρώτα καλά τα πορτοκάλια και τα σκουπίζουμε.
Ξύνουμε τη φλούδα τους και κρατάμε το ξύσμα.
Με κοφτερό μαχαίρι αφαιρούμε τις φλούδες γύρω γύρω, βγάζοντας συγχρόνως και το λευκό μέρος με τις μεμβράνες.
Θέλουμε δηλαδή γυμνό το πορτοκάλι, να φαίνεται γύρω γύρω το εσωτερικό του (όπως όταν κάνουμε φιλέτα πορτοκαλιού).
Σε μικρή κατσαρόλα ρίχνουμε το ξύσμα των πορτοκαλιών.
Το καλύπτουμε με νερό και από την ώρα που θα πάρει βράση μετράμε μέχρι το 30.
Το σουρώνουμε. Πετάμε το νερό και κρατάμε το ζεματισμένο ξύσμα, θα χρησιμοποιήσουμε 1 κ.σ. από αυτό.
Βάζουμε το νερό με τη ζάχαρη σε κατσαρόλα και ανακατεύουμε σε μέτρια φωτιά μέχρι να λιώσει.
Μόλις λιώσει η ζάχαρη προσθέτουμε τα πορτοκάλια και σιγοβράζουμε για 3΄ από την ώρα που θα πάρει βράση.
Με τρυπητή κουτάλα αφαιρούμε τα πορτοκάλια και σιγοβράζουμε το σιρόπι για 6΄-7΄ ακόμη (πάντα σε μέτρια φωτιά).
Το αφήνουμε να κρυώσει.
Προσθέτουμε μέσα στο σιρόπι το ξύσμα και ανακατεύουμε.
Ισομοιράζουμε τα πορτοκάλια μας μέσα στα αποστειρωμένα βάζα.
Προσθέτουμε στο σιρόπι το κονιάκ, ανακατεύουμε και περιχύνουμε τα πορτοκάλια μέσα στα βάζα.
Τα πορτοκάλια πρέπει να καλυφθούν πλήρως μέχρι επάνω.
Αν χρειαστεί, λοιπόν, προσθέτουμε λίγο επιπλέον κονιάκ προκειμένου να τα καλύψουμε.
Σφραγίζουμε τα βάζα αεροστεγώς και τα αφήνουμε σε σκιερό και δροσερό μέρος για 2 μήνες, να ωριμάσουν.
Από την ώρα που θα ανοίξουμε τα βάζα, διατηρούμε τα πορτοκάλια στο ψυγείο για 4 μήνες.
Αφού τα καταναλώσουμε, απολαμβάνουμε το απίθανο λικέρ τους, γιατί προκειμένου να διατηρηθούν πρέπει να είναι σκεπασμένα με αυτό.
Τα σερβίρουμε σε ποτήρια με χτυπημένη κρέμα.
Μπορούμε επίσης, όμως, να τα ψιλοκόψουμε σε φρουτοσαλάτα περιχύνοντάς τη με το λικέρ τους ή να τα σερβίρουμε μαζί με αποξηραμένα δαμάσκηνα ποσαρισμένα σε κρασί.
Χρόνος ωρίμανσης: 2 μήνες

name: Orange Margarita
instructions: Chill 2 martini glasses. Pour about 1 tablespoon coarse salt onto a shallow dish. Cut a slit into one of the orange wedges and rub along the rim of the chilled glasses to moisten. Roll edges of glasses in the salt to create a salt-rim and place glasses in the freezer while mixing the margaritas.

Pour orange juice, tequila, and orange liqueur into a cocktail shaker and shake well. Add a bit of crushed ice into the chilled martini glasses and pour margaritas into the glasses. Garnish with orange wedges and serve.

name: Orange Marmalade

ingredients.item: Seville oranges or other sour oranges (2 lb./1 kg total weight)

instructions: Squeeze the juice and seeds from 6 Seville or other sour oranges, halved and 1 navel orange, preferably organic, halved into a mesh strainer set over a small bowl. After all the oranges have been squeezed, place seeds on a piece of cheesecloth, gather up the sides, and tie securely. Cut each rind in half and then slice as thinly as possible.

Put the orange slices in a large pot or a Dutch oven. Add the reserved orange juice and bag of seeds, a pinch of kosher or canning salt, and 10 cups water. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, then decrease the heat to medium-low and simmer for 20 minutes. Remove from the heat, cover, and let stand overnight at room temperature.

The next day, stir in 8 cups (1.6 kg) sugar and set the pot over high heat. Bring the mixture to a boil, then decrease the heat to medium-low to maintain a gentle simmer. Cook, stirring occasionally to make sure the mixture is not burning on the bottom, until the marmalade reaches the jelling point (104°C on an instant-read or candy thermometer; or use the wrinkle test to judge when it’s done by spooning a drop of the marmalade onto a small plate that’s been chilled in the freezer and pushing it with your finger—if the marmalade wrinkles, it’s ready, if it’s still syrupy, keep boiling). If white scum occasionally rises to the top, skim it off with a large spoon.

Stir in 2 Tbsp. (30 ml) cognac or whiskey (if using) and, using a pair of tongs, remove the bag of seeds, squeezing with the tongs to extract as much marmalade from it as possible. Ladle the hot marmalade into clean jars. Wipe rims clean with a damp cloth, cover tightly, let cool, and refrigerate.
Do Ahead: Marmalade can be made 6 months in advance and stored in the refrigerator. After opening, consume within 1 month.
Editor’s note: This marmalade recipe was first printed online in December 2011.

name: Orange Mascarpone Dip
instructions: Mix mascarpone, sugar, Grand Marnier, orange zest, and vanilla in a small bowl. Serve with strawberries and pistachios.

name: Orange Milk Cream
instructions: Junte as gemas com o açúcar e envolva. Dissolva a farinha maisena num pouco do leite e reserve.
Leve ao lume um tacho com o restante leite e a casca de laranja. Quando levantar fervura, retire do lume e adicione, aos poucos, ao preparado das gemas, envolvendo energicamente.
Acrescente o leite com a farinha maisena, coloque tudo novamente num tacho e leve ao lume a engrossar. Deite numa travessa, polvilhe com açúcar e queime com um maçarico de cozinha.

name: Orange Mint Julep

ingredients.prep: removed in strips with a vegetable peeler

instructions: Bring zest, sugar, and ½ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan, stirring until sugar is dissolved. Let cool; cover and chill at least 2 hours. Strain syrup into a small jar or bowl.

For each cocktail, muddle 1 piece of orange, a small handful mint sprigs, 1 oz. orange syrup, and a few dashes orange bitters in a double Old Fashioned glass or a julep cup. Add 2 oz. bourbon and stir to combine. Fill glass with crushed ice and garnish with more mint.

name: Orange Mousse
instructions: 1. Portakal suyu ve rendelenmiş portakal kabuğunu bir kapta kaynatmadan ısıtın.
2.  Yumurta sarılarını toz şekerle bir kâsede köpük köpük oluncaya kadar çırpın.
3.  Sıcak portakal suyunu azar azar yedirerek ilave edin.
4.  Karışımı bir tencereye alıp sürekli karıştırarak pişirin.
5.  Tencereyi ateşten alıp yaprak jelatini ilave edin.
6.  Eriyinceye kadar karıştırıp soğumaya bırakın.
7. Süt kremasını çırpıp soğuk karışıma yedirerek ekleyin.
8.  Hazırladığınız karışımı derin bir kalıba döküp buzdolabında katılaşıncaya kadar 3 saat bekletin.
9. Sekiz kaşık suyu 1 bardak toz şekerle kaynatın.
10.  Koyu bir şurup kıvamına gelince ateşten alın.
11.  2 portakalın kabuklarını soyup zarlarını çıkarın.
12.  Dilimleri sıcak şuruba atıp 5 dakika bekletin.
13.  Kevgirle ayrı bir tabağa alın.
14. Musu servis tabağına ters çevirin ve etrafını şurupta beklettiğiniz portakal dilimleriyle süsleyin.
15.  Hindistan cevizi serpip soğuk olarak servis yapın.

name: Orange Mousse ( Recipe)

ingredients.item: Gomos de laranja sem pele e folhinhas de manjericão para decorar

instructions: Demolhe as folhas de gelatina em água fria, durante alguns minutos. Lave muito bem as laranjas, retire-lhes os caroços e corte-as em pedaços. Deite num recipiente e triture-as muito bem com a varinha mágica. Junte o leite condensado e misture.
Escorra as folhas de gelatina e derreta-as no micro-ondas ou em banho-maria, sem deixar ferver. Junte ao preparado anterior, envolvendo muito bem.

À parte, bata as natas até ficarem cremosas e depois envolva-as, cuidadosamente, no preparado de laranja. Leve ao frigorífico por cerca de 3 horas. Sirva a mousse decorada com gomos de laranja sem pele e folhinhas de manjericão.

name: Orange Muffins
instructions: Separe as gemas das claras. Numa taça, bata as claras em castelo e reserve.

Noutra taça, bata as gemas com o açúcar, até obter um creme fofo. Junte a farinha, o fermento, o óleo e o sumo de laranja e continue a bater. Depois acrescente, cuidadosamente, as claras e envolva bem.
Unte formas de queques com manteiga e polvilhe com farinha e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, durante 15 minutos ou até que fiquem cozidos. Retire do forno, desenforme e deixe arrefecer.
Prepare a calda: fatie finamente as cascas da laranja. Leve um tacho ao lume com os ingredientes da calda e deixe ferver durante 5 minutos. Regue com a calda e sirva.

name: Orange Oatmeal Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper.

Beat butter, white sugar, and brown sugar with an electric mixer in a large bowl until smooth. Stir egg white and applesauce into butter mixture until just combined into a dough. Add orange juice with pulp and orange zest to the dough; stir.
Mix flour, oats, walnuts, baking soda, cream of tartar, and cinnamon in a separate bowl; fold into the dough until evenly incorporated.
Drop by heaping tablespoon onto prepared baking sheets.
Bake in preheated oven until bottom of cookies are lightly browned, 10 to 12 minutes. Cool on baking sheets 2 to 3 minutes before moving to wire racks to cool completely.

name: Orange Panacotta
instructions: Leve um tacho ao lume com as natas e com metade do açúcar e deixe ferver, mexendo. Retire, adicione as folhas de gelatina, previamente demolhadas em água fria e escorridas, e mexa bem.
Verta o preparado em formas individuais (10 cm de diâmetro) e leve ao frigorífico, durante 4 a 6 horas.
Descasque e corte as laranjas em cubos, coloque-as num tacho com o restante açúcar e leve a lume brando, durante 10 a 15 minutos. Adicione folhas de manjericão laminadas, mexa e retire.
Desenforme as panacotas e disponha o doce de laranja por cima. Decore com folhas de manjericão e sirva fresco.

name: Orange Peach Oat Smoothie
instructions: Place milk, ice, peaches, yogurt, oats, orange juice, lemon juice, and honey in a blender; blend until smooth.

name: Orange Peel Chai

ingredients.item: Cinnamon sticks or 1 tbsp. burlap & barrel cinnamon verum shavings
. loose black or green tea or 2 tea bags

instructions: Remove peels from clementines, trying to leave as much white pith behind as possible; set clementines aside for another use (or snacking!). Bring 3 cups water to a boil in a small saucepan. Add clementine peels, cinnamon sticks, cardamom, and ginger and cook 3 minutes. Remove pan from heat and let sit 5 minutes.
Set mixture over high heat and return to a boil. Remove from heat and stir in tea. Let sit 2 minutes.
Strain chai through a fine-mesh sieve into 2 glasses, dividing evenly. Squeeze in lemon juice and add honey to taste.

name: Orange Peel Jam
instructions: 1. Portakal kabuklarını yaklaşık 2.
2. 5-3 parmak kalınlığında soyun ve sıkıca rulo yaparak açılmaması için kürdan ile tutturun.
3.  Portakal kabuklarını büyük ve derin bir tencereye alın.
4.  Üzerini geçecek kadar su ile doldurarak kaynatın ve suyunu dökün.
5.  Acılığının gitmesi için bu işlemi 4 kez tekrarlayın.
6.  Son olarak yumuşayıncaya kadar haşlayın.
7.  Ayrı bir tencerede 400 ml su ile şekeri kaynatın.
8.  Portakal kabuklarını ekleyerek 15-20 dakika pişirin.
9.  Limon suyunu ekleyip 5 dakika daha kaynatın ve ocaktan alarak soğumaya bırakın.
10.  Kürdanları çıkarttıktan sonra kavanoza doldurun.
11.  Servis yapın.
12. Dilerseniz, klasik portakal reçeli tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

name: Orange Peel Jam Recipe
instructions: 1. Portakal kabuklarını soyup ince uzun şeritler halinde kesin.
2. 1 gün suda bekletin, suyunu birkaç kez değiştirin (acı tadı atması için).
3. Ertesi gün 5 dakika haşlayıp süzün.
4. Şeker ve suyu tencereye alıp kaynatın.
5. Kabukları ekleyin, kısık ateşte 40–45 dakika pişirin.
6. Limon suyunu ekleyip 5 dakika daha kaynatın.
7. Sıcakken kavanoza doldurun.

name: Orange Peel Sweet Spoon
instructions: Επιλέγουμε πορτοκάλια μεγάλα χοντρόφλουδα χωρίς χτυπήματα με σφιχτή φλούδα και σάρκα.
Πλένουμε τα πορτοκάλια και τα στεγνώνουμε.
Με πολύ ψιλό τρίφτη αφαιρούμε ελαφρά το ξύσμα πορτοκαλιού επιφανειακά.
Με κοφτερό μαχαίρι αφαιρούμε οριζόντια μία μικρή φέτα και από τις δύο πλευρές του φρούτου το πάνω και το κάτω μέρος.
Χαράζουμε κατά μήκος στα τέσσερα και αφαιρούμε τις φλούδες με πολλή προσοχή για να μην σπάσουν. Στο τέλος θα έχουμε 32 φλούδες από πορτοκάλι.
Τυλίγουμε κάθε φλούδα πορτοκαλιού σε σφιχτό ρολό, στερεώνουμε με οδοντογλυφίδα ή εναλλακτικά περνάμε χοντρή κλωστή με χοντρή βελόνα και φτιάχνουμε ένα κολιέ-αρμαθιά από φλούδα πορτοκάλι.
Βάζουμε μεγάλη κατσαρόλα με νερό να πάρει βράση.
Στο βραστό νερό που συνεχίζει και βράζει, βουτάμε τις φλούδες πορτοκαλιού για 4-5 λεπτά να βράσουν.
Βγάζουμε τις φλούδες πορτοκαλιού και τις βάζουμε σε σουρωτήρι.
Αλλάζουμε το νερό και επαναλαμβάνουμε την ίδια διαδικασία για να βράσουμε τις φλούδες πορτοκαλιού για 2-3 λεπτά αυτή τη φορά.
Επαναλαμβάνουμε ακόμη μία φορά.
Αφού ζεματίσουμε για τρίτη φορά τις φλούδες πορτοκαλιού τις βγάζουμε από το καυτό νερό και τις βάζουμε σε μεγάλο μπολ με κρύο νερό.
Αφήνουμε τις φλούδες πορτοκαλιού για 12 ώρες μέσα στο κρύο νερό. Ενδιάμεσα σε αυτό το διάστημα αλλάζουμε 3-4 φορές το νερό.
Μετά από 12 ώρες βγάζουμε τις φλούδες από το νερό και τις βάζουμε πάνω σε καθαρή απορροφητική πετσέτα.
Αφαιρούμε τα στηρίγματα και ταμπονάρουμε καλά να τραβήξει η πετσέτα όσο περισσότερο νερό γίνεται.
Τώρα οι φλούδες πορτοκαλιού έχουν πάρει το σχήμα ρολού και θα το κρατήσουν καθ’ όλη τη διάρκεια του βρασμού.
Βάζουμε κατσαρόλα με χοντρή βάση στη φωτιά (χρειαζόμαστε μεγάλη κατσαρόλα φαρδιά).
Ρίχνουμε τη ζάχαρη στην κατσαρόλα μαζί με το νερό και ανακατεύουμε.
Αφήνουμε να πάρει βράση το σιρόπι και βράζουμε για 5 με 6 λεπτά.
Τότε, προσθέτουμε μέσα τις φλούδες καρουλάκια πορτοκαλιού.
Σιγοβράζουμε για 30 λεπτά το γλυκό φλούδα πορτοκάλι και το αφήνουμε μέσα στην κατσαρόλα μέχρι να κρυώσει τελείως.
Αφού κρυώσει τελείως το γλυκό του κουταλιού, πρέπει να το ξαναβάλουμε στη φωτιά να ξαναπάρει μία βράση και να δέσει σωστά το σιρόπι, για λίγα λεπτά.
Τότε, προσθέτουμε το χυμό λεμονιού και αφήνουμε για 1-2 λεπτά να βράσει.
Το γλυκό πορτοκάλι φλούδα  πρέπει να κρυώσει μέσα στην κατσαρόλα. Χωρίς καπάκι, αφήνουμε την κατσαρόλα σκεπασμένη απλά με μία πετσέτα, μέχρι να κρυώσει τελείως το γλυκό κουταλιού και το σιρόπι.
Έχουμε έτοιμα αποστειρωμένα βάζα και καπάκια και ισομοιράζουμε το κρύο πλέον γλυκό στα αποστειρωμένα βάζα.

name: Orange Pie
instructions: Όλα τα υλικά πρέπει να είναι σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου.
Πρώτα θα φτιάξουμε το σιρόπι ώστε να κρυώσει μέχρι να ψηθεί.
Βάζουμε τη ζάχαρη, το νερό και την κανέλα σε κατσαρόλα και από την ώρα που θα πάρει βράση, βράζουμε για 4 λεπτά.
Από την ώρα που παίρνει βράση, δεν ανακατεύουμε.
Αφού βράσει, προσθέτουμε το χυμό, το ξύσμα από τα πορτοκάλια και τη μαρμελάδα, ανακατεύουμε και αφήνουμε να κρυώσει τελείως.

name: Orange Pie Recipe
instructions: Numa tigela, bata, com a ajuda de uma vara de arames, todos os ingredientes indicados.
Deite a massa num tabuleiro forrado com papel vegetal e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, durante cerca de 20 minutos.
Após o tempo indicado, retire do forno e desenforme, ainda quente, sobre um pano de cozinha polvilhado com açúcar. Enrole com cuidado e sirva.

name: Orange Pie With Foil
instructions: Ανακατεύουμε σε ένα μπολ την κανέλα με τις 2 κ.σ. ζάχαρη.
Αλείφουμε με βούτυρο ένα μακρόστενο ταψί 25×30 εκ.
Ανοίγουμε τη συσκευασία με τα φύλλα κρούστας και τα χωρίζουμε στη μέση.
Βουτυρώνουμε τα μισά φύλλα.
Πασπαλίζουμε κάθε φύλλο με το μείγμα ζάχαρης και κανέλας, το σουρώνουμε «πλισέ» και τοποθετούμε τα φύλλα πλάι-πλάι μέσα στο σκεύος.
Ψήνουμε για περίπου 6–8 λεπτά στους 180°C με αέρα, μέχρι να ροδίσουν ελαφρά.
Τυλίγουμε σε ρολό τα υπόλοιπα φύλλα και τα ψιλοκόβουμε με μαχαίρι σε λεπτές λωρίδες.
Τα χωρίζουμε με τα χέρια και τα αφήνουμε στον πάγκο για περίπου 5 λεπτά, να στεγνώσουν ελαφρά.

name: Orange Pie Without Leaf
instructions: Λαδώνουμε μακρόστενο ταψί 30×20εκ. ή στρογγυλό 30 εκατ.
Πρώτα, θα φτιάξουμε το σιρόπι για να κρυώσει.

name: Orange Polenta Cake With Vanilla-scented Plums And Blackberries And Buttermilk Ice Cream
instructions: Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 177°C. Butter 9x5x3-inch metal loaf pan. Dust pan with flour; tap out excess. Whisk 1 1/4 cups flour, polenta, baking powder, and salt in medium bowl. Using electric mixer, beat sugar, butter, and orange peel in large bowl until fluffy, about 2 minutes. Add eggs 1 at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in vanilla. Add flour mixture in 3 additions alternately with yogurt in 2 additions, beating just until blended after each addition. Spread batter evenly in pan.

Bake cake until golden and tester inserted into center comes out clean, 50 to 55 minutes. Transfer to rack; cool in pan 15 minutes. Run knife around cake edges to loosen. Invert cake onto rack, then invert again on rack (top side up). Cool completely. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Wrap in plastic and store at room temperature.
Cut cake crosswise into 1/2-inch-thick slices; serve with Vanilla-Scented Plums and Blackberries and Buttermilk Ice Cream.

name: Orange Poppy Seed Zucchini Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Coat an 8x12-inch baking pan with cooking spray.
Whisk flour, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, baking powder, cloves, nutmeg, and ginger together in a bowl; set aside.

Beat eggs in a large bowl with an electric mixer until smooth; beat in white sugar and brown sugar until incorporated. Mix in vegetable oil; gradually beat in flour mixture until batter is smooth. Stir in orange zest; fold in zucchini, dried fruit, and poppy seeds. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into center comes out clean, 45 to 55 minutes. Cool in the pan, about 10 minutes.
Mix confectioners' sugar and orange juice together in a small bowl; set glaze aside.
Prick cake all over with a fork; drizzle glaze on top. Cool cake completely before serving, about 30 minutes.

name: Orange Pork Belly
instructions: Season the pork belly with salt, pepper, and paprika. Then, sear the pork belly on high heat in a pot (pressure cooker if available) until golden on each side.
Add the onion, garlic and tarragon and let simmer on medium heat for 5 minutes.
Add the honey, soy sauce, white wine, and orange and juice.
Pressure cook for 50 minutes OR cover the pot with a lid and put in an oven for 90 minutes.
Take the pork out of the braising liquid and add the tablespoon of honey.
Broil on high for 3 minutes.
Blend the pork braising liquid until smooth.
Slice the pork belly and serve with the sauce.

name: Orange Pound Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease and flour a 10-inch fluted tube pan (such as Bundt).
Sift flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda together in a bowl; set aside.

Beat white sugar and butter together in a large bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Beat in eggs one at a time, then beat in vanilla extract and orange zest. Add flour alternately with sour cream in 3 additions, beginning and ending with flour. Beat until smooth. Scrape the sides of the bowl with a rubber spatula. Spread evenly in the prepared pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 1 hour and 15 minutes. Cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes, then unmold the cake onto the wire rack to cool completely.

While the cake is cooling, bring orange juice, sugar, and orange zest to a boil in a small saucepan over medium-high heat. Reduce heat and cook until syrupy, about 15 minutes. Remove from heat and whisk in butter, 1 tablespoon at a time. Drizzle warm syrup over cake slices.

name: Orange Pudding
instructions: 1. Pudingi pişireceğiniz kabı tereyağı ile yağlayıp tabanına yağlı kağıt serin.
2.  Portakal marmeladını kalıbın tabanına sürün.
3.  Tereyağı, portakal kabuğu, şeker ve vanilyayı mikserle krema kıvamına gelene kadar çırpın.
4.  Yumurtaları ekleyip çırpın.
5.  Elenmiş un, tuz ve zencefili ekleyerek karıştırın.
6.  Sütü ilave edin.
7.  Hamuru kalıba doldurun.
8.  Kalıbın ağzına 2 kat yağlı kağıt serip üzerini birkaç kat alüminyum folyo ile sıkıca kapatın.
9.  Kalıbı derin bir tencerenin içine yerleştirip kalıbın yarısına gelecek kadar kaynar su ekleyin ve tencerenin kapağını kapatın.
10.  Orta ateşte 1.
11. 5 saat pişirin (tencerenin içindeki su azaldıkça su ekleyin).
12.  Şurup için, portakal suyu ve şekeri kaynatın.
13.  Soğutup portakal dilimlerini şuruba ekleyin.
14.  Pudingi tencereden çıkardıktan sonra 10 dakika bekletin.
15.  Büyük bir servis tabağına ters çevirerek aktarın.
16.  Şurubu üzerine gezdirip portakal dilimleri ile süsleyin.
17.  Yanında krema ile birlikte sıcak servis yapın.

name: Orange Pudding Recipe

ingredients.item: Miolo de amêndoa ou noz picado para decorar

instructions: Leve ao lume um tacho com a água, o sumo e a raspa da laranja e 400 g do açúcar. Deixe ferver, em lume brando, durante cerca de 5 minutos. Retire e deixe arrefecer.
Leve ao lume outro tacho com o restante açúcar e deixe ferver, até obter um caramelo. Deite numa forma de pudim e espalhe pelo interior.

Misture as gemas com os ovos e bata-os ligeiramente, mas sem deixar fazer espuma. Adicione a calda de laranja, já fria, e envolva. Junte a farinha maisena e mexa até obter um preparado homogéneo e sem grumos.

Deite o preparado anterior na forma caramelizada e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 170ºC, em banho-maria, durante cerca de 50 minutos. Retire do forno e deixe arrefecer completamente, antes de desenformar. Leve ao frio até ao momento de servir. Decore com miolo de amêndoa ou noz picado.

name: Orange Queijadas - And Delicious Recipe
original_name: Queijadas de laranja- Receita Fácil e Deliciosa
instructions: Ligue o forno a 180ºc. Unte pequenas formas com manteiga e polvilhe-as com açúcar. Reserve.
Aqueça o leite com a manteiga. À parte, misture bem o açúcar com a farinha, os ovos, a raspa e o sumo de laranja. Junte o leite quente, envolva e distribua o preparado pelas formas.
Coloque as formas num tabuleiro com água quente e leve-as ao forno durante 35 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer e desenforme.

name: Orange Quince Dessert
instructions: 1. Ayvaları yıkayıp boyuna ikiye kesin.
2.  Kabuklarını yıkayıp çekirdeklerini yatağıyla birlikte çıkarın.
3.  Ayva kabuklarını iri parçalar şeklinde doğrayıp tencerenin tabanına yayın.
4.  4-5 çekirdeği ve karanfilleri kabukların üzerine serpin.
5.  Ayvaları limon suyuyla ovup kabukların üzerine dizin.
6.  Portakalı kabuğuyla birlikte dilimleyin.
7.  Ayvaların arasına dizin.
8.  Tarçını kırıp ilave edin.
9.  Vanilyayı kopmayacak şekilde kesip içindeki taneleri kaşığı ucuyla sıyırıp tencereye ekleyin.
10.  Ayvaların çukur kısımlarını şekerle doldurun.
11.  Tencereye, ayvaların kenarlarından doğru, 1 parmak kadar su ekleyin.
12.  Tencereyi orta ateş üzerine yerleştirip su kaynayana kadar ısıtın.
13.  Ocağı kısıp tencerenin kapağı kapalı olarak pişirmeye devam edin.
14.  Ayvaları bir iki kez ters yüz edip pişirin.
15.  Tencereyi ocaktan alıp ayvaları ılınana kadar bekletin.
16.  Ayvaları ve portakal dilimlerini servis tabağına alın.
17.  Üzerine jölemsi suyundan gezdirin.
18.  Kaymakla birlikte servis yapın.
19. Özel günlerin vazgeçilmezi haline gelen klasik ayva tatlısı tarifine buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

name: Orange Revani Recipe

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı taze sıkılmış portakal suyu

instructions: 1. Şerbet için su ve şekeri tencereye alıp kaynatın.
2.  Kaynadıktan sonra limon suyunu ekleyin, 10 dakika daha kaynatıp soğumaya bırakın.
3. Yumurta ve şekeri köpük köpük olana kadar çırpın.
4. Yoğurt, sıvı yağ, portakal suyu ve portakal kabuğu rendesini ekleyip karıştırın.
5. İrmik, un, kabartma tozu ve vanilini ekleyerek homojen bir karışım elde edin.
6. Yağlanmış fırın kabına karışımı dökün.
7. Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında yaklaşık 30 dakika pişirin.
8. Fırından çıkan sıcak revaniye soğuk şerbeti gezdirin.
9. Şerbetini çekmesi için dinlendirin ve dilimleyerek servis edin.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Orange Revani Recipe In Blender

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı sıvı yağ (100 ml)

instructions: 1. Şerbeti hazırlamak için tencereye toz şeker ve suyu alın, şeker eriyene kadar karıştırın ve kaynamaya bırakın.
2.  Yaklaşık 15 dakika kaynadıktan sonra limon suyunu ilave edin, 5 dakika daha kaynatıp ocaktan alın ve soğumaya bırakın.
3. Hamur için portakalı iyice yıkayın ve kabuğunu soymadan iri parçalar halinde doğrayın.
4.  Doğradığınız portakalları geniş bir kaba aktarın; üzerine toz şeker, sıvı yağ, yumurta ve yoğurdu ekleyin.
5.  Tüm malzemeyi pürüzsüz bir kıvam elde edene kadar blenderdan geçirin.
6. Portakal parçaları tamamen inceldiğinde un, vanilya, kabartma tozu ve irmiği ekleyin, tel çırpıcı yardımıyla harcı homojen hale getirin.
7. Fırın kabını hafifçe yağlayın ve hazırladığınız harcı kaba dökerek yüzeyini düzeltin.
8.  (Yaklaşık 29x29 cm boyutlarında kare bir borcam kullanabilirsiniz.
9. )Önceden ısıtılmış 170°C alt-üst, fansız fırında yaklaşık 40 dakika kontrollü şekilde pişirin.
10.  Üzeri kızardığında tatlıyı fırından çıkarın.
11. Fırından çıkan sıcak revaninin üzerine soğuyan şerbeti eşit şekilde gezdirin.
12.  Şerbeti tamamen çekmesi için tatlıyı birkaç saat dinlendirin.
13. Dinlenen tatlıyı dilimleyin, isteğe göre süsleyerek servis edin.
14.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Orange Rice Pudding
instructions: Deite a água num tacho, junte a manteiga, a pitada de sal, a raspa de laranja e o pau de canela, leve ao lume e deixe começar a ferver. Junte o arroz e deixe cozer, mexendo de vez em quando, até que fique quase sem água.
Adicione depois o leite quente, aos poucos e mexendo de vez em quando, deixando o arroz cozer até ficar macio e bem cremoso. Acrescente o açúcar, mexa e deixe ferver por mais 5 minutos.
Numa tigela, bata as gemas, adicione um pouco do arroz, mexendo até ficar morno. Junte depois ao tacho, mexendo sempre.
Retire do lume, rejeite o pau de canela, deite numa tigela e deixe arrefecer. Na hora de servir, polvilhe com canela em pó.

name: Orange Rice Pudding Recipe

ingredients.item: Glutensiz alternatif olarak kinoa (farklı doku verir)
Limon kabuğu rendesi (ferah ve hafif ekşi tat için)

instructions: 1. Pirinci yıkayıp süzün ve 1 çay bardağı su ile küçük bir tencerede pirinçler yumuşayana kadar haşlayın.
2. Sütü geniş bir tencereye alın, içine haşlanmış pirinci, toz şekeri ve portakal kabuğu rendesini ekleyin.
3.  Orta ateşte sık sık karıştırarak kaynamaya bırakın.
4. Nişastayı az su ile açın ve sütlü karışıma yavaş yavaş ekleyin, topaklanmaması için sürekli karıştırın.
5. Koyulaşıp kıvam alıncaya kadar (yaklaşık 10-15 dakika) pişirin.
6. Ocaktan almadan önce vanilini ekleyin ve karıştırın.
7. Sütlacı kaselere paylaştırın, oda sıcaklığında soğuduktan sonra buzdolabına koyun ve en az 2 saat dinlendirin.
8. Servis yaparken üzerine tarçın serpebilir veya portakal dilimleri ile süsleyebilirsiniz Afiyet olsun.

name: Orange Roughy
instructions: Preheat the oven's broiler and set the oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source.
Place fillets on the broiler pan and squeeze lemon over fillets.
Broil in the preheated oven for 6 to 8 minutes.
Combine Parmesan, butter, Dijionnaise, garlic, and salt in a small bowl. Spread Parmesan mixture on top of fillets. Sprinkle with paprika.
Broil until topping is lightly browned and fish flakes easily with a fork, about 3 minutes.

name: Orange Salad With Manouri
instructions: Πρώτα αφαιρούμε γύρω τη φλούδα του πορτοκαλιού παίρνοντας με το μαχαίρι όλο το λευκό.
Καθαρίζουμε τα φιλέτα πορτοκαλιού κόβοντας ανάμεσα στις μεμβράνες (κρατάμε 2 κ.σ. χυμό πορτοκαλιού).
Τα βάζουμε όλα στη σαλατιέρα που θα σερβίρουμε τη σαλάτα με πορτοκάλι και μανούρι.
Καθαρίζουμε τα αβοκάντο και τα κόβουμε σε καρέ. Τα προσθέτουμε.
Καθαρίζουμε του σπόρους από μισό ρόδι και τους προσθέτουμε.
Κόβουμε το κρεμμύδι σε λεπτές ροδέλες. Τις ρίχνουμε στη σαλάτα.
Προσθέτουμε τις ελιές και το θρυμματισμένο μανούρι.
Σε ένα μπολ βάζουμε όλα τα υλικά για τη σως. Τα χτυπάμε με σύρμα ή πιρούνι να ενωθούν.
Περιχύνουμε τη σαλάτα με τη σος, ανακατεύουμε και σερβίρουμε.

name: Orange Salmon

ingredients.item: 350 ml de de zumo de naranja
200 ml de nata líquida para cocinar o leche evaporada

instructions: Para preparar este salmón con salsa de naranja lo primero es hacer los escalopines de salmón, vuelta y vuelta hasta que estén dorados. Reservamos.

En la misma sartén añadimos un poco de aceite de oliva virgen extra e incorporamos el puerro picado con un poco de sal. Cuando el puerro comience a dorarse ponemos el zumo de naranja, el azúcar y el vinagre, dejamos cocinar unos diez minutos En ese momento incorporamos de nuevo el salmón y la nata, dejamos unos minutos que reduzca un poco la salsa y ya está listo para servir.

name: Orange Salmon With Coriander

ingredients.prep:
halved through root end, thinly sliced
lengthwise

ingredients.item: A mortar and pestle or spice mill

instructions: Coarsely crush 3 Tbsp. coriander seeds with a mortar and pestle or very coarsely grind in a spice mill; transfer to a plate. Finely crush (or grind) remaining 3 Tbsp. coriander seeds; transfer to a small bowl and set aside. (Alternatively, you can use 2 Tbsp. ground coriander.)
Thinly slice 1 orange half into rounds; remove seeds. Squeeze juice from other 1 orange half into a measuring glass until you have ¼ cup. Set aside separately.

Pat four 4–6-oz. skinless salmon fillets dry and season with kosher salt on both sides. Working one at a time, press fillets into coarsely crushed coriander to coat on 1 side. Transfer, coriander side up, to a large plate.

Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large skillet over medium. Arrange salmon, coriander side down, in pan and cook until golden brown underneath, about 3 minutes. Turn fillets over and cook until flesh is just opaque throughout, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a platter.

Add 2 medium shallots, halved through root end, thinly sliced lengthwise, to same skillet; season with salt. Cook, stirring often, until slightly softened, about 2 minutes. Add reserved finely crushed coriander and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Stir in ¼ cup fresh lemon juice and reserved orange juice, then add 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, reserved orange slices, and ⅓ cup water. Cook, stirring often, until sauce is slightly thickened and orange slices are tender, about 2 minutes.
Spoon sauce and orange slices over salmon; top with cilantro leaves with tender stems.

name: Orange Semifreddo
instructions: Cut the oranges in half and scoop out the fruit while keeping the skin intact as much as you can. Place the orange halves on a tray that can fit in your freezer face up so they look like cups. Set aside.

In a large bowl, whisk the icing sugar, mascarpone, cream, egg yolks, orange zest, vanilla extract and orange liquor together until the mixture is well-combined and some air has been incorporated. About 3 minutes.
Using a cup with a spout or ladle, fill each orange half with the filling and freeze for at least one hour until solid.
Soften for 15-30 minutes at room temperature before serving.
Enjoy!

name: Orange Sherbet Punch
instructions: Place orange sherbet in a punch bowl. Pour in orange-flavored drink, lemon-lime carbonated beverage, and orange soda; serve immediately.

name: Orange Slices With Chocolate
instructions: Πλένουμε τα πορτοκάλια και με κοφτερό μαχαίρι κόβουμε κάθετα κατά μήκος το κάθε πορτοκάλι στα δύο.
Έπειτα τα κόβουμε σε λεπτές φέτες.
Σε φαρδιά κατσαρόλα με χοντρή βάση, ρίχνουμε το νερό με τη ζάχαρη και σε μέτρια φωτιά αφήνουμε να πάρει βράση.
Ρίχνουμε τις φέτες πορτοκάλι, φροντίζοντας να είναι σε μία στρώση και να μην καλύπτει η μία φέτα την άλλη.
Βράζουμε για 10-12 λεπτά.
Χαμηλώνουμε πολύ τη φωτιά και σιγοβράζουμε μέχρι να πυκνώσει αρκετά το σιρόπι. Πρέπει ίσα που να κοχλάζει ελαφρά.
Αφήνουμε έτσι να σιγοβράζει για 35 λεπτά και αναποδογυρίζουμε τα πορτοκάλια κάθε 5 λεπτά. Πρέπει οι φέτες πορτοκαλιού να μαλακώσουν αρκετά, αλλά συγχρόνως να διατηρήσουν και το σχήμα τους.
Αποσύρουμε από τη φωτιά και αφήνουμε να κρυώσουν μέσα στο σιρόπι τους.
Μία μία τις βγάζουμε σε λαδόκολλα.
Τις αφήνουμε να στεγνώσουν καλά, ίσως και 2 και 3 ημέρες, αναποδογυρίζοντάς τες τακτικά και αλλάζοντας χαρτί κάθε φορά.
Μπορούμε να τις στεγνώσουμε και σε πολύ χαμηλό φούρνο, αλλά με τον τρόπο του χαρτιού θα διατηρήσουν καλύτερο χρώμα, άρωμα και γεύση.
Βάζουμε τις φέτες πορτοκάλι στο ψυγείο να παγώσουν.
Λιώνουμε την κουβερτούρα και μία μία τις βουτάμε μέχρι τη μέση.
Τις αφήνουμε σε σχάρα να στεγνώσουν ή τις βάζουμε στο ψυγείο αν βιαζόμαστε.
Αν αγαπάτε τη σοκολάτα, δείτε περισσότερες εύκολες σοκολατένιες συνταγές εδώ.

name: Orange Slushie For A Fresh And Healthy Drink
original_name: Granizado de naranja casero para una bebida fresca y saludable
instructions: Exprime el jugo de las naranjas y reserva.
En una olla, coloca el agua y el azúcar y calienta a fuego medio hasta que el azúcar se disuelva. Luego, deja enfriar la mezcla.
Agrega el jugo de naranja a la mezcla de agua y azúcar y remueve bien. Vierte la mezcla en una bandeja para hielo y congela durante al menos 4 horas.
Una vez que la mezcla esté congelada, retira la bandeja del congelador y coloca los cubos de hielo en una licuadora. Agrega el hielo picado y mezcla hasta obtener una consistencia granulada.
Sirve el granizado de naranja en vasos y disfruta.

name: Orange Sorbet Recipe
original_name: Receta de sorbete de naranja fácil

ingredients.item: 500 ml de zumo de naranja natural

instructions: Prepara el almíbar que le dará el dulzor a la receta.
Mezcla el azúcar con el agua en una olla y llévala al fuego.
Cocina a fuego medio - bajo hasta que tome textura y se forme el almíbar.
Una vez listo, apaga y reserva hasta que se enfríe.
En una licuadora, vierte el zumo de naranja, el almíbar frío, el jugo de limón y la ralladura de naranja. Licúa hasta que todo esté integrado.
Vierte la mezcla en una cacerola o envase metálico.
Lleva a la nevera y congela durante tres horas. Cada 30 minutos debes mezclar para romper los cristales y evitar que el sorbete no endurezca.
Cuando tenga una textura granizada y firme, sirve.
Decora con hojas de menta o mermelada de naranja. ¡Disfruta!

name: Orange Soufflé

ingredients.item: 10φορμάκια μιας χρήσεως ή πυρίμαχα (ramicin) για σουφλέ
10φορμάκια μιας χρήσεως ή πυρίμαχα (ramicin) για σουφλέ

instructions: Όλα τα υλικά πρέπει να είναι σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου.
Κοσκινίζουμε το αλεύρι με το μπέικιν πάουντερ.
Ψιλοκόβουμε τη σοκολάτα και το βούτυρο.
Τα λιώνουμε σε μπεν μαρί.
Αφήνουμε λίγο να γίνουν χλιαρά.
Βάζουμε στο μίξερ τα αυγά, τους κρόκους και τη ζάχαρη, το αλάτι και την κανέλα και τα χτυπάμε μέχρι να κρεμώσουν και να αφρατέψουν καλά.
Πρέπει να διπλασιαστούν σε όγκο και να ασπρίσει το μείγμα.
Προσθέτουμε τη λιωμένη χλιαρή σοκολάτα και το αλεύρι στο μείγμα.
Απαλά ανακατεύουμε με σπάτουλα για να μη χάσουμε τον όγκο των αυγών.
Βουτυρώνουμε τα φορμάκια και πασπαλίζουμε εσωτερικά με αλεύρι.
Τινάζουμε να φύγει το περιττό αλεύρι.
Ισομοιράζουμε το μείγμα στα 10 μπολάκια.

name: Orange Spinach Root Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 tatlı kaşığı limon suyu (isteğe bağlı, aroma için)
1 yemek kaşığı ceviz içi veya badem (isteğe bağlı, servis için)
Sarımsak yerine ince doğranmış arpacık soğan ekleyebilirsiniz.
Tuz ve karabiber dışında, pul biber, kekik veya kişniş ile lezzeti zenginleştirebilirsiniz.
İsteğe bağlı olarak bir tutam toz zencefil veya muskat rendesi ekleyerek farklı bir aroma katabilirsiniz.
üzerine serpiştirilen ceviz veya badem yerine fındık, kabak çekirdeği veya susam kullanabilirsiniz.
Taze nane yerine taze fesleğen veya maydanoz tercih edebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Ispanak köklerini iyice yıkayın ve iri parçalar halinde doğrayın.
2. Orta boy bir tavada zeytinyağını ısıtın.
3. İnce doğranmış soğanları ekleyip hafifçe pembeleşene kadar soteleyin.
4. Sarımsağı ekleyip 1 dakika kadar kavurun.
5. Doğranmış ıspanak köklerini tavaya ekleyin ve birkaç dakika soteleyin.
6. Üzerine portakal suyunu dökün ve kısık ateşte 10–15 dakika kadar pişirin.
7. Tuz ve karabiber ile tatlandırın.
8. Ocaktan aldıktan sonra isteğe bağlı olarak limon suyu ekleyin.
9. Servis tabağına alın ve üzerine ceviz veya badem serpiştirerek servis edin.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Orange Sponge Cake Recipe
original_name: Receita fácil de Pão de ló de laranja
instructions: Coloque as gemas numa tigela, junte o açúcar e a raspa das laranjas e bata por cerca de 15 minutos.
Bata as claras em castelo até ficarem firmes e envolva-as no preparado das gemas. Junte a farinha peneirada e envolva cuidadosamente, sem bater.
Forre uma forma com papel vegetal, deite nela a massa anterior e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, por cerca de 25 a 30 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer e desenforme.

name: Orange Stick Cookie Recipe
instructions: 1. Tereyağını karıştırma kabına alın.
2.  Üzerine toz şeker ekleyin ve karışım kremsi bir kıvam alana kadar karıştırın.
3. Portakal kabuğu rendesi, portakal suyu ve vanilini ilave edin.
4.  Ardından nişastayı ekleyin ve karışımı homojen hale getirin.
5. Unu ve kabartma tozunu azar azar ekleyerek ele yapışmayan, yumuşak kıvamlı bir hamur elde edene kadar yoğurun.
6. Hamuru hazırladıktan sonra iki adet yağlı kağıdın arasına alın.
7.  Merdane yardımıyla yaklaşık 1–2 cm kalınlığında, çok ince olmayacak şekilde açın.
8. Açtığınız hamurun üst yağlı kağıdını kaldırın ve bir bıçak ya da hamur kesici kullanarak hamuru eşit ölçülerde dikdörtgen şeritler halinde kesin.
9. Kestiğiniz parçaları dikkatlice alıp yağlı kağıt serilmiş fırın tepsisine aralıklı olarak yerleştirin.
10.  Bu yöntem kurabiyelerin daha düzgün ve aynı boyutta pişmesine yardımcı olur.
11.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180°C fırında yaklaşık 12–15 dakika kontrollü şekilde pişirin.
12.  Çok kızarmadan fırından çıkarın.
13. Kurabiyeleri tamamen soğumaya bırakın.
14. Bitter ve sütlü çikolatayı benmari usulü eritin.
15.  Kurabiyelerin uç kısımlarını eritilmiş çikolataya batırın ve yağlı kağıt üzerine alarak çikolatanın donmasını bekleyin.
16. Çikolata sertleştikten sonra servis edebilirsiniz.
17.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Orange Truffle
instructions: 1. Kremayı kısık ateşte kaynatmadan ısıtın.
2.  Ocaktan alıp ufalanmış bitter çikolata, portakal kabuğu rendesini ve tereyağını ekleyin.
3.  2 dakika bekledikten sonra pürüzsüz bir kıvama gelene dek karıştırın.
4.  Karışımı bir kaba alıp 8 saat buzdolabında dinlendirin.
5. Truffları, minik toplar halinde yuvarlayıp petitolara bulayın.
6.  Buzdolabında 3 saat daha bekletip servis yapın.

name: Orange Turkey Brine
instructions: Combine water, orange juice concentrate, salt, orange slices, lemon slices, lime slices, thyme, black pepper, garlic, and bay leaves in a large stockpot; bring to a boil. Remove from heat; cool to room temperature.

Wash and pat turkey dry (make sure giblets are removed). Place turkey, breast-side down, into brine, making sure the cavity is filled. Place the stockpot in the refrigerator. Brine turkey for 8 to 48 hours.

name: Orange Turkey Recipe
original_name: Receta de pavo a la naranja

ingredients.item: 2 cdas ralladura de piel de naranja

instructions: Inicia la receta y toma las pechugas o solomillos de pavo. Condimenta con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Calienta un sartén o grill con el aceite de oliva, y sella el pavo por aproximadamente 7 minutos por cada lado.
Mientras el pavo se cocina, coloca en una cazuela el zumo de naranja, la ralladura de la fruta, el azúcar, la mostaza, el romero fresco y la salsa de soja.
Mezcla y cocina a fuego lento por 4 minutos. Corta en tiras delgadas la cebolla y agrega a la mezcla. Termina de cocinar hasta que se forme una salsa medio glaseada. Apaga y reserva.
Las pechugas deben quedar doraditas, pero jugosas por dentro. Una vez listas, retira del sartén y haz unos cortes en la superficie.
Coloca la pechuga en un plato y baña con la salsa de naranja hasta que quede bien impregnada.
Ahora, ya está listo para degustar.
¡Disfruta!

name: Orange Walnut Cookie Recipe

ingredients.item: Tereyağı yerine margarin veya zeytinyağı ile karışık kullanarak daha farklı bir aroma elde edebilirsiniz.
Pudra şekeri yerine toz şeker kullanabilir, dilerseniz şekeri hafifçe karamelize ederek daha yoğun bir tat sağlayabilirsiniz.
Portakal kabuğu rendesi yerine limon kabuğu rendesi veya mandalina kabuğu rendesi kullanarak farklı narenciye aromaları deneyebilirsiniz.
Portakal suyu yerine taze sıkılmış mandalina suyu veya yarım limon suyu ekleyerek hafif ekşimsi bir tat yakalayabilirsiniz.
Ceviz yerine fındık, badem veya antep fıstığı kullanarak kurabiyeye farklı bir doku ve lezzet katabilirsiniz.
üzeri için yumurta akı yerine bal veya pekmezle hafif parlaklık verebilir, ya da sade bırakabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Oda sıcaklığındaki tereyağı, sıvı yağ, pudra şekeri ve portakal kabuğu rendesini geniş bir kaba alın.
2.  Mikserle kremamsı bir kıvama gelene kadar çırpın.
3. Karışıma yumurtaları ve portakal suyunu ekleyin, homojen bir karışım elde edene kadar çırpmaya devam edin.
4. Un, kabartma tozu ve vanilini eleyerek karışıma ekleyin.
5.  Cevizleri de ilave edip hamuru yoğurun.
6. Hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparıp avuç içinde yuvarlayın.
7.  Kurabiyeleri yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine dizin.
8. Üzerlerine fırça yardımıyla yumurta akı sürün ve ceviz serpiştirin önceden ısıtılmış 170°C fırında yaklaşık 20–25 dakika, üzeri hafif kızarana kadar pişirin.
9. Fırından çıktıktan sonra kurabiyeleri soğumaya bırakın.
10.  Soğuduktan sonra servis edebilirsiniz.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Orange Zinger
instructions: Juice ginger, carrots, and oranges in a juicer, respectively. Serve immediately.

name: Orange's Famous Oatmeal Scotchies!
instructions: Beat the butter, brown sugar, and white sugar with an electric mixer in a large bowl until smooth. Beat the first egg into the butter mixture until completely blended; beat the vanilla into the mixture with the last egg.

Whisk the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt together in a separate bowl. Beat the flour mixture into the butter mixture about 1/2 cup at a time. Fold the rolled oats and butterscotch chips into the resulting dough. If the dough isn't firm enough, mix in more rolled oats, about 1/4 cup at a time, until dough is of desired consistency.
Refrigerate the dough for 1 to 2 hours before baking.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Scoop up dough by heaping tablespoonful and roll into balls. Place cookies about 2 inches apart on baking sheets.

Bake in the preheated oven until very lightly browned and cookies are set in the middle, 10 to 12 minutes. Allow cookies to cool for about 5 minutes before removing from baking sheets to finish cooling on wire rack.

name: Orange, Mango, And Ginger Sorbet
instructions: Combine the water, sugar, ginger, salt, and lime zest in a saucepan; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer 5 minutes. Allow mixture to cool; strain. Stir in the orange juice, mango juice, and lemon juice. Cover and chill 3 hours.
Fill an ice cream maker with the mixture, and freeze according to the manufacturer's instructions.

name: Orange-almond Poppy Seed Bread
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a large loaf pan.

Combine flour, salt, and baking powder in a bowl. Beat 2 1/4 cups sugar, vegetable oil, and eggs in another bowl until smooth. Stir milk, poppy seeds, 1 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract, 1 1/2 teaspoon almond extract, and 1 1/2 teaspoon butter extract into egg mixture. Add flour mixture; mix until batter is just moistened. Pour batter into prepared loaf pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 50 to 60 minutes.
Whisk 3/4 cup sugar, orange juice, 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract, 1/2 teaspoon almond extract, and 1/2 teaspoon butter extract in a bowl until smooth. Pour orange juice glaze over hot poppy seed loaf.

name: Orange-blossom Caramel Sauce
instructions: Stir sugar, honey, salt, and 1/4 cup water in a small saucepan over medium heat until sugar dissolves. Increase heat and cook without stirring until mixture turns amber in color. Remove from heat; carefully stir in cream (mixture will bubble up), then orange-flower water. Let cool. DO AHEAD: Caramel sauce can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill. Rewarm slightly before using.

name: Orange-blossom-honey Madeleines
instructions: Sift flour, baking powder, and salt into a medium bowl. Using an electric mixer, beat eggs and sugar in a large bowl until pale yellow and thick, about 4 minutes. Beat in honey, vanilla, and orange zest. Gently fold in dry ingredients. Add 5 Tbsp. melted butter; gently fold into batter. Press plastic wrap directly onto surface of batter; chill for at least 3 hours. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

Position a rack in center of oven; preheat to 400°. Lightly brush madeleine molds with butter. Place pan on a baking sheet. Drop 1 scant Tbsp. batter into each mold. Bake until golden and a tester inserted into center comes out clean, about 10 minutes.
Remove pan from oven, invert, and quickly knock madeleines out of pan. Serve warm on their own or with Ginger-Yogurt Mousse with Pistachio Meringue.

name: Orange-cranberry Bundt Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly grease a 12-cup fluted tube pan (such as Bundt).
Vigorously whisk together milk, zest, juice, oil, applesauce, flax seeds, and cornstarch in a large bowl. Add sugar and whisk until well combined, then whisk in vanilla.

Use a fine mesh strainer to sift in about half of flour and all of baking powder, salt, and baking soda, then stir until well combined. Sift in remaining flour and stir until smooth. Fold in cranberries. Pour batter into prepared pan.

Bake until top is puffed and firm to touch, cake starts to pull away from pan sides, and a wooden pick inserted near center comes out clean, 50 to 55 minutes. Cool in pan 10 minutes, then loosen cake with a small metal spatula, invert on a cooling rack, and cool completely, about 2 hours.
Put confectioners' sugar in a large bowl. Add juice, oil, and vanilla and stir vigorously, until thick and smooth but pourable. (Thin with water or a little more juice if needed.)
Put a sheet of wax paper under rack with cake. Drizzle glaze over cake, letting excess drip off. Let stand until set, about 15 minutes.

name: Orange-cranberry Marmalade
instructions: Cut off both ends of the zested orange, and cut orange in half. Peel halves and remove the white core.
Place orange sections and cranberries in a food processor. Pulse until orange is mostly pulp, using roughly 5 three-second pulses.
Combine the orange-cranberry mixture, zest, sugar, and water in a medium saucepan. Bring to a gentle boil and simmer, stirring frequently, for 15 minutes. Let marmalade cool.
Pour marmalade into a glass jar with a tight-fitting lid. Chill completely in refrigerator before serving.

name: Orange-cranberry Scones
instructions: Rehydrate the cranberries by placing them in a small bowl and covering with boiling water. Let sit for at least 10 minutes, until plump, then drain and spread out on a paper towel to dry.

In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, granulated sugar, and baking powder. Use a pastry cutter (or your fingers) to incorporate the Private Selection® Salted French Butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Gently fold in the cranberries.
In a medium bowl or measuring cup, beat the eggs, then add the heavy cream, vanilla, and orange zest and whisk to combine.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and gently fold with a spatula to combine; do not overmix.

Place a sheet of parchment on your work surface and lightly dust with flour. Turn the dough out onto the floured parchment and pat into a circle about 7 inches in diameter. Lift the parchment paper onto a baking sheet and refrigerate the dough round uncovered for at least 20 minutes, up to 45 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C)
Use a floured bench scraper to cut the dough round into 8 wedges. Separate the wedges and carefully space evenly on the baking sheet.
Make the egg wash: In a small bowl, whisk together the egg and cream. Brush each scone generously with the egg wash.
Bake the scones for about 20 minutes, until they are puffed and golden brown. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.

Make the orange drizzle: In a medium bowl, whisk together the powdered sugar, orange zest, and orange juice until smooth. Either transfer to a piping bag and snip off the corner or use a spoon to drizzle the glaze back and forth over the scones.
Enjoy!

name: Orange-date Muesli With Coconut And Cacao Nibs
instructions: Ingredient Info: Unsweetened flaked organic coconut is available at natural foods and specialty foods stores.
Preheat oven to 350°. Spread out coconut on a small rimmed baking sheet and toast, tossing occasionally, until golden, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a plate.
Stir together chopped orange, orange juice, date, yogurt, and oats. Cover and chill overnight. Just before serving, top with cacao nibs and toasted coconut.

name: Orange-flower Pavlovas With Strawberries
instructions: Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 135°C. Line large baking sheet with parchment paper. Using cookie cutter or glass as aid, trace six 2 1/2-inch circles on parchment, spacing 2 to 3 inches apart; turn parchment over.

Using electric mixer, beat egg whites in large bowl until soft peaks begin to form. With mixer running, gradually add 6 tablespoons sugar. Whisk 2 tablespoons sugar and cornstarch in small bowl. With mixer running, gradually beat sugar-cornstarch mixture into meringue. Continue beating meringue until stiff glossy peaks form. Beat in vinegar and orange-flower water. Divide meringue among parchment paper circles, spreading to fill completely (meringues will be about 1 1/2 inches high). Using back of spoon, form slight depression in center of each meringue.

Bake meringues until beige and dry to touch, about 20 minutes. Turn off oven and prop door open slightly with wooden spoon. Let meringues cool in oven until completely dry, about 1 hour. Transfer to rack to cool completely. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.
Puree all ingredients in blender until smooth. Transfer to bowl. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Mix strawberries, 1 tablespoon sugar, and orange-flower water in medium bowl. Let stand at room temperature until sugar dissolves and juices form, stirring occasionally, about 20 minutes.

Using electric mixer, beat chilled cream, vanilla, and remaining 1 teaspoon sugar in another medium bowl until soft peaks form. DO AHEAD Strawberries and whipped cream can be made 2 hours ahead. Cover separately and chill. Stir strawberry mixture and rewhisk cream just before using.

Spoon small dollop of whipped cream in center of each plate. Place 1 meringue atop whipped cream on each plate, pressing lightly to anchor meringue. Spoon generous dollop of whipped cream in center of each meringue. Spoon coulis around meringues; top with sliced strawberry mixture.

name: Orange-ginger Pickled Baby Carrots

ingredients.prep: peeled and trimmed, leaving 1/2 inch of stems intact; or 2 lb medium carrots

instructions: Blanch carrots in a nonreactive 4- to 5-qt heavy pot of salted boiling water, stirring occasionally, 1 minute. Transfer carrots to an ice bath to stop cooking, then drain in a colander and transfer to a heatproof bowl

Bring vinegar, orange zest and juice, chiles, ginger, sugar, and 1 1/2 tsp salt to a boil in same pot, stirring until sugar has dissolved. Pour over carrots and cool, uncovered, stirring occasionally, about 1 hour.
Chill carrots in pickling liquid in an airtight container, shaking container occasionally, at least 1 day.

name: Orange-gingerbread Cheesecake Bars
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a 9x13-inch baking pan with enough parchment paper to have overhang on all sides. Lightly grease parchment.
Whisk together flour, ginger, cinnamon, baking soda, cloves, nutmeg, allspice, and salt for the gingerbread in a large bowl until combined.
Cream brown sugar and butter in a separate bowl with an electric mixed until light and fluffy. Add egg and vanilla extract and beat until thoroughly combined. Mix in molasses.

Add flour mixture to butter mixture in 3 separate additions, mixing only until just combined; dough will be fairly thick. Press 2/3 of the dough firmly and evenly into the bottom of the prepared baking pan, using floured hands to prevent sticking.

Beat cream cheese, sugar, and salt for the filling in a large bowl until completely smooth and fluffy. Add eggs, 1 at a time, mixing well after each addition. Mix in vanilla extract and orange zest. Pour filling evenly over gingerbread crust and smooth with a spatula. Sprinkle remaining gingerbread dough over the filling and gently press down.

Bake in the preheated oven until edges are set and the center of the cheesecake only slightly jiggles, 35 to 40 minutes. Cool completely in pan. Once cooled, remove from pan using parchment 'handles' and slice into bars.

name: Orange-glazed Roast Pork

ingredients.prep: bone-in pork shoulder, fat cap trimmed to  0.25", patted dry

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Season one 7–9-lb. skinless, bone-in pork shoulder, fat cap trimmed to ¼", patted dry, all over with kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper (about 1 tsp. salt per pound is a good rule of thumb, so don’t be shy here). Let sit at room temperature at least 30 minutes and up to 2 hours.

Preheat oven to 300°. Heat 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add 1 large onion, unpeeled, quartered, and 1 head of garlic, halved crosswise through the equator, cut sides down, and cook until browned underneath, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a plate.

Arrange pork shoulder, fat side down, in same pot and cook, undisturbed, until browned underneath, about 5 minutes. Carefully turn pork over by rolling away from you to avoid spattering and cook until browned underneath, about 5 minutes.

Tuck onion, garlic, and 1 large sprig rosemary around pork (fat side should be up at this point). Add 2 cups red wine, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes, and 2 cups water. Cover pot; transfer to oven. Braise 3–3½ hours (depending on the size of your shoulder; go the full time if it’s 9 lb.). Uncover pot and roast pork until meat shreds easily with a fork, about 2 hours.

Meanwhile, cut 1 large orange in half and squeeze juice into a cold small saucepan (you should have about ⅓ cup); thinly slice remaining 1 large orange into rounds. Add 1 cup orange marmalade (one 12-oz. jar), ½ cup sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar, a pinch of salt, and remaining ¼ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes to orange juice in pan, set over medium-high heat, and cook, stirring and scraping down sides of pot occasionally with a heatproof rubber spatula, until thickened and syrupy, 7–9 minutes. Set glaze aside (it will continue to thicken as it cools; reheat before using if too thick).
Spoon or brush top of pork (any parts you can see above braising liquid) with about a third to half of the glaze. Tuck orange slices around pork. Roast until crust on pork is sticky, 15–20 minutes.

Carefully transfer pork to a platter and spoon remaining glaze over. Tuck orange slices in pot around pork along with a few fresh rosemary sprigs. Transfer juices from pot to a small bowl to spoon over individual servings if desired.

name: Orange-kumquat Marmalade
instructions: Using a knife, remove peel from orange. Set orange aside. Cut white pith from peel. Place peel in a medium saucepan and add cold water to cover by 1”. Bring to a boil; drain. Repeat 2 more times. Let cool slightly.

Finely chop peel and reserved orange; place in a medium saucepan and add sugar, kumquats, red pepper flakes, black pepper, and 2 cups water. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until citrus is soft and water is evaporated, 35–45 minutes. Let cool; mix in orange juice.
DO AHEAD: Marmalade can be made 2 weeks ahead. Cover and chill.

name: Orange-maple Roasted Carrots And Fennel
instructions: {'level': 'Preheat the oven to 220 degrees C.', 'step': '1'}
{'level': 'Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.', 'step': '2'}
{'level': 'Cut carrots on the diagonal into 1/4 inch slices.', 'step': '3'}
{'level': 'Place in the center of the baking sheet.', 'step': '4'}
{'level': 'Trim the bottom off the fennel and cut off any green parts and fronds from the top.', 'step': '5'}
{'level': 'Cut fennel bulb in half, then cut each half into into 1/4-inch thick slices.', 'step': '6'}
{'level': 'Place on the baking sheet with the carrots.', 'step': '7'}
{'level': 'Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and thyme.', 'step': '8'}
{'level': 'Drizzle with olive oil and toss vegetables to coat evenly.', 'step': '9'}
{'level': 'Spread in a single layer on baking sheet.', 'step': '10'}
