{'level': 'During the last 5 minutes, drizzle vegetables with maple syrup and sprinkle with orange zest.', 'step': '12'}
{'level': 'Toss gently to combine, and return to the oven.', 'step': '13'}

name: Orange-rhubarb-cardamom Jam
instructions: Inspect six half-pint jars for cracks and rings for rust, discarding any defective ones. Immerse in simmering water until jam is ready. Wash new, unused lids and rings in warm soapy water.
Whisk sugar, pectin, and ground cardamom together in a small bowl.

Combine rhubarb, orange zest, and orange segments in a wide, nonreactive 8-quart pot: stir in pectin mixture to combine. Bring to a vigorous boil over high heat. Reduce heat to medium-high and cook, stirring frequently and adjusting heat as needed to maintain a gentle boil, until reduced by at least one-third, 20 to 25 minutes.

Pack jam into hot, sterilized jars, filling to within ¼ inch of tops. Run a clean knife or thin spatula around insides of jars to remove any air bubbles. Wipe rims with a moist paper towel to remove any residue. Top with lids and screw rings on tightly.

Place a rack in the bottom of a large stockpot and fill halfway with water; bring to a boil and lower jars 2 inches apart into the boiling water using a holder. Pour in more boiling water to cover jars by at least 1 inch. Bring to a rolling boil, cover, and process for 10 minutes.

Remove jars from stockpot; rest several inches apart, for 12 to 24 hours. Press center of each lid with a finger to ensure lid does not move up or down. Remove rings for storage and store in a cool, dark area.

name: Orange-scented Bittersweet Chocolate Cake With Candied Blood Orange Compote

ingredients.item: Grand marnier or other orange-flavored liqueur
Grand marnier or other orange-flavored liqueur

instructions: Cut ends off oranges. Cut oranges with peel lengthwise in half, then cut each half lengthwise into 3 wedges. Combine 2 1/2 cups water and sugar in large saucepan. Bring to boil, stirring until sugar dissolves. Add orange wedges and any accumulated juices to syrup and bring to boil. Reduce heat and simmer until orange peel is soft and translucent and syrup is reduced and thickened, turning orange wedges occasionally and adding more water by 1/4 cupfuls as needed if syrup is too thick before orange wedges are soft, 35 to 40 minutes. Remove from heat. Stir in orange liqueur. Cool 15 minutes. Transfer to small container. Cover and chill. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 week ahead. Keep chilled. Bring to room temperature before using.
Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 163°C. Lightly butter 10-inch-diameter cake pan with 2-inch-high sides. Line bottom of pan with parchment paper; butter parchment.

Whisk flour, baking powder, and salt in medium bowl to blend. Combine chocolate and butter in large metal bowl. Set bowl over saucepan of simmering water; stir until chocolate-butter mixture is melted and smooth. Remove bowl from over water; add both sugars, orange liqueur, and orange peel and whisk until blended (mixture will look grainy). Add eggs, 2 at a time, and whisk until just blended after each addition. Whisk in sour cream. Add flour mixture and stir in with rubber spatula just until incorporated. Transfer batter to prepared pan; spread evenly.

Bake cake until tester inserted into center comes out with moist crumbs attached, about 50 minutes. Cool cake in pan on rack 30 minutes. Run small knife around sides of cake to loosen. Invert cake onto rack; peel off parchment. Cool cake completely (center may sink slightly).

Combine chocolate and butter in small metal bowl. Set bowl over saucepan of simmering water; stir until chocolate-butter mixture is melted and smooth. Whisk in corn syrup. Cool glaze until barely warm but still pourable, about 10 minutes.

Pour glaze onto center of cake. Using small offset spatula, spread glaze over top of cake, leaving 1/2-inch plain border around top edge. Let stand at room temperature until glaze sets, about 2 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover with cake dome and store at room temperature.
Using hot dry knife and wiping knife clean between slices, cut cake into slices. Divide among plates. Serve some candied orange compote alongside.

name: Orange-wine-braised Chicken Thighs

ingredients.item: Plus 1 tsp. diamond crystal or 2 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep:
bone-in chicken thighs (about 6 medium), patted
dry

roots trimmed, with ends left intact, peeled,
quartered through root ends

dry rosé, or tart, high-acid white wine (such
as Sauvignon Blanc or Riesling)

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Mix 1½ tsp. paprika, 1 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1½ tsp. freshly ground pepper in a small bowl. Pat 2½ lb. skin-on, bone-in chicken thighs (about 6 medium) dry and sprinkle all over with spice mixture. Set aside.

Heat ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil in an ovenproof Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium. Cook 2 small oranges, cut into quarters, on cut sides until browned and blackened in spots, about 2 minutes per side. (Oil might spatter, so have a lid nearby to place on top if needed.) Transfer oranges to a large plate.

Add more oil to same pot if dry and cook 3 small red onions, roots trimmed, with ends left intact, peeled, quartered through root ends, on cut sides until browned, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer to plate with oranges. Add 12 garlic cloves, peeled, to pot and cook, stirring often, until browned, 2–3 minutes. Transfer to plate with oranges and onions.

Working in batches if needed, cook reserved chicken thighs,
skin side down, in pot, undisturbed, until deep golden brown underneath and they release
easily from pan, 7–9 minutes. Turn skin side up and transfer to a separate plate.

Cook 2 Tbsp. all-purpose flour in pot, stirring constantly, until no dry pockets remain, 30–60 seconds. Gradually pour in 2 cups orange wine, dry rosé, or tart, high-acid white wine, whisking constantly to prevent clumping, then stir in 1 cup fresh orange juice, 1 cup low-sodium chicken broth, ⅓ cup Dijon mustard, 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, 1 Tbsp. granulated sugar, remaining 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and remaining 1 tsp. freshly ground pepper. Bring to a boil and cook until sauce is reduced by half and thinly coats a spoon, 8–10 minutes. Taste sauce and season with more salt and pepper if needed.

Remove pot from heat and scatter oranges, onions, and garlic around. Nestle chicken thighs in, skin side up, so they’re about halfway in sauce; add 4 sprigs rosemary, tied together with kitchen twine. Roast in oven, uncovered, until chicken is very tender and easily pulls away from bones, about 1 hour.

name: Oranges With Chocolate
instructions: Descasque as laranjas e separe-as em gomos. Parta o chocolate em pedaços, derreta-os em banho-maria, mexendo de vez em quando, e retire do lume, assim que estiver totalmente derretido.

Seque bem os gomos de laranja com papel absorvente, mergulhe uma das extremidades pelo chocolate derretido e sacuda o excesso. Passe alguns por coco ralado e outros pelas sementes picadas, deixe secar e sirva-os frios ou à temperatura ambiente.

name: Orangey Pink Lemon Slush
instructions: Blend ice cubes, pink lemonade, clementine, lemon, and sugar in a blender until smooth.

name: Ordèvre
instructions: Σπάμε τους κόκκους πιπεριού στο γουδί και τους απλώνουμε σε επιφάνεια κοπής. Πασπαλίζουμε με λίγο αλάτι και θυμάρι.
Αλείφουμε το ψαρονέφρι με λίγο ελαιόλαδο και το κυλάμε πάνω στο μείγμα να καρυκευτεί.
Ζεσταίνουμε καλά ένα αντικολλητικό τηγάνι να κάψει και ροδίζουμε το κρέας από όλες τις πλευρές, για 4 λεπτά.
Ρίχνουμε το ξίδι και μεταφέρουμε αμέσως το ψαρονέφρι στο φούρνο όπου το ψήνουμε στους 200°C για 12 λεπτά.
Το αφήνουμε να κρυώσει και στη συνέχεια το κόβουμε σε λεπτές φέτες.
Ανακατεύουμε τη μαγιονέζα, τη μουστάρδα και το αγγούρι.
Αλείφουμε τα ψωμάκια (κράκερ ή σφολιάτα) με μείγμα μαγιονέζας και βάζουμε στο καθένα από μία φέτα ψαρονέφρι.
Γαρνίρουμε με καραμελωμένο κρεμμύδι και φύτρες και πασπαλίζουμε με γλυκιά πάπρικα.

name: Orecchiette Carbonara With Charred Brussels Sprouts

ingredients.item: . fresh orecchiette (see fresh pasta recipe) or other fresh or dried small pasta
. guanciale (salt-cured pork jowl) or pancetta (italian bacon)

instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over high heat. Working in batches, add brussels sprout leaves and cook, tossing occasionally, until charred in spots and crisp-tender, about 5 minutes; transfer to a plate and set aside. Wipe out skillet.
Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente (about 5 minutes for fresh pasta). Drain, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking liquid.

Meanwhile, heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in same skillet over medium heat. Add guanciale and cook, stirring often, until slightly crisp, about 4 minutes. Add pepper and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Immediately add ½ cup pasta cooking liquid to keep pepper from burning; reduce heat to low and gradually add butter, swirling skillet and adding more pasta cooking liquid as needed, until a thick, glossy sauce forms. (Taste as you go and switch to hot water once sauce is adequately seasoned.)

Add pasta to skillet and toss to coat. Add Pecorino; toss to combine. Remove from heat; mix in egg yolks. Add reserved brussels sprout leaves; toss, adding pasta cooking liquid (or hot water) as needed to thin sauce.
Serve pasta topped with more Pecorino.

name: Orecchiette Pasta With Margherita® Genoa Salami

ingredients.prep: roasted, skinned, cored, and cut into strips

ingredients.item: Fresh ground black pepper to taste

instructions: In a small pot place 1/4 cup whole peeled garlic cloves. Cover with extra virgin olive oil and cook on low heat until garlic becomes soft and cooked through. Set aside to cool, retain olive oil.

Bring a pot of lightly salted water to boil and cook orecchiette pasta until al dente. Reserve approximately 1/4 cup of the pasta water to add to the end of step 3. Drain pasta and cool in cold water, then set aside.

In a large saute pan, heat garlic oil from roasted garlic. Add Margherita® Genoa salami and brown slightly. Add peppers, spinach, roasted garlic, and half of the toasted pine nuts and continue to cook until spinach is wilted. Add cooked pasta and reserved pasta water, fresh basil and toss, continue to saute until pasta is hot and ready to serve.
Place pasta on plates or serving bowl, sprinkle with grated Romano cheese, black pepper and top with remaining pine nuts.

name: Orecchiette With Broccoli And Toasted Hazelnuts

ingredients.prep: florets cut into roughly 1-inch pieces, thick stems reserved for another use

instructions: {'level': 'medium', 'step': 'In a medium Dutch oven or large sauté pan, heat oil over high heat until just smoking.', 'time': '0'}
{'level': 'high', 'step': 'Add half the broccoli, season lightly with salt, and cook, stirring occasionally, until well browned on at least one side, about 5 minutes.', 'time': '5'}
{'level': 'medium-low', 'step': 'Lower heat to medium-low, stir in remaining broccoli, and season lightly with salt.', 'time': '0'}
{'level': 'high', 'step': 'Stir in garlic and red pepper flakes and cook until garlic is fragrant, about 30 seconds.', 'time': '30'}

name: Orecchiette With Buttermilk, Peas, And Pistachios

ingredients.prep: such as shelled fresh or frozen english and/or halved sugar snap
white and pale green parts only, cut in half lengthwise, thinly sliced
finely grated, plus more for serving

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast pistachios on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 5–8 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely crush with a measuring cup or glass.
Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water 6 minutes, then add peas and cook until pasta is al dente, about 2 minutes more.

Meanwhile, heat butter and 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium heavy pot over medium. Cook leeks, garlic, red pepper flakes, and 3 mint sprigs, stirring occasionally, until leeks are soft but not browned, 6–8 minutes; season with salt. Add buttermilk; bring to a simmer. Pluck out mint; discard.

Using a slotted spoon, transfer pasta and peas to leek mixture. Add 3 oz. Parmesan; cook, stirring vigorously and adding a little pasta water if needed, until sauce is creamy and coats pasta, about 1 minute. Season with salt and pepper. Remove from heat; add lemon juice. Pull leaves from remaining mint sprigs, tear into pasta, and toss. Divide pasta among bowls. Top with pistachios and Parmesan; drizzle with oil.

name: Orecchiette With Caramelized Onions, Sugar Snap Peas, And Ricotta Cheese

ingredients.item: -ounce package orecchiette (little ear-shaped pasta) or pasta shells

instructions: Heat oil in large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add onions. Sauté until onions are pale golden, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to medium; sauté onions until tender and deep golden, about 15 minutes longer. Transfer 3/4 cup sautéed onions to small bowl; reserve for frittata. Add peas to onions in skillet. Sauté until peas are crisp-tender, about 3 minutes. Remove skillet from heat.
Cook pasta in large pot of boiling salted water until just tender but still firm to bite. Drain pasta, reserving 1 cup cooking liquid.

Add pasta and 1/2 cup cooking liquid to onion mixture; stir over medium-high heat 30 seconds. Mix in ricotta, basil, and lemon peel, adding more cooking liquid to moisten as needed. Season with salt and pepper.

name: Orecchiette With Cauliflower, Anchovies, And Fried Croutons

ingredients.item: Orecchiette (little ear-shaped pasta) or medium-size shell pasta
(packed) freshly grated parmesan cheese plus additional for serving

instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C. Toss cauliflower florets with 1 tablespoon olive oil in large bowl to coat. Sprinkle with salt and pepper and spread in single layer on large rimmed baking sheet. Roast until cauliflower florets are tender and beginning to brown in spots, stirring occasionally, about 25 minutes. Cool to room temperature. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

Cook pasta in large pot of boiling generously salted water until just tender but still firm to bite, stirring occasionally. Drain pasta, reserving 1 1/3 cups pasta cooking liquid. Set pasta and cooking liquid aside separately.

Meanwhile, heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in large deep nonstick skillet or large pot over medium-high heat. Add bread cubes and sauté until golden brown and crisp, 3 to 4 minutes. Transfer to small bowl and cool. Reserve skillet or pot.

Add 2 tablespoons olive oil to same skillet or pot and heat over medium-high heat. Add zucchini and garlic and sauté until zucchini is golden brown and crisp-tender, 3 to 4 minutes. Add cauliflower and anchovies and sauté until heated through, 3 to 4 minutes. Season to taste with salt and freshly ground black pepper. Add drained pasta, reserved 1 1/3 cups pasta cooking liquid, remaining 3 tablespoons olive oil, 1/3 cup parsley, 1/3 cup Parmesan, and Pecorino Romano cheese and toss to coat. Season pasta to taste with salt and freshly ground black pepper. Divide pasta among 6 bowls; sprinkle with fried croutons, remaining parsley, and additional Parmesan cheese and serve.

Fried zucchini blossoms make a nice garnish for the pasta. Toss the blossoms in flour to coat, then fry them in a large skillet filled with 1/2 cup olive oil heated to 182°C just until they're golden. Drain the fried blossoms on paper towels before placing them on top of the pasta.

name: Orecchiette With Corn, Greens, And Ricotta

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Cook orecchiette; drain, reserving ¾ cup pasta cooking liquid. Meanwhile, cook bacon in a large skillet over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until brown and crisp, 5–8 minutes.
Add corn and cook, tossing occasionally, until tender, about 5 minutes. Add Swiss chard leaves; season with salt and pepper. Cook, tossing often, until wilted, about 5 minutes.
Toss in pasta and reserved pasta cooking liquid; cook until sauce coats pasta, about 2 minutes. Serve dolloped with ricotta and topped with basil.

name: Orecchiette With Fresh Mozzarella, Grape Tomatoes, And Garlic Chives

ingredients.item: Grape tomatoes or pear tomatoes in assorted colors
Minced fresh garlic chives or regular chives

instructions: Cook pasta in large pot of boiling salted water until tender but still firm to bite, stirring occasionally. Drain; return pasta to pot. Add mozzarella; stir until cheese begins to melt, about 30 seconds. Add tomatoes and all remaining ingredients; toss to blend evenly. Season to taste with salt and pepper.

name: Orecchiette With Fresh Tomatoes And Sausage

ingredients.prep: such as Trader Joe's® Chicken Sicilian Sausage

instructions: Heat butter and oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; cook and stir until the onion starts to soften, about 2 minutes.

Increase heat to high and add pancetta to the skillet. Cook and stir until crispy, 3 to 5 minutes. Remove casings from the sausages; add sausage meat to skillet. Cook and stir until browned, 3 to 5 minutes. Pour in wine and scrape the bottom of the skillet.

Toss mushrooms into the skillet. Cook, stirring occasionally, until slightly softened, 5 to 10 minutes. Add tomatoes, basil, oregano, and salt. Stir to combine. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the sauce is thick, 1 to 2 hours.

Fill a large pot with salted water and bring to a rolling boil. Stir in orecchiette and return to a boil. Cook pasta uncovered, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 7 minutes. Reserve 1/2 cup of cooking water and drain without rinsing the pasta.

Stir spinach into the sauce in the skillet. Cook until wilted, about 1 minute. Toss pasta into the skillet and stir to combine everything. Stir until heated through, adding some reserved pasta water if the sauce seems too thick.

name: Orecchiette With Kale And Breadcrumbs

ingredients.item: Finely grated parmesan or grana padano

instructions: Working in batches, cook kale in a large pot of boiling salted water until just tender, about 4 minutes. Using tongs, transfer to a rimmed baking sheet; let cool. Set aside pot with water. Squeeze out excess liquid from kale; chop leaves and finely chop stems; set aside.

Heat 3 tablespoons oil in a small skillet over medium heat. Add breadcrumbs and cook, stirring often, until beginning to brown, about 4 minutes. Add one-third of chopped garlic and cook, stirring often, until breadcrumbs are golden, about 3 minutes. Season with salt and pepper and transfer to a paper towel-lined plate; let cool.

Heat butter and remaining 2 tablespoons oil in a large heavy pot over medium-low heat. Add anchovies, red pepper flakes, and remaining two-thirds of chopped garlic; cook, mashing anchovies with a spoon, until a paste forms, about 2 minutes. Add reserved kale and 1/2 cup water. Cook, stirring often, until kale is warmed through, about 4 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
Meanwhile, bring reserved kale cooking liquid to a boil; add pasta and cook, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking liquid.

Add pasta and 1/2 cup pasta cooking liquid to kale mixture and stir to coat. Increase heat to medium and continue stirring, adding more cooking liquid as needed, until sauce coats pasta. Mix in Parmesan and 1/2 cup breadcrumbs; toss to combine. Divide pasta among bowls, drizzle with oil, and top with remaining breadcrumbs.

name: Orecchiette With Mushrooms, Leeks, And Almonds

ingredients.prep: pale-green and white parts only, halved, sliced into  0.75-inch pieces

instructions: Real Talk: Let’s be honest. Boxed veg stock doesn’t taste so great. Our advice: Make this easy homemade stock, divide it up among plastic containers, and freeze it. It’s inexpensive and easy and means you’ll always have stock on hand, which will add deep, homemade flavor to your everyday cooking.

Heat ¼ cup oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook almonds, tossing frequently, until lightly golden, 1–2 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer almonds to a medium bowl, leaving that almondy-oil goodness in the skillet.
Let almonds cool 10 minutes. Toss with parsley, lemon zest, and 2 Tbsp. Parmesan; season with salt and pepper. Set aside.

Add remaining 2 Tbsp. olive oil to almond oil in skillet. Heat over medium-high and cook mushrooms, undisturbed, no matter how much you may wish to give them a toss, until browned on 1 side, about 2 minutes. Toss and continue to cook, undisturbed, until browned on underside, about 2 minutes. Season with salt and pepper and continue to cook, tossing occasionally, until mushrooms are tender but still retain their shape and have some bite, about 2 minutes more. Add leeks and garlic, season with salt and pepper, and cook until leeks are bright green and just getting tender, 4–5 minutes. Add stock and bring to a simmer.

Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente, 8–10 minutes. Drain and transfer to skillet with mushroom mixture. Add remaining ⅓ cup Parmesan and cook, tossing, until sauce is nice and silky and creamy and lightly coats pasta, 2–3 minutes.
Serve pasta topped with reserved almond mixture.
Do Ahead: Pasta can be made 1 day ahead; cover and chill.

name: Orecchiette With Spinach And Rosemary Fried Chickpeas

ingredients.item: Country crock® plant butter with olive oil

instructions: Bring a medium pot of salted water to a boil. Add the pasta to the pot of boiling water and cook to al dente package. Reserve one cup of pasta water, then drain.
In a medium Dutch oven, heat 2 tablespoons of Country Crock® Plant Butter with Olive Oil on medium-high until bubbling.
Add the rosemary sprigs and fry, flipping once, 3-4 minutes until crispy and fragrant. Transfer sprigs to a paper towel-lined plate, leaving the Country Crock® Plant Butter with Olive Oil in the pot.
When cool enough to handle, strip the greens off the stem, allowing to crumble between your fingers, and set aside.
Add the chickpeas to the rosemary-scented Country Crock® Plant Butter. Cook on medium heat, stirring occasionally, 5-7 minutes, until slightly browned and crispy.
Add the crushed red pepper flake, garlic and spinach and 1 Tbsp of pasta water. Cook for 1-2 minutes until the garlic is slightly softened and the spinach becomes wilted.

To the pot of chickpeas and spinach, add the cooked pasta, lemon zest, 2 Tbsp Country Crock® Plant Butter and ¼ cup pasta water. Cook, stirring frequently, 1 to 2 minutes, or until the pasta is coated and creamy, adding 1 Tbsp of pasta water at a time if necessary to fully coat. Turn off the heat and stir in the crumbled rosemary, reserving a pinch for garnish. Season to taste.
Plate each serving of pasta and finish with the juice of one lemon wedge, the reserved rosemary, parsley, a lemon wedge on the side, and a pat of Country Crock® Plant Butter if desired  - (1/2) Tbsp.

name: Orecchiette With Squash, Chiles, And Hazelnuts

ingredients.item: . fresh orecchiette (see fresh pasta) or other fresh or dried small pasta
Grated parmesan plus more for serving

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Spread out hazelnuts on a small rimmed baking sheet and toast, tossing occasionally, until golden, about 6 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop; set aside.
Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente (about 5 minutes for fresh pasta). Drain, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking liquid.

Meanwhile, heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add squash and cook, tossing occasionally, until crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Add garlic and ¼ tsp. red pepper flakes and cook, stirring, just until garlic begins to brown, about 2 minutes. Immediately add ½ cup pasta cooking liquid to keep garlic from burning; reduce heat to low and gradually add butter, swirling skillet and adding more pasta cooking liquid as needed, until a thick, glossy sauce forms.
Add pasta to skillet with squash and sauce and toss to coat. Add lemon juice, ¼ cup Parmesan, 2 Tbsp. mint, and remaining ¼ tsp. red pepper flakes and toss to combine; season with salt and pepper.
Serve pasta topped with reserved hazelnuts, more Parmesan, and remaining 2 Tbsp. mint.
DO AHEAD: Hazelnuts can be toasted 5 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

name: Orecchiette With Traditional Puglia Cime Di Rapa
original_name: Orecchiette con cime di rapa tradicional de Puglia

ingredients.item: 400 g de orecchiette (pueden ser frescas o secas)
500 g de cime di rapa limpias (o grelos/nabizas como alternativa)
4 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
2 cucharadas de pan rallado tostado (opcional, para servir)

instructions: Lavamos bien las cime di rapa y retiramos los tallos más duros, dejando las hojas y las flores tiernas.
En una olla grande con abundante agua con sal, cocemos las cime di rapa durante unos 5 minutos.
En esa misma olla, añadimos las orecchiette y cocemos todo junto siguiendo el tiempo que indique el paquete de pasta (unos 10-12 minutos si es seca).

Mientras se cuece la pasta con la verdura, calentamos el aceite de oliva en una sartén grande. Añadimos los ajos laminados, las anchoas y la guindilla, y dejamos que se sofrían a fuego medio hasta que el ajo esté dorado y las anchoas se deshagan.
Escurrimos bien la pasta con las cime di rapa y la pasamos directamente a la sartén con el sofrito. Salteamos todo junto un par de minutos para que se mezclen los sabores.
Servimos caliente, con un poco de pan rallado tostado por encima si queremos darle un toque crujiente.

name: Oregano And Parmesan Bread Recipe
original_name: Receta de pan de orégano y parmesano

ingredients.item: 2 cda de orégano seco, en escamas

instructions: Inicia tu receta, y agrega agua tibia, el azúcar y la levadura fresca.
Mezcla muy bien y deja reposar unos minutos para que se active.
En otro bol, coloca el harina de trigo y haz un volcán en el centro tipo orificio.
Ahora, agrega el huevo, la mantequilla, el azúcar, el orégano, el queso parmesano, la sal y la mezcla de la levadura ya activada.

Con la ayuda de una paleta o cuchara de madera, vas a ir integrando de afuera hacia adentro hasta que se vaya integrando. Cuando veas que tu masa esté tomando forma, pásala a la encimera de tu cocina o mesa de trabajo.
Amasa por 10 minutos aproximadamente hasta que tome una consistencia suave y esponjosa. Estará lista cuando no se pegue a tus manos y tenga una consistencia suave pero firme.
Haz de tu masa una bola y guarda en un recipiente engrasado, tapa con papel film y deja reposar por aproximadamente 2 horas.
Pasado ese tiempo, tu masa debió aumentar su tamaño. uita el aire de la masa y amasa durante 3 minutos.
Con un cuchillo o cortador de plástico, divide la masa en 4 partes iguales. Deja reposar 15 minutos mientras lo dejas tapado con una toalla limpia.
Mezcla en un recipiente pequeño el orégano y el queso parmesano que dejaste para decorar.

Pasado el tiempo, toma un bollito, presiona para retirar el aire y forma un rectángulo con la masa, enrolla y colócalo sobre la bandeja para el horno, esta debe estar previamente engrasada y enharinada o con papel pergamino. Barniza cada pan con el huevo batido.
Luego esparce por encima de los panes el orégano y el queso parmesano.
Luego haz unos cortes no tan profundos de manera vertical sobre el pan. Cubre nuevamente con una toalla limpia y deja fermentar durante 1 hora.
15 minutos antes de que culmine el proceso de levado, precalienta el horno a 390° F.
Hornea durante 35 minutos, hasta que tomen un color dorado.
Terminado, deja reposar y disfruta.

name: Oregano Chicken
instructions: Ροδίζουμε καλά το κρέας σε ελαιόλαδο μαζί με το σκόρδο για 7΄- 8΄.
Σβήνουμε με το χυμό λεμονιού.
Προσθέτουμε το κρασί και 1 φλ. νερό.
Μόλις πάρει βράση το κοτόπουλο χαμηλώνουμε τη φωτιά και σιγοβράζουμε για 1 ώρα και 15΄, μέχρι να μαλακώσει.
Ενδιάμεσα ρίχνουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι.
Προς το τέλος του χρόνου βρασμού πασπαλίζουμε με τη ρίγανη.
Όταν το κατεβάσουμε από τη φωτιά, το φαγητό πρέπει να μείνει με πολύ λίγη σάλτσα, σχεδόν με το λάδι του.
Το σερβίρουμε με το πλιγούρι λαχανικών.

name: Oregano Eggs (_uova All'origano_)
instructions: Set a large (12-inch) nonstick skillet over a burner that's still off. Swirl the pan with the olive oil, and gently break all the eggs to fill the pan, taking care not to break the yolks. Sprinkle with the salt and dried oregano. Sprinkle the grated cheese over all.
Cover the skillet, and turn the flame to medium-low. Cook until the whites are set and the yolks are done to your liking, about 7 to 8 minutes for still-runny yolks.
This is a great breakfast or main course, or, served over some arugula, it can be an appetizer.

name: Oregano-chile Chimichurri
instructions: Combine 1/3 cup dried oregano and 1 1/2 Tbsp. crushed red pepper flakes in a small bowl. Add 1 cup warm water and massage mixture with your hands. Let stand until oregano and pepper flakes are softened and water is absorbed, about 15 minutes. Add 1/2 cup chopped flat-leaf parsley, 4 minced garlic cloves, and 1/2 tsp. kosher salt. Stir in 2/3 cup (or more) olive or sunflower oil; let stand for at least 1 hour or chill for up to 2 days to let the flavors meld. Season sauce to taste with red wine vinegar and more garlic, salt, or oil, if desired.

name: Oregano-marinated Tomato Salad | Epicurious

ingredients.item: . mixed heirloom tomatoes (preferably various colors and sizes)
ingredients.prep: cut into wedges or halved if small

instructions:
Toss tomatoes, oil, oregano, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl. Let sit, tossing occasionally, until juicy and deeply flavored, at least 30 minutes and up to 1 hour.
Editor’s note: Head this way for more of our very best tomato recipes →

name: Oreo Balls
instructions: Mix crushed Oreo cookies and cream cheese in a large bowl until well blended.
Use your hands to shape mixture into 48 (1-inch) balls; place on a tray and freeze until thoroughly chilled, about 10 minutes.
Line a shallow pan with waxed paper. Dip Oreo balls in melted chocolate; place in a single layer on the prepared pan.
Refrigerate until firm, about 1 hour. Store in a covered container in the refrigerator.
Enjoy!

name: Oreo Cake Recipe

ingredients.item: 150 gr de galletas oreo ((sin la crema))
2 citas pequeñas de levadura en polvo
Crema del relleno de oreo ((la que reservaste de las galletas anteriores))

instructions: Inicia tu receta, separando la galleta y la crema de la oreo. Para la base se necesitan sólo 150 gramos de la galleta. Debes reservar la crema.
Una vez tengas las galletas, tritúralas hasta que queden como pulverizadas. Puedes hacerlo en una licuadora o procesador o manualmente con un rodillo.
Precalienta tu horno a 180° C.
En una batidora, añade los tres huevos, la sal y el azúcar y bate hasta que todo se integre y tengas una mezcla cremosa y aumente su volumen.
Ahora, a una velocidad media, vierte de a poco el aceite de oliva. Es decir en forma de hilo, mezcla hasta que se integre.
Termina de mezclar y desmonta tu bol de la batidora. Ahora, agrega las galletas trituradas y la levadura en polvo.
Con la ayuda de una espátula, mezcla con movimientos envolventes hasta que se integre.

Engrasa cuatro moldes pequeños y en cada uno vas a verter un poco de la mezcla de estos bizcochos. La idea es que tengamos unas láminas. También puedes hornearlo en un solo molde y cuando esté frío, lo cortadas en láminas de tamaños iguales.
Hornea durante 25- 30 minutos. Hasta que al pinchar en el centro del bizcocho el palillo salga limpio.
Hornea, retira del horno, deja enfriar, desmolda y reserva.

name: Oreo Cheesecake Bites
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Line a 9x13-inch baking pan with foil, with ends extending over the sides.
Finely crush 24 cookies and mix with melted butter. Press onto the bottom of the prepared pan. Chop remaining cookies and set aside.

Beat cream cheese and sugar in a large bowl until blended. Add sour cream and vanilla; mix well. Add eggs, one at a time, beating after each until just blended. Gently stir chopped cookies into batter. Pour over crust.
Bake in the preheated oven until sides are set and center is almost set, 35 to 40 minutes. Remove from the oven and set pan on a wire rack until completely cool, about 1 hour.

Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours. Remove from the refrigerator and use the foil overhand to remove cheesecake from the pan. Cut into 36 squares and transfer to a waxed or parchment paper-lined baking tray.

Place semisweet chocolate in a microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on 50% power in 30-second intervals, stirring frequently, until melted. Repeat with dark chocolate. Pour melted chocolates into separate zip-top bags. Snip a corner off each bag and drizzle over the cheesecake bites. Chill until ready to serve.

name: Oreo Cheesecake Cups
instructions: Preheat the oven to 135°C (135 degrees C). Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper liners; place 1 cookie into each.

Beat cream cheese in a medium bowl with an electric mixer until creamy. Gradually add eggs, sour cream, sugar, and vanilla extract, beating well after each addition. Stir in chopped cookies with a spatula.
Spoon batter into the prepared tin, filling each cup almost to the top.
Bake in the preheated oven until set, 20 to 22 minutes. Transfer cups to a cooling rack. Refrigerate until firm, at least 4 hours.

name: Oreo Cookie Cheesecake Bowl
original_name: Taça de cheesecake de bolachas oreo

ingredients.item: 225 g  queijo creme à temperatura ambiente
36 bolachas oreo ou  chocolate com recheio de baunilha

instructions: Reserve algumas bolachas para a decoração e triture as restantes num robot ou picadora, ate formar uma textura de areia molhada.
Misture o queijo creme com metade das natas e bata com a batedeira, juntando aos poucos o açúcar em pó.
À parte, bata as restantes natas até estarem firmes e depois envolva muito bem com o preparado anterior.

No fundo de uma taça de servir, espalhe uma boa camada de bolacha triturada e depois outra de creme. Repita sucessivamente as camadas ate ao topo da taça. Polvilhe com algumas das bolachas que reservou, previamente desfeitas, e decore com as restantes inteiras. Leve ao frigorífico durante 2 horas e sirva.

name: Oreo Cookie Gourmet Pudding Shots

ingredients.item: Cookies and cream instant pudding mix
Container frozen whipped topping (such as cool whip®)

instructions: Stir milk, vodka, and pudding mix together in a bowl until mixture thickens. Fold in whipped topping. Spoon into disposable shot cups and refrigerate until chilled, at least 30 minutes.

name: Oreo Cookie Sawdust
instructions: Triture as bolachas e reserve. Demolhe as folhas de gelatina em água fria, durante 5 minutos. Escorra a gelatina e leve a derreter no micro-ondas, sem deixar ferver.
Coloque as natas numa taça, bata bem, adicione o leite condensado e a gelatina derretida e envolva.
Distribua o creme por taças e faça camadas de creme e bolachas trituradas, de forma a parecer um vaso de flores.
Leve ao frigorífico até solidificar. Decore com uma flor e sirva fresco.

name: Oreo Cookies And Cream Dessert

ingredients.item: Container frozen whipped topping (such as cool whip®)

instructions: Combine cream cheese, powdered sugar, and butter in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until creamy. Add milk and vanilla pudding mix and beat until well combined and all lumps are gone. Fold in whipped topping.

Distribute 1/2 of the chocolate sandwich cookies on the bottom of a 9x13-inch dish. Cover with the pudding mixture and top with remaining cookie chunks. Cover and refrigerate for 8 hours to overnight.

name: Oreo Cupcakes With White Chocolate Buttercream
original_name: Cupcakes de Oreo con buttercream de chocolate blanco

ingredients.item: 115 g de mantequilla sin sal a temperatura ambiente
1 cucharadita y media de levadura royal
250 g de mantequilla sin sal a temperatura ambiente
250 g de icing sugar (o, en su defecto, azúcar glas)

instructions: Precalentamos el horno a 180º (160º si es con ventilador). Preparamos la bandeja para cupcakes con 12 cápsulas de papel (yo he usado flaneras de porcelana para horno, simplemente hay que enmantequillarlas antes de usarlas). Tamizamos la harina con la levadura química en un bol y reservamos. Batimos la mantequilla con el azúcar hasta que se integren y la mezcla se aclare. Añadimos los huevos, uno a uno, batiendo hasta que se incorporen. Agregamos la mitad de la harina y batimos a velocidad baja hasta que se incorpore. A continuación, añadimos la leche, mezclada con el extracto de vainilla, y volvemos a batir. Agregamos la otra mitad de la harina y batimos a velocidad baja hasta que la mezcla sea homogénea. Incorporamos los trozos de galletas oreo, removiendo con una espátula.

Repartimos la mezcla en las cápsulas, sin llenarlas más de 2/3. Horneamos 22-25 minutos o hasta que un palillo salga limpio. Dejamos enfriar los cupcakes en el molde 5 minutos y después pasamos a una rejilla, hasta que se enfríen por completo.
Cuando estén fríos, los descorazonamos y los rellenamos usando el sirope de chocolate.

name: Oreo Fluff Salad
instructions: Whisk milk and instant pudding mix together in a large serving bowl until thickened, about 2 minutes. Fold in whipped topping until incorporated.
Stir crushed cookies into pudding until well blended. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap; refrigerate until chilled and thickened, at least 1 hour to overnight.

name: Oreo Freeze
instructions: Combine chocolate sandwich cookies and melted butter in a large bowl. Press mixture into the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish. Spread softened ice cream over the cookie crust and place in the freezer.

Combine evaporated milk, sugar, cocoa powder, butter, and unsweetened chocolate in a saucepan. Bring to a simmer over medium heat. Continue to cook, stirring frequently, until thickened, 10 to 15 minutes. Remove from the heat and allow to cool.
Spread cooled chocolate sauce over frozen ice cream layer and return to the freezer for 5 to 10 minutes.
Spread whipped topping over chocolate sauce layer and top with peanuts and chocolate chips. Put back in the freezer until frozen, at least 15 minutes.
Allow to soften for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.

name: Oreo Lasagna

ingredients.item: Container frozen whipped topping (such as cool whip®)

instructions: Crush chocolate sandwich cookies. Mix in butter. Press mixture into a 9x13-inch baking pan to make the crust. Refrigerate crust.
Beat cream cheese until fluffy. Add sugar and 2 tablespoons milk; mix well. Stir in 1 1/4 cup whipped topping. Spread mixture onto the crust and refrigerate.
Mix pudding with 3 1/4 cups milk until thickened, about 5 minutes. Spread over the cream cheese layer. Refrigerate lasagna for 10 minutes.
Spread remaining whipped topping over the lasagna and sprinkle with chocolate chips. Refrigerate for 4 hours.

name: Oreo Milkshake
instructions: Pour milk, Oreos, and ice cream in a blender and blend properly.
Pour into a glass, top as desired, and serve.

name: Oreo Mint Chocolate Mousse
instructions: Beat pudding mix and milk in medium bowl with whisk 2 minutes.
Chop 10 cookies coarsely; stir into pudding with whipped topping until blended. Spoon into 8 dessert dishes.
Refrigerate 1 hour. Cut remaining cookies in half. Top desserts with cookie halves and fruit. Garnish with mint, if desired.

name: Oreo Pie
instructions: Beat milk and pudding mix together in a large bowl with an electric mixer until thick and smooth, about 2 minutes. Add crushed cookies; stir to combine.
Refrigerate pudding mixture until partially set, about 10 minutes.
Spread pudding mixture into baked pie crust; top with whipped topping.

name: Oreo Rum Balls
instructions: Melt chocolate in a microwave-safe glass or ceramic bowl for 15 seconds at a time, stirring after each interval, until almost melted, 1 to 3 minutes. Mix crushed wafers, corn syrup, and rum into melted chocolate until well combined.
Cover and refrigerate until firm enough to handle, about 1 hour.
Shape into 24 balls and roll in chocolate sprinkles to coat. Place in a covered container and refrigerate for 2 days to allow flavors to develop.

name: Oreo Semifreddo Recipe

ingredients.item: 3 pacotes  oreo ou bolachas de chocolate

instructions: Num robot de cozinha, triture 2 dos pacotes de bolachas, juntamente com a manteiga derretida. Forre o fundo de uma forma de fundo amovível e leve ao frio.

Numa tigela, misture bem o queijo creme com o açúcar. À parte, triture o restante pacote de bolachas e reserve. Demolhe a gelatina num pouco de água. Reserve 4 colheres (sopa) de natas e bata as restantes até ficarem firmes.

Envolva o creme de queijo com as bolachas trituradas. Aqueça as natas que reservou e dissolva nelas a gelatina escorrida. Incorpore no creme de queijo e mexa bem. Por fim, junte as natas batidas e envolva.
Deite o creme na forma, sobre a base de bolacha, e leve ao congelador durante cerca de 4 a 5 horas. Desenforme cuidadosamente e sirva.

name: Oreo Triple Layer Chocolate Pie

ingredients.item: (4 serving size) jell-o chocolate flavor instant pudding & pie filling

instructions: Finely crush 24 of the cookies; mix with butter. Press firmly onto bottom and up side of 9-inch pie plate.
Pour milk into large bowl. Add pudding mixes. Beat with wire whisk until well blended and thickened, about 2 minutes.

Spoon 1 ½ cups of chocolate pudding into crust. Gently stir 1/2 of the whipped topping into remaining pudding; spread over pudding layer in crust. Chop remaining 8 cookies; stir into remaining whipped topping. Spread over pie.
Refrigerate pie until set, about 4 hours.

name: Oreo Truffles
instructions: Melt chocolate in a saucepan over low heat, stirring occasionally, 4 to 6 minutes.
While the chocolate is melting, place 9 cream-filled sandwich cookies in a food processor and blend until finely crushed. Transfer crumbs to a bowl and reserve for decorating.

Add remaining cookies to the food processor and blend until finely crushed. Transfer crumbs to a large bowl and stir in cream cheese; mix until well-blended. Roll mixture into 42 balls, about 1-inch in diameter.
Place each ball in melted chocolate and use two forks to roll it until fully coated. Lift the ball with both forks and allow excess chocolate to drip off.
Place coated truffle on a wax paper-lined baking sheet and sprinkle with reserved cookie crumbs to decorate. Repeat to make remaining truffles.
Refrigerate truffles until firm, at least 1 hour. Keep in the refrigerator until just before serving. Enjoy!

name: Oreo Wet Brownie
instructions: 1. Öncelikle kare borcamı tereyağı ile yağlayın ve yabanına göre yağlı kağıt serip yapıştırın.
2.  Küçük bir tencerede tereyağını eritin.
3.  Çikolataları kırıp içine atın.
4.  Çırpma teli ile çikolatalar eriyene kadar karıştırın.
5. Ayrı bir çırpma kabında yumurtalar ve şekeri yaklaşık 4 dakika hızlı devirde çırpın.
6. İçine un, kakao ve tuzu ekleyin ve hafif çırptıktan sonra yavaş yavaş tereyağlı çikolatayı ekleyin.
7. Spatula ile karıştırın, borcama dökün.
8. Üzerine oreoları kırıp koyun ve fırında 30 dakika pişirin.
9. Hazır olan browniyi üzerine çilek koyup ılık olarak servis yapın.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Oreo White Chocolate Mousse Cake

ingredients.item: Holiday chocolate sandwich cookies (such as oreos®)

instructions: Place 24 cookies in a zip top bag and seal it. Finely crush the cookies with a rolling pin. Transfer cookie crumbs to a mixing bowl. Drizzle melted butter over the crumbs; mix well. Press crumbs on the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan, forming a crust.

Pour milk into a saucepan. Sprinkle gelatin on the milk; let stand 1 minute. Place pan over low heat; stir milk until gelatin dissolves, about 3 minutes. Add white chocolate chips; stir until melted, about 3 minutes. Refrigerate until mixture is slightly thickened, about 30 minutes.
Beat cream in a chilled glass or metal bowl with an electric mixer until soft peaks form.
Coarsely break up or chop 24 cookies. Fold cookie pieces and whipped cream into the white chocolate mixture. Spoon into prepared springform pan. Refrigerate 6 hours or overnight.
Twist the remaining cookies into 2 rounds each. Garnish cake with cookie halves and fresh raspberries.

name: Oreo® Cheesecake With Kit Kat® And M'm's®
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9-inch springform pan.
Mix crushed cookies, melted butter, and 2 tablespoons white sugar together in a bowl; press into the bottom of the prepared springform pan forming a crust.

Beat the four 8-ounce packages cream cheese and 1 1/2 cups white sugar together in a large bowl until smooth; gradually beat in 3/4 cup milk until smooth. Beat eggs, 1 at a time, into cream cheese mixture, beating well after each addition. Mix sour cream, flour, and 1 tablespoon vanilla extract into cream cheese mixture until smooth.
Pour 1/3 of the cream cheese mixture over the crust; top with chopped cookies. Pour remaining cream cheese mixture over cookies.
Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour. Turn off oven and let cake cool in oven with the door closed for 15 minutes. Refrigerate cheesecake until completely chilled, at least 1 hour.

Beat confectioners' sugar, half 8-ounce package cream cheese, and chocolate-hazelnut spread together in a bowl. Add 1 1/2 teaspoons milk, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, and salt to cream cheese mixture until frosting is smooth.
Remove the ring of the springform pan from cheesecake. Spread frosting over entire cheesecake. Place wafer candy bars around the sides of cheesecake. Sprinkle chocolate pieces over top of cheesecake.

name: Oreo´ Devils
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Shape red fondant into 72 little horns relative to the size of the cookies. Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper.'}

{'step': '2', 'description': 'Place red confectioner’s coating in the top of a double boiler over simmering water. Stir constantly, scraping down the sides with a rubber spatula to avoid scorching, until melted, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat.'}

{'step': '3', 'description': 'Use a spoon to cover the top and sides of each cookie with melted red coating. Place on the prepared baking sheet. Stick 2 small devil horns near the top and add 2 candy eyeballs. Let stand until dry, about 1 hour.'}

name: Oriental Chicken
instructions: Coloque a água no copo do robot e os bifes de frango no tabuleiro superior do recipiente para cozinhar a vapor. Tempere o frango com um pouco de sal, feche, encaixe no copo e programe na temperatura vapor, durante 15 minutos, na velocidade 1.

Após esse tempo, retire o recipiente com o frango e reserve. Coloque os noodles numa tigela e regue-os com a água a ferver do copo. Deixe repousar durante 5 minutos e depois escorra e reserve 80 ml da água. Reserve também os noodles quentes.

No copo limpo, coloque os alhos sem casca e ligue 5 segundos na velocidade 5. Acrescente o óleo de sésamo, o molho de soja, a manteiga de amendoim, a malagueta cortada em rodelas, a cenoura e o aipo em pedacinhos, o alho-francês em rodelas e os coentros picados. Programe na temperatura vapor, durante 5 minutos, na velocidade 2 invertida.

De seguida, adicione a água que reservou, os espinafres e o sumo de lima e repita a programação por mais 5 minutos. Desfie o frango, junte aos noodles, regue com o molho e envolva tudo. Sirva de seguida.

name: Oriental Ice Cream

ingredients.item: 250 mlκρέμα γάλακτος (κρύα και χτυπημένη σε παχύρρευστη μορφή)
Φιστίκια αιγίνης ωμά για το σερβίρισμα
Άχνη και ανθόνερο για το πασπάλισμα
250 mlκρέμα γάλακτος (κρύα και χτυπημένη σε παχύρρευστη μορφή)
Φιστίκια αιγίνης ωμά για το σερβίρισμα
Άχνη και ανθόνερο για το πασπάλισμα

instructions: Χτυπάμε με μίξερ χειρός τους κρόκους µε τη ζάχαρη για 5΄-6΄ µέχρι να ασπρίσουν και να λιώσει η ζάχαρη.
Ζεσταίνουμε το γάλα στην κατσαρόλα.
Λίγο λίγο και πάντα ανακατεύοντας ρίχνουμε το ζεστό γάλα στα αυγά.
Ξαναβάζουμε το µείγµα στην κατσαρόλα.
Σε µέτρια φωτιά και πάντα ανακατεύοντας µε ξύλινη κουτάλα, αφήνουμε για λίγα λεπτά να πυκνώσει το υγρό.
Εάν έχετε θερμόμετρο, στους 70οC είναι έτοιμο.  Αλλιώς, όταν µένει ελαφριά στρώση κρέµας στην κουτάλα το µείγµα είναι έτοιμο. Προσοχή, δεν βράζουµε το µείγµα!
Αποσύρουμε την αραιή κρέµα από τη φωτιά.
Προσθέτουμε το µέλι και τις 2 κ.σ. ανθόνερο.
Αφήνουμε το µείγµα να κρυώσει καλά.
Τότε προσθέτουμε την χτυπημένη κρέµα και απαλά διπλώνουμε το µείγµα µε σπάτουλα.
Αν έχουμε παγωτοµηχανή, χτυπάμε σε αυτήν το παγωτό, αλλιώς βάζουμε το µείγµα στην κατάψυξη και µόλις αρχίσει να κάνει σώμα, να πήζει ελαφρά, το χτυπάμε µε µίξερ να αφρατέψει.
Ξαναπαγώνουµε.
Επαναλαμβάνουμε 3-4 φορές την ίδια διαδικασία για πιο βελούδινη υφή, χωρίς κρυστάλλους.
Σερβίρουµε µε φιστίκια Αιγίνης, ραντίζουμε µε λίγο ανθόνερο και πασπαλίζουμε µε λίγη άχνη.

name: Oriental Meatballs
instructions: 1. Bulguru ayıklayın.
2.  Geniş bir kaba alıp sıcak suyu ilave edin.
3.  Kapağını kapatıp bulgur yumuşayıncaya kadar bekletin.
4.  Soğanı soyup rendeleyin.
5. Bulgur şişince nane, soğan, un, yumurta akı ve tuz ilave edin.
6.  Kıvamını buluncaya kadar ara sıra su serperek iyice yoğurun.
7.  Ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparıp oval köfteler hazırlayın.
8.  Bir tencereyi suyla doldurup tuz ilave edin ve kaynatın.
9.  Hazırladığınız köfteleri ilave edip dağılmamasına dikkat ederek haşlayın.
10.  Köfteleri kevgirle suyun içinden alıp servis tabağına dizin.
11.  Sarımsakları ezip yoğurtla karıştırın.
12.  Margarini küçük bir tavada eritip pul biberi ilave ederek kızdırın.
13.  Sarımsaklı yoğurdu köftelerin üzerine yayıp yağda kızdırılmış pul biberi gezdirerek dökün.
14.  Sıcak olarak servis yapın.
15.  Afiyet olsun.
16. Dilerseniz, bulgur ve irmik ile hazırlanan fellah köfte tarifine göz atabilirsiniz.

name: Oriental Noodles

ingredients.item: 300 g  tiras de peito de frango

instructions: Deite um fio de azeite numa frigideira, leve ao lume, junte a cebola e o alho, picados, e deixe refogar.

Acrescente as tiras de frango e o molho de soja e deixe cozinhar, em lume brando, até o frango ficar macio. Quase no final, junte os pimentos limpos e cortados em tiras e deixe saltear mais um pouco, mexendo de vez em quando.
Coza os noodles de acordo com as indicações da embalagem. Escorra e envolva com o preparado de frango. Adicione o óleo de sésamo, sementes a gosto, os rebentos e cebolinho picado, mexa bem e sirva.

name: Original Bisquick® Knock-off Gluten-free Version
instructions: Grind the powdered milk until fine.

Combine rice flour, potato starch, tapioca flour, powdered milk, rice cereal, powdered egg whites, sugar, baking powder, cream of tatar, and ascorbic acid together in a bowl; mix with an electric mixer. Add butter and mix until well combined. Transfer to an airtight container; store in the refrigerator.

name: Original Bosnian Pastry
instructions: 1. Ilık suya, elenmiş un ve tuzu azar azar ilave ederek yumuşak bir hamur hazırlayın ve pürüzsüz olana kadar yoğurun.
2.  Hamuru yoğurduktan sonra sıcak havalarda 30 dakika, soğuk havalarda ise 1 saat kadar dinlendirin.
3. Hamuru 2 eşit parçaya bölerek yoğurun.
4.  İkinci bezeyi yoğurduktan sonra, bezeleri birer kere daha yoğurun ve üstlerini bir örtü ile kapatarak, 30 dakika daha dinlendirin.
5. Sıvı yağ ile tereyağını bir kaba alarak karıştırın.
6. İç harç için, patatesleri bir çatalla ezdikten sonra tüm malzemeyi bir kaba alarak karıştırın.
7. Dinlenmiş hamuru parmağınızla kontrol edin.
8.  Eğer bastırdığınızda hamur yumuşak ve ele yapışmıyorsa açmaya uygun kıvamdadır.
9.  Tezgaha un serptikten sonra bir merdane yardımıyla kenarlarına bastırarak, içten dışa doğru ve sürekli çevirerek 0,5 cm kalınlığında açın.
10. Hamur tepsi büyüklüğüne geldiğinde 4 yemek kaşığı yağ sürün ve ellerinizin üstüne alıp döndürün.
11.  Uzunlamasına hamuru masaya yayın ve yavaş yavaş, çok çekmeden etrafında döne döne hamuru tekrar açın.
12.  Büyüyen hamurun kenarlarına iç harcı koyun ve üzerine tekrar 2-3 yemek kaşığı yağı bir kaşık ucu ile yayın.
13.  Hamuru çevire çevire sarın ve ortadan ikiye keserek iki uzun börek elde edin.
14.  Yine biraz esneterek uzatın ve arada yağlayarak kesilmiş yerleri altta kalacak şekilde, yağlanmış yuvarlak bir fırın tepsisinin içine spiral şeklinde yerleştirin.
15.  Üzerine kalan yağı sürün ve önceden ısıtılmış 200 derecedeki fırında altı ve üstü kızarana kadar pişirin.

name: Original Boza Recipe At Home

ingredients.item: Kabuksuz darı yerine, boza yapımında geleneksel olarak kullanılan ince bulgur tercih edilebilir. daha yumuşak bir içim sağlar.
Darının bir kısmını pirinç ile karıştırarak daha pürüzsüz ve yoğun kıvamlı bir boza elde edebilirsiniz.
Toz şeker yerine, daha aromatik bir tat için esmer şeker kullanılabilir; bu seçim bozaya hafif karamelimsi bir lezzet kazandırır.
Şeker miktarını azaltarak daha az tatlı bir sonuç elde edebilir ya da artırarak daha yoğun bir tat yakalayabilirsiniz.
Daha farklı bir aroma için şekerin küçük bir bölümünü bal ile değiştirebilirsiniz (balı karışım ılıdıktan sonra eklemeniz önerilir).
Kıvam çok koyu olursa kontrollü şekilde ılık içme suyu ekleyerek içimi daha akışkan hale getirebilirsiniz.
Servis sırasında klasik leblebi yerine kavrulmuş nohut veya tarçın kullanarak farklı sunumlar deneyebilirsiniz.
Daha belirgin bir fermantasyon aroması isteyenler, bekleme süresini biraz uzatabilir; daha hafif tat sevenler ise süreyi kısaltabilir.

instructions: 1. Darıyı bol suyla yıkayıp süzdükten sonra bir tencereye aktarın.
2. Üzerine suyu ilave edin ve orta ateşte, taneler iyice yumuşayıp açılana kadar pişirin.
3. Ocaktan aldığınız karışımı blender yardımıyla tamamen pürüzsüz hale getirin.
4.  Ardından derin bir cam kaseye veya kavanoza boşaltın.
5. Toz şekeri ekleyip eriyene kadar karıştırın.
6. Karışım oda sıcaklığına geldiğinde üzerini streç filmle kapatın ya da kavanozun kapağını kapatın.
7.  Direkt güneş almayan serin bir ortamda bekletin.
8. Fermantasyon sürecinde her gün bir kez tahta kaşıkla karıştırın ve kıvamını kontrol edin.
9.  Yaklaşık üç gün sonunda istediğiniz aromaya ulaşmazsa bir gün daha bekletebilirsiniz.
10. Süre tamamlandığında karışımı ince delikli plastik bir süzgeçten geçirerek tortusundan ayırın ve temiz bir şişeye doldurun.
11. Tadını kontrol ederek damak zevkinize göre biraz daha şeker ekleyip karıştırabilirsiniz.
12. Şişeyi buzdolabına kaldırın ve içmeden önce bir gece soğumaya bırakın.
13. Ertesi gün bozayı servis edebilir ya da buzdolabında birkaç gün muhafaza edebilirsiniz.
14.  Bekledikçe lezzetinin daha belirgin hale geleceğini unutmayın.
15.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Original Cinnamon Roll Recipe

ingredients.item: Beyaz un yerine tam buğday unu veya karışık tahıllı un kullanabilirsiniz; böylece daha lifli ve besleyici olur.
Süt yerine badem sütü, soya sütü veya yulaf sütü gibi bitkisel sütler kullanılabilir.
Tereyağı yerine hafif bir seçenek için margarin veya hindistancevizi yağı tercih edebilirsiniz.
Kahverengi şeker yerine hindistancevizi şekeri veya az miktarda bal kullanabilirsiniz.
Tereyağı yerine eritilmiş hindistancevizi yağı veya yumuşak margarin kullanabilirsiniz.
Tarçın yerine karışık baharat (muskat, zencefil, kakule) ekleyerek farklı aromalar katabilirsiniz.
Krem peynir yerine labne peyniri veya vegan krem peynir kullanabilirsiniz.
Pudra şekeri yerine toz şekeri robotta öğüterek veya az miktarda akçaağaç şurubu/kayısı şurubu ile hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Vanilya yerine vanilya özü veya vanilin yerine taze limon kabuğu rendesi ekleyerek farklı bir aroma yaratabilirsiniz.
Hamurun içine veya dolgunun üzerine ceviz, fındık veya badem serpiştirerek çıtır doku ekleyebilirsiniz.
çikolata parçacıkları veya kuru meyve (kuru üzüm, yaban mersini) ekleyerek tatlıyı çeşitlendirebilirsiniz.

Krem peynir yerine labne peyniri veya vegan krem peynir kullanabilirsiniz.
Pudra şekeri yerine toz şekeri robotta öğüterek veya az miktarda akçaağaç şurubu/kayısı şurubu ile hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Vanilya yerine vanilya özü veya vanilin yerine taze limon kabuğu rendesi ekleyerek farklı bir aroma yaratabilirsiniz.
Hamurun içine veya dolgunun üzerine ceviz, fındık veya badem serpiştirerek çıtır doku ekleyebilirsiniz.
çikolata parçacıkları veya kuru meyve (kuru üzüm, yaban mersini) ekleyerek tatlıyı çeşitlendirebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Ilık süt, şeker ve mayayı karıştırıp 5–10 dakika bekleyin.
2.  Tereyağı ve yumurtaları ekleyip karıştırın.
3.  Un ve tuzu ekleyip yumuşak, yapışmayan bir hamur yoğurun.
4.  Hamuru 1 saat kadar, hacmi iki katına çıkana kadar mayalanmaya bırakın.
5. Oda sıcaklığındaki tereyağı, kahverengi şeker ve tarçını karıştırın.
6. Mayalanmış hamuru dikdörtgen şekilde açın.
7.  Dolguyu üzerine eşit şekilde yayın ve rulo şeklinde sarın.
8. Ruloyu yaklaşık 3–4 cm kalınlığında dilimleyin ve yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine dizin.
9. Dilimleri 20–30 dakika kadar tekrar mayalanmaya bırakın.
10. Önceden 180 derece ısıtılmış fırında 20–25 dakika, üzeri hafifçe kızarana kadar pişirin.
11. Krem peynir, tereyağı, pudra şekeri ve vanilyayı karıştırarak pürüzsüz bir glazür elde edin.
12.  Ilık cinnamon roll’ların üzerine sürün ve servis edin.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Original Güllaç Recipe

ingredients.item: Ceviz yerine antep fıstığı, fındık veya badem kullanarak farklı aromalar elde edebilirsiniz.
Toz şeker miktarını azaltıp bir kısmını bal ile değiştirerek daha hafif bir tat yakalayabilirsiniz.
Vanilin yerine birkaç damla gül suyu ya da portakal çiçeği suyu ekleyerek tatlıya daha geleneksel ve hoş bir koku kazandırabilirsiniz.
Sütün bir bölümünü laktozsuz sütle değiştirerek farklı beslenme tercihine uygun hale getirebilirsiniz.
Katmanların arasına ince dilimlenmiş muz ekleyerek daha dolgun bir tatlı hazırlayabilirsiniz.
üzeri için çileğin yanı sıra nar taneleri veya frambuaz kullanarak daha renkli bir sunum oluşturabilirsiniz.
Toz fıstık yerine hindistan cevizi veya file badem serperek tatlıya farklı bir doku katabilirsiniz.
Daha kremamsı bir lezzet için sütün içine kısa süreliğine bir miktar krema ekleyebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Derin bir tencereye sütü alın ve üzerine toz şekeri ekleyin.
2.  Vanilini de ilave ettikten sonra karışımı orta ateşte, şeker tamamen eriyene kadar karıştırarak ısıtın.
3.  Süt kaynamamalı; parmağınızı değdirdiğinizde hafif sıcak hissedilecek seviyeye geldiğinde ocaktan alın.
4. Ceviz içini bıçak yardımıyla iri kalacak şekilde doğrayın; böylece tatlıya hoş bir doku kazandırabilirsiniz.
5. Güllaçı hazırlayacağınız kabın tabanına bir kepçe ılık süt dökerek zemini hafifçe ıslatın.
6.  Kabın boyutuna uygun şekilde güllaç yapraklarını yerleştirin ve her katın üzerine süt gezdirerek tamamen yumuşamalarını sağlayın.
7.  Yaprakların parlak yüzeyinin üstte kalmasına dikkat edin.
8. Yaprakların yarısını dizdikten sonra birkaç dakika bekleyin ve sütü iyice çekmelerine izin verin.
9.  Ardından doğradığınız cevizleri eşit biçimde serpiştirin.
10.  Kalan yaprakları da aynı yöntemle sütle buluşturarak üst üste yerleştirin.
11. Tatlıyı buzdolabına kaldırın ve en az birkaç saat dinlendirerek kıvamının oturmasını sağlayın.
12.  Sürenin sonunda dilimleyerek porsiyonlara ayırın.
13.  Servis etmeden önce üzerini taze nane yaprakları, çilek dilimleri, dövülmüş ceviz ve toz Antep fıstığı ile süsleyerek sunuma hazır hale getirin.
14.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Original Mexican Shrimp Cocktail
instructions: Mix together Roma tomatoes, sweet onion, ketchup, tomato and clam juice cocktail, salsa, cilantro, salsa verde, lime juice, hot pepper sauce, and garlic in a glass salad bowl until well combined; cover the bowl and refrigerate until cold, about 1 hour.
Cut tails from shrimp, if present, and gently fold into chilled tomato mixture. Stir avocado into shrimp cocktail until incorporated.

name: Original New York Cheesecake

ingredients.item: Four 8-ounce packages philadelphia cream cheese (use only full fat)
Three 8-ounce packages philadelphia cream cheese (use only full fat)

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C. Make and bake the cake crust as directed and leave it in the pan. Keep the oven on.

In a large bowl, using an electric mixer fitted with the paddle attachment if your mixer has one, beat 1 package of the cream cheese, ⅓ cup of the sugar, and the cornstarch together on low until creamy, about 3 minutes, scraping down the bowl several times. Blend in the remaining cream cheese, one package at a time, beating well and scraping down the bowl after each.

Increase the mixer speed to medium and beat in the remaining sugar, then the vanilla. Blend in the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each. Beat in the cream just until completely blended. The filling will look light, creamy, airy, and almost like billowy clouds. Be careful not to overmix! Gently spoon the batter over the crust.

Place the cake pan in a large shallow pan containing hot water that comes halfway (about 1 inch) up the side of the springform. Bake until the edge is light golden brown, the top is light gold, and the center barely jiggles, about 1 hour 15 minutes. If the cake still feels soft around the edge, let it bake for 10 minutes more (the cooking time will be about the same for both the 8- and 9-inch cheesecakes). Remove the cheesecake from the water bath, transfer to a wire rack, and let cool for 2 hours (just walk away—don't move it). Then, leave the cake in the pan, cover loosely with plastic wrap, and refrigerate until completely cold before serving, preferably overnight or for at least 6 hours.

Release and remove the side of the springform, leaving the cake on the bottom of the pan. Place on a cake plate. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Slice with a sharp straight-edge knife, not a serrated one, rinsing the knife with warm water between slices. Refrigerate any leftover cake, tightly covered, and enjoy within 2 days, or wrap and freeze for up to 1 month. 

Editor's note: This recipe was originally published in 'Junior's Home Cooking' and first appeared on Epicurious in October 2013. This creamy cheesecake is a show-stopper all on its own, but a scattering of fresh berries, some homemade caramel, or a fruit sauce like this strawberry compote all make welcome additions. Or, if you prefer a cheesecake with a sour cream topping, click over to this ‘Gourmet’ classic, which is an Epi staff favorite.

name: Original Orange Chicken By Panda Express
instructions: On a cutting board, cut chicken into 1x1-inch (2x2-cm) cubes and set aside.
In a medium mixing bowl, combine salt, white pepper, cornstarch, and flour. Whisk to combine.
Add the egg, water, and oil until it reaches the consistency of pancake batter.
Add the chicken to the batter and refrigerate at least 30 minutes.
Heat oil in a wok or heavy bottom pan to 350˚F (180˚C).
Gently add the chicken and cook for 5-6 minutes until lightly golden brown.
Remove the chicken from the pan and transfer to a paper towel-lined plate.
Set a heavy bottomed pot over medium- high heat and add the oil.
Once the oil begins to shimmer, add the red pepper flakes, ginger, and garlic, and cook for 30 seconds, stirring constantly.
Add the sugar and brown sugar, and stir to combine.
Add in the orange juice and allow the sugars to begin to dissolve in the liquid, stirring occasionally.
Add in the vinegar and soy sauce, and stir to combine.
Add the cornstarch and water together and whisk to combine. Add to the pan and stir.
Continue to cook the sauce until maple syrup consistency is achieved.
Add in the fried chicken and stir until completely coated in the sauce.
Top with sesame oil.
Enjoy!

name: Original Pizza Dough Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 ve 1/4 çay kaşığı (7 g) instant maya (1 paket)
3,5 – 4 su bardağı (438–500 g) elenmiş beyaz un (kontrollü ekleyin)
2 yemek kaşığı (30 ml) sızma zeytinyağı (ayrıca yağlamak için biraz daha)
Beyaz un yerine 00 pizza unu kullanarak daha elastik ve ince taban elde edebilirsiniz.
Yüksek proteinli ekmeklik un, daha iyi gluten yapısı ve kabaran kenarlar sağlar.
Daha rustik bir tat için unun %20’sini tam buğday unu ile değiştirebilirsiniz.
Instant maya yerine aktif kuru maya kullanılabilir (aynı miktar, önceden suda çözülmeli).
Uzun fermantasyon için maya miktarını yarıya indirip hamuru buzdolabında 24–48 saat dinlendirebilirsiniz.
Maya kullanmadan, ekşi maya ile daha aromatik bir pizza hamuru elde edilebilir.
Ilık su yerine oda sıcaklığında su, daha yavaş ama lezzetli bir mayalanma sağlar.
Daha gevrek taban için suyun %10’unu süt veya maden suyu ile değiştirebilirsiniz.
Zeytinyağı yerine ayçiçek yağı veya üzüm çekirdeği yağı kullanılabilir.
Daha klasik napoli usulü için yağ tamamen çıkarılabilir.
Toz şeker yerine bal veya pekmez (1 tatlı kaşığı) kullanılabilir.
Sofra tuzu yerine deniz tuzu veya kaya tuzu tercih edilebilir.
Tuz miktarı, uzun fermantasyonda biraz azaltılabilir.

instructions: 1. Ilık su, şeker ve mayayı geniş bir kapta karıştırın; üzerini kapatıp yaklaşık 5 dakika bekleyin.
2.  Maya köpürdüğünde unu ve tuzu ekleyin, ardından zeytinyağını ilave ederek yumuşak ve hafif ele yapışan bir hamur elde edene kadar yoğurun.
3.  Hamuru tezgâhta veya kap içinde 5–8 dakika yoğurmaya devam edin; parmağınızla bastırdığınızda yavaşça toparlanıyorsa kıvamı hazır demektir.
4. Hamuru hafif yağlanmış bir kaba alın, üzerini kapatın ve oda sıcaklığında 60–90 dakika, hacmi iki katına çıkana kadar mayalandırın.
5.  Mayalanan hamurun havasını alarak iki eşit bezeye ayırın, hafif unlanmış zeminde üzerlerini örtüp 10–15 dakika dinlendirin.
6. Dinlenen bezeleri elinizle bastırarak ortadan kenarlara doğru genişletin; mümkün olduğunca merdane kullanmadan açmanız önerilir.
7.  Şekil verdiğiniz hamuru kullanmadan önce 2–3 dakika tezgâhta bekletin; bu kısa dinlenme, hamurun fırında daha iyi kabarmasını sağlar.
8.  Hamur, önceden ısıtılmış fırında, tercihen pizza taşı veya sıcak tepsi üzerinde pişirilmeye hazırdır.

name: Originals Oven Roasted Chicken Salad Mason Jar

ingredients.item: Dietz & watson originals oven roasted chicken breast

instructions: In small bowl, combine Originals Oven Roasted Chicken Breast, Greek yogurt, red onion, celery and lemon juice.
Divide chicken mixture, spring mix, cranberries, apples and pecans in half.
To assemble, begin by placing chicken and dressing mixture into the bottom of 2 jars.
Next add lettuce then finish by topping with cranberries and pecans and tighten lids.
Once ready to eat, empty jar into a bowl, mix and enjoy!

name: Orzo And Broccoli Salad (no Mayo)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add orzo and cook for 8 minutes. Add broccoli florets to the pot and cook until tender, 2 more minutes. Drain and transfer to a large bowl.

Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-low heat. Add pine nuts and cook until browned, about 3 minutes. Add red pepper flakes; cook and stir until aromatic, about 30 seconds. Remove from the heat and pour over the orzo.
Toss orzo until coated with oil mixture. Add olives, Parmesan cheese, basil, and feta cheese. Toss again and season with salt and pepper.

name: Orzo And Wild Rice Salad
instructions: Bring 2 cups water and wild rice to a boil in a saucepan; reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until rice is tender but not mushy, 20 to 45 minutes, depending on rice variety and package directions.
Drain excess liquid, fluff rice with a fork, and continue to cook, uncovered, 5 minutes more. Spread in a shallow dish, cool to room temperature, then refrigerate until cold, about 20 minutes.

Meanwhile, bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook orzo in the boiling water, stirring occasionally until tender yet firm to the bite, 7 to 8 minutes. Drain orzo, rinse with cold water, then refrigerate to chill.
Combine chilled rice and orzo in a large bowl; stir in onion, currants, bell peppers, and corn. Season with 2 tablespoons basil, salt, and black pepper.

Whisk vinegar, honey, remaining ½ tablespoon basil, mustard, and garlic together in a separate bowl; slowly whisk in canola and olive oils until emulsified. Stir vinaigrette into rice-orzo mixture; season with salt and black pepper, if desired. Refrigerate before serving for 2 hours.

name: Orzo With Sun-dried Tomatoes And Kalamata Olives
instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook orzo in the boiling water, stirring occasionally until cooked through but firm to the bite, about 11 minutes. Drain.

Mix orzo pasta, tomatoes, and olives together in a large bowl. Pour pesto over pasta mixture and stir to coat. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese over the pasta mixture; stir. Drizzle olive oil over the salad and stir to achieve your preferred moisture level.

name: Osobuco With Beer, Very Special
original_name: Osobuco a la cerveza, muy especial
instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta, cortes los bordes de la osobuco con un cuchillo.
Procederemos, a espolvorear la harina en las piezas de la carne para sellarla.
Calentamos una cacerola con aceite de oliva.
Cuando esté caliente, inicia a sellar la carne por ambos lados. Una vez listas, apaga y reserva.
Mientras, iniciemos a cortar la cebolla, el puerro y filetea el ajo.
En otra cacerola, la vas a calentar con aceite. Una vez caliente, le añadirás el ajo para sofreír, posteriormente la cebolla y luego el puerro. Mezcla muy bien.
Ahora, incorporamos a la cacerola la carne sellada, la cerveza , la sal y pimienta, la hoja de laurel. Dejamos cocinar por 10 minutos a fuego medio.
Una vez evaporado el alcohol, cubrimos con el caldo de carne o verduras y la cda de paprika, mezclamos y dejamos cocer a fuego medio durante 15 minutos.
La idea es que la carne se vaya cocinando poco poco en todo el líquido, si notas que le falta y aún el osobuco está duro, agrégale más agua y cocínalo hasta que esté tierno.
Deja enfriar, sirve y degusta.

name: Osobuco With Wine Step By Step
original_name: Osobuco al vino paso a paso

ingredients.item: 5 cda soperas de pasta de tomate
2  vasos de agua o caldo de res

instructions: Lo primero que harás es condimentar el osobuco al gusto con sal y pimienta.
En una bandeja agrega la harina y enharina el osobuco.
En un sartén coloca aceite y sella la carne hasta que esté dorada por ambos lados. Saca y reserva.
Ahora es momento de picar los vegetales en cubos pequeños.
En el mismo sartén donde sellaste los medallones de osobuco, sofríe la cebolla y el puerro previamente picados, deja dorar y mueve. Añade un poco más de aceite si hace falta.
Una vez la cebolla y el puerro obtengan un color dorado agrega la pasta de tomate y mueve bien.
Incorpora el vino tinto y déjalo unos 5 minutos hasta que se evapore el alcohol.
Añade los trozos de carne y cubre con agua o caldo. Deja cocinar un mínimo de 2 horas.
Sabrás que tu osobuco está listo cuando la carne se despegue del hueso. Prueba la salsa y si le hace falta más sal, agrega.
Al momento de emplatar, sirve el osobuco con su salsa.
¡Disfruta!

name: Osobuko
instructions: Πασπαλίζουμε το μοσχάρι με αλεύρι και τινάζουμε για να φύγει το περίσσιο.
Ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο σε πλασοτέ κατσαρόλα και ροδίζουμε τα κομμάτια κρέατος λίγα-λίγα. Τα διατηρούμε σκεπασμένα σε πιατέλα.
Στο ίδιο ελαιόλαδο σοτάρουμε το ψιλοκομμένο κρεμμύδι, το σκόρδο, τα καρότα και το σέλερι για 4-5 λεπτά, μέχρι να μαλακώσουν.
Προσθέτουμε τις ντομάτες, τον πελτέ ντομάτας και τα μυρωδικά, καθώς και το κρασί και τον ζωμό.
Ξαναβάζουμε το κρέας μαζί με τα υγρά του στην κατσαρόλα, φροντίζοντας να δημιουργηθεί μία στρώση. Σκεπάζουμε και σιγοβράζουμε για 1 ώρα και 30 λεπτά.
Ξεσκεπάζουμε και συνεχίζουμε το βράσιμο για 30 λεπτά. Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι.
Αφαιρούμε το κρέας από τη σάλτσα και το κρατάμε ζεστό. Βράζουμε τη σάλτσα σε δυνατή φωτιά για λίγα λεπτά μέχρι να γλασάρει και να πυκνώσει. Όταν εμφανιστούν χοντρές φουσκάλες, η σάλτσα είναι έτοιμη.
Ανακατεύουμε σε μπολ το μαϊντανό, το ξύσμα λεμονιού και το σκόρδο.
Σερβίρουμε το οσομπούκο πάνω σε πουρέ πατάτας ή πολέντα , περιχύνουμε με τη γλασαρισμένη σάλτσα και πασπαλίζουμε με το μίγμα μαϊντανού, ξύσματος λεμονιού και σκόρδου.

name: Osobuko In The Hull
instructions: Ρίχνουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι στο μοσχάρι και το ταμπονάρουμε με αλεύρι.
Θα χρησιμοποιήσουμε ταψί ή γάστρα που να μπαίνει στο μάτι της κουζίνας.
Ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο και ροδίζουμε πολύ καλά το κρέας.
Ψιλοκόβουμε κρεμμύδι, σέλερι, καρότο, πράσο και τα προσθέτουμε.
Τα αφήνουμε να μαραθούν και σβήνουμε με κρασί.
Αφήνουμε να εξατμιστεί το κρασί κατά το ήμισυ, προσθέτουμε τα πομοντόρια, το θυμάρι, το δαφνόφυλλο, τον ζωμό και αφήνουμε να πάρει βράση.
Σκεπάζουμε καλά τη γάστρα με λαδόκολλα, αλουμινόχαρτο και το καπάκι και ψήνουμε στους 180°C στον αέρα για 2 ώρες περίπου ώσπου να μαλακώσει καλά το κρέας.
Βγάζουμε το κρέας σε πιατέλα και βάζουμε το σκεύος με την σάλτσα στην φωτιά, σε δυνατή φωτιά και αφήνουμε τη σάλτσα να πυκνώσει.
Ελέγχουμε το αλάτι και το πιπέρι.
Αν θέλουμε, σουρώνουμε την σάλτσα ή την αλέθουμε σε λεπτή σίτα.
Σερβίρουμε το οσομπούκο με πατάτες .

name: Osombuko Braised With Thick Macaroni
instructions: Για να κάνουμε το μοσχάρι οσομπούκο κοκκινιστό, ταμπονάρουμε  πρώτα το κρέας με απορροφητικό χαρτί.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι και πανάρουμε στο αλεύρι.
Ζεσταίνουμε το ελαιόλαδο σε δυνατή φωτιά και ροδίζουμε καλά το κρέας.
Προσθέτουμε τα ψιλοκομμένα λαχανικά.
Τα αφήνουμε για 5′-6′ να μαραθούν.
Προσθέτουμε τον πελτέ τρίβοντας τον στην βάση της κατσαρόλας.
Ρίχνουμε το μισό κρασί κι αφήνουμε να εξατμιστούν όλα τα υγρά.
Προσθέτουμε τα μυρωδικά δεμένα σε τουλπάνι.
Ρίχνουμε τα υπόλοιπα υγρά, το κρασί και το ζωμό καθώς και τις ντομάτες.
Χαμηλώνουμε τη φωτιά και βράζουμε πολύ χαμηλά για περίπου 2 ώρες μέχρι να μελώσει η σάλτσα και να μαλακώσει καλά το κρέας.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι στο τέλος του βρασμού.

name: Osso Bucco-style Beef Shank
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; cook and stir until softened, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a plate.

Add beef shank to the saucepan and increase the heat to medium-high; cook until browned, about 5 minutes per side. Return onion and garlic to the pan, and sprinkle thyme, oregano, rosemary, and marjoram over beef. Add tomatoes and tomato paste.

Pour water into the tomato paste can; swirl to remove any extra tomato paste, and add to the saucepan. Stir in lemon zest, salt, and pepper; bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer until beef is very tender, 1 1/2 to 2 hours.

name: Osso Buco

ingredients.item: 3 cm kalınlıkta kesilmiş 4-5 parça dana incik

instructions: 1. Dana incik parçalarını una bulayın.
2.  Yağladığınız ve una buladığınız incik dilimlerini koyu renk alana kadar kızartın, işlemi tamamlanmış etleri dinlendirin.
3. Aynı tavada önce soğanları çevirin.
4.  Sarımsakların 5-6 tanesini soğanlara ekleyip kokusunu duyana kadar pişirin.
5. Havuçları ve kerevizleri ekleyip kapağını kapatarak 5-6 dakika daha pişirin.
6. Kereviz yapraklarını, defneyi ve tane karabiberleri ekleyin.
7.  Etlerin üzerine soğan karışımınızı döşeyin.
8. Domatesleri dökün, et suyunu ekleyin, arzunuza göre tuz ilave edin.

9.  Tencerenin ağzını kapatın ve 2,5-3 saat kısık ateşte pişirin tenceredeki sebzeleri blender yapın üzerine sos olarak kullanabilirsiniz portakal kabuklarını, maydanozu ve kalan sarımsağı ince kıyın servis ederken ilave edin.

name: Osso Buco Alla Toscana Recipe

ingredients.item: 2  piezas de osobuco de ternera ((aprox. 350 g cada una, con hueso y médula))
2  ramas de apio ( en cubos pequeños)
2  tomates maduros ( sin piel ni semillas, en cubos)
200 ml de vino tinto seco ((preferiblemente chianti))
Sal marina y pimienta negra  (recién molida al gusto)
3 cdas de aceite de oliva  (virgen extra)

instructions: Secar bien las piezas de osobuco con papel de cocina y salpimentar generosamente.
En una olla de hierro fundido o cacerola pesada, calentar el aceite de oliva junto con la mantequilla y sellar la carne por ambos lados hasta que esté dorada. Retirar y reservar.
En la misma olla, añadir cebolla, zanahoria, apio y ajo, sofriendo a fuego medio hasta que estén tiernos y ligeramente caramelizados.
Incorporar los tomates frescos y el concentrado de tomate, cocinando unos minutos para intensificar el sabor.
Deglasar con el vino tinto, raspando el fondo de la olla para recuperar los jugos caramelizados. Dejar reducir a la mitad.
Reincorporar la carne, añadir el caldo, el romero, laurel, tomillo y una pizca de nuez moscada.
Tapar la olla y cocinar a fuego muy bajo durante 2 horas y 15 minutos, o hasta que la carne esté tan tierna que se desprenda fácilmente del hueso.
Rectificar de sal y pimienta. Retirar las hierbas aromáticas antes de servir.
Espolvorear perejil fresco picado y un toque de ralladura de limón justo al final para equilibrar los sabores.

name: Osso Buco Recipe With Asparagus

ingredients.item: 3  dientes de ajo (3 troceados y uno entero)

instructions: Sazona el osobuco con sal marina y pimienta por ambos lados.
Calienta una sartén con dos cucharadas de aceite de oliva y dora el diente de ajo junto a la ramita de romero para aromatizarlo.
Incorpora los osobuco a la sartén y séllalos por 7 minutos de cada lado hasta que queden bien tiernos.
Cuando los retires de la sartén, envuélvelos en papel aluminio para que suden con el vapor y suelten sus jugos.
Calienta otra sartén con aceite de oliva y saltea el diente de ajo troceado junto a los espárragos hasta que queden tiernos y firmes.
Retíralos y agrégales sal y pimienta.
Sirve el osobuco con los espárragos y disfruta.

name: Osso Buco Recipe With Baked Potatoes
original_name: Receta de osobuco con papas al horno

ingredients.item: 2  piezas de osobuco de res ( (aprox. 350 g cada una))
1 cdita de ralladura de limón  ((opcional, para un toque fresco))

instructions: Salpimentar los osobucos y sellarlos en una olla de hierro o sartén gruesa con un poco de aceite de oliva hasta que queden dorados por ambos lados. Retirar y reservar.
En la misma olla, sofreír la cebolla, el ajo, la zanahoria y el apio hasta que estén ligeramente caramelizados.
Añadir la pasta de tomate, remover y dejar que tome color por un minuto.
Incorporar el vino tinto y dejar reducir a fuego medio para evaporar el alcohol.

Agregar el caldo, la hoja de laurel, romero y tomillo. Colocar nuevamente los osobucos en la olla, tapar y cocinar a fuego bajo durante 1 hora y 30 minutos, o hasta que la carne esté suave y se desprenda del hueso.
Mientras tanto, lavar bien las papas, cortarlas en gajos y colocarlas en una bandeja de horno. Rociar con aceite de oliva, sal, pimienta y, si se desea, un poco de romero fresco.
Hornear las papas a 200 °C durante 40 minutos, girándolas a la mitad del tiempo para que se doren de manera uniforme.
Servir el osobuco bañado en su salsa con las papas al horno como guarnición. Finalizar con ralladura de limón para equilibrar la intensidad del guiso.

name: Osso Buco Recipe With Fresh Herbs
original_name: Receta de osobuco con hierbas frescas
instructions: Pela la cebolla y corta en trozos. Trocea los dientes de ajo.
Sazona las piezas de osobuco con sal y pimienta por ambos lados.
Calienta una sartén con aceite de oliva y sella la carne por ambos lados de 3 a 4 minutos. Retira.
En la misma sartén, agrega un poco más de aceite y sofríe los dientes de ajo junto a la cebolla por un par de minutos.
Vierte el caldo de carne, el vino blanco y el tomate triturado. Mezcla muy bien.
Incorpora la hoja de laurel, el tomillo y el romero. Mezcla y agrega las piezas de carne.
Tapa y cocina a fuego lento por una hora y media aproximadamente hasta que la carne esté blandita y la salsa haya reducido.
Cuando esté en el punto deseado, apaga y retira la hoja de laurel y las ramas de tomillo y romero.
Sirve cada pieza con una buena porción de salsa. ¡Disfruta!

name: Osso Buco Recipe With Mashed Potatoes
original_name: Receta de osobuco con puré de papas
